title: Panda Express
description: Fast-food chain for Chinese standards, including some health-conscious options.

user_reviews.Name: Captain Thai
user_reviews.Description:
I felt really bad about the experience with this service. My mom and I went to order food like we usually do. When it was time to pay, a server Xiaojie T .  He rang up our order. I was planning to pay with my card. When I was about to pay, I saw an American Express card—I didn’t know and was trying to take the card out to pay, but I noticed the payment had already gone through.

He said the payment was done, but I told him that I hadn’t paid yet and that it wasn’t my card. He yelled and He told me not to touch the card again. I explained multiple times that I didn’t touch it—I just wanted to pay with my card. But he kept saying, “Don’t touch the card anymore.”

I think the person like him do not do any customer service and do not need to abuse kid- i am 13 years old.
He makes me crying because of his attitude. I come with my family and I want to enjoy my day, but he destroyed it.
👎👎👎👎

user_reviews.Name: Dhehxj Shehxj
user_reviews.Description: Jenifer Was very kind to us and she served us perfectly since we were in this restaurant for the first time. Now we’ll come back again because we liked it. Thank you very much to this employee

user_reviews.Name: Lissa Duty
user_reviews.Description: My kid has hungry and loves this place. Her favorite dish is just a large Orange Chicken. The line was a bit long, but it went fast. The team was not super friendly but that is mostly because they were trying to hurry I am sure.

user_reviews.Name: amaris
user_reviews.Description: The lady that took my order could not hear good. She asked me the same question like 30 times. Good food, though.

user_reviews.Name: rani sandhya
user_reviews.Description: Bad attitude from the lady behind the counter on 10/16/2025 !! common you are serving food, better serve with good service ! Not by showing your bloody faced attitude.

user_reviews.Name: Nataly Mercado
user_reviews.Description:
On August 6, 2025, between 1:00 PM and 2:30 PM, my family and I experienced an extremely unprofessional and upsetting incident at Panda Express in the mall.

My husband was in line with our 3-year-old son and initially ordered a cub meal. Our son quickly changed his mind, so my husband requested to modify the order—which, as paying customers, we have always been able to do in the past. At the register, the sever   Xiaojie T  charged more than expected. My husband politely mentioned that under similar circumstances in the past, we had been charged the price of a regular plate.

Rather than calmly explaining the policy, the manager became argumentative. When my husband said, “Why are you arguing with a customer? Don’t be an asshole,” the manager shockingly replied, “You’re the asshole with that face.” I was standing nearby and heard this exchange clearly. Such language and behavior from a manager—especially in front of families and children—is absolutely unacceptable.

Later, when my husband went to get a straw, the manager gave him a dirty look. My husband jokingly pretended to take a picture, and the manager escalated the situation further by calling mall security. When security arrived, the manager again tried to argue about the order. I had to intervene to end the exchange, and security acknowledged the matter was over.

This entire interaction was unpleasant and deeply disappointing. A manager’s role should be to de-escalate and resolve customer concerns respectfully, not insult customers or create unnecessary conflict. Such conduct reflects poorly on both the restaurant and the mall.

I hope this matter is investigated and addressed promptly to ensure no other families have a similar experience.

user_reviews.Name: Helvio Neto
user_reviews.Description: Good service and good food. It is located in the food court. There is a little wait time before you get the meal, but nothing ridiculous.

user_reviews.Name: Jasmin Flores
user_reviews.Description: I just asked for napkins because I didn’t get any and this lady at the register almost threw them at me.

user_reviews_extended.Description: It does not taste like other branches! I am not sure how it is different but I prefrr other branches!

user_reviews_extended.Name: jose ortiz
user_reviews_extended.Description: The worst panda I’ve ever eaten in my life, bad service, bad food, I understand that it’s fast food but I’ve been to many and this has been the worst without a doubt

user_reviews_extended.Name: Thanusha Chenimineni
user_reviews_extended.Description: Got allergies by having this for lunch on 16th of oct, ( Kungpao chicken , Rice )!!! food inspection should be happened ASAP !!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Riley Casper
user_reviews_extended.Description: Since I can’t put zero stars, I’ll put one. That was the most disappointing meal I have ever had. I got the orange chicken with white rice and discovered there was a hair in my food. Disgusted, I took it back up for a replacement hoping it was a one time thing. Shortly after, my friend found a hair on her food. We went up to the desk hoping to receive a refund for this and not only were they very rude about it, they refused to give us one. They instead told us that it “wasn’t their hair” or “i didn’t get a good look at the food” We showed them the food and they saw a hair in it. After arguing with them he took my receipt, took my other replacement dish, and took my drink and threw it away right in front of me. While waiting for the other server, the lady at the cash register claimed that it was probably our hair because they have male chefs (even though one chef had hair)and they keep their hair up (when it was falling out of the ponytail) or that we saw ginger when it was clearly hair. The chef then came and gave me a $15 gift card for panda express not once apologizing for the disgusting inconvenience. I was less the satisfied with the food and appalled about how they handled this. I would not recommend this to my worst enemy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Emma Reviews
user_reviews_extended.Description: This might have been the worse dining experience of my life. I found hair in me and my son’s food and was not issued a refund. I have looked through other reviews and have seen multiple other accounts of hair being found in food. I am disgusted by their lack of food cleanliness and horrified by their incompetence regarding my refund. They were also extremely rude regarding the refund and tried to gaslight me into thinking it was MY fault we found HAIRS in our food. This is the worst place to eat and I will NEVER go again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Junior Pinedo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Went in to get broccoli beef and fried rice bowl, the guy serving the food was super rude. He gave so little broccoli beef that I asked him if he can add more, he looked at it and didnt want to add it. He looked like he was already in a bad mood along with another lady as well. Plus what he gave me wasnt broccoli beef, it was something else.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sam
user_reviews_extended.Description: Extremely disappointed with Panda Express in Frisco. Employees are always stingy with the portions every time we go to this location. Like at least serve what we paid for instead of ripping us off.  It's infuriating to pay for a plate but consistently receive the same inadequate portion size. Management needs to address this recurring issue promptly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Scarlett Daffinrud
user_reviews_extended.Description: Me and my friend both went to eat here. However we soon BOTH found hair in our food. She brought hers to be checked by the service and they gave her another bowl, however soon after I found a hair in my food as well. I brought mine up to inform the staff about this problem and then went back to ask for a refund. However they refused and were very rude about it. Finally they gave only my friend a store credit after throwing away her food and throwing away her drink as well. Would recommend if you want food poisoning.

user_reviews_extended.Name: M RY
user_reviews_extended.Description: Place great just not when the chowmein has lots of veggies and not noodles. Love it when it’s fresh

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nadia Azzam
user_reviews_extended.Description: 2 stars only because their food is okay. The people serving the food at the mall are SUPER RUDE I would give them negative stars if I could.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ted Yu
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Man two times ago the food was fresh and delicious.

Last time it was a disappointment.

On top of that we purchased a large water for $0.50. Since when did restaurants start charging for water?

Furthermore, when I went for a refill I was told "only one refill, ok?"

I'm sorry are we in the midst of a drought?

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amanda
user_reviews_extended.Description: The driver was well over an hour late to deliver to my office. Watched the map and he was here just driving in circles, i did provide my number for driver to call if lost but he didn't. When he finally came up to second level to my office he said google sent him in circles but he had entered in a different address than what I had entered in my order....Since he was late and came in when he did, I was on a conference call at my desk and he tried chatting up a storm of his experience of delivering... Sorry but this is why I ordered delivery, because I was in meetings all day and couldn't take time away to go eat...but could eat while working. Food was hardly nuke warm. My office does have a microwave and its fine microwaved but being my office is a 10 minute drive that it would still be warm/hot....as  well as not almost an hour late. Guess I wont be using this location but maybe another location or simply not order while I'm at the office...

user_reviews_extended.Name: R H (warmheart525)
user_reviews_extended.Description: This Panda Express does not take cash, apparently. The bitter Asian cashier woman,  who barely speaks English didn’t want to take my $ 20 bill. She made my friend pay for my meal with his card. My friend and me both asked her why she doesn’t take cash and she just kept ignoring our question and played dumb. She needs to get fired. Stingy with entrée, too. Not going there again! Next time I go to Stone Briar mall to eat, I’m not even going to look at their direction. Their food is just as rotten as her.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Regan Rodriguez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Your cash is no good here. There wasn’t a sign stating so, just a rude worker behind the cash register. I had several bad pieces of broccoli in my beef and broccoli entree. I should’ve picked another place to eat in the food court.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christina Barfield
user_reviews_extended.Description: I historically have had good experiences at Panda Express, but this is by far the worst experience I have ever had. The food was overcooked and awful. When I asked for it to be replaced (not even a refund) and to be given fortune cookies that weren’t stale, the manager (Alicia as I was told) laughed in my face and told me no. I was given two new fortune cookies to make up for my poor experience and wasted food. I have been in the service industry for 13 years and this is an unacceptable way to handle this sort of situation. I’m appalled. Hopefully you will fix this kind of behavior for future customers.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ivan Rivera
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worst experience. The cashier had the audacity to complain and racially profile me for asking for extra sriracha. The nerve of this woman. And when confronted, she stayed quiet and acted like nothing happened. In these kind words “ The sriracha is to eat here, I already gave you enough, it’s not to take the packets home and use at home”.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alina Corral
user_reviews_extended.Description: I would have given this place a five star. If it wasn't for employee. A staff member who made my family uneasy. I took my kids before to Panda Express, although the one on Loop 288 was the first time and the last time. The lady cashing us out told my oldest son, no you can't take the trays until you pay. Although he did tell her, my mom is the one paying and she's paying for all 4 trays. She didn't allow him to go sit with the rest of the kiddos. I told her, that I was paying for all 4 trays. I couldn't go to the front of the line, because it was extremely crowded. I told my son to take the little ones and two trays with him, as he was doing she grabbed the tray and said no. I told him, let's walk out then. Then she let go of the tray, I finally came up and paid all for trays, I told her that was unprofessional of her to treat her customers that way. With an ugly stare,  disgustingly snare and grunt came out of her she gave me the amount. As she didn't care, when I asked her for some utensils, she didn't acknowledge me until I paid for everything. I asked again, she looked at me and said you should have asked before, and you have to get in the line to get them. Remind you the line was full. The guy next to me saw, she was giving me a hard time. So he asked the lady, who was making his plate for the utensils and extra sauces. If it wasn't for him, I would have stepped out. Don't get wrong, the food is deliciously fantastic! I have always loved Panda Express food. Every restaurant is different. Never, have I felt the way I did that day. If I was alone I would have walked out. But because I had my children, I didn't. I made sure I didn't make a sence or show any frustration. I made sure my kids had a great experience,  thank goodness that the little ones didn't know what was going on. Just the older kids, now they make excuses not to go to Panda Express on loop 288 in Denton. So, if we want Panda Express we'll go to another city to get their delicious food.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dibya Sanyal
user_reviews_extended.Description: Super rude staff. Gave my daughter a bowl of Kung Pao chicken with barely any chicken. Responded very rudely when I pointed the same out and made another bowl with even less chicken. Not going there again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Pie Rye
user_reviews_extended.Description: Let’s just not talk about the food. There was a asian lady there. She was super racist to us when we went to order. She was looking down on us like we’re cheap? Her attitude stinks! I ordered 3 orders for my family.  I went back and asked for some complimentary water for my toddler and she rejected??? Like seriously? I have to pay for some water? It’s a cup of water and I’m paying  $40? I went to sarku japan to get some water without purchasing anything and they offered me 2 cups.  That is customer service. I then ordered more food from them. I will be taking my business to them instead.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Natalia Jacobsen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worst customer service I’ve ever had. By this manager I think called Victor who poured 2 cups of water all over my mom and me . I understand accidents happen, but this wasn’t an accident. This guy was extremely in a hurry to close the restaurant and it was 8:25 pm. When they’re supposed to close at 9 pm.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Haytham Alejil
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food wasn’t that good; the mixed rice and noodles didn’t have flavors or salt. I wouldn’t say I liked the orange chicken, and the Angus steak was ok. Overall the quality was very little compared to the price of $11 for a small quantity.

user_reviews_extended.Name: barbara colbert
user_reviews_extended.Description: I order food through the window orange chicken and mushrooms and zucchini chicken with half rice and noodles and got home and notice I had lots of noodles and very little rice on top of the noodles and had a small amount of orange chicken and 3 peices of chicken for the mushroom chicken very small serving. My husband portion was huge and got charged for two egg rolls when I ordered 1. Tried calling but no one answer,  just saying if were going to support you dont RIP the customer off.

user_reviews_extended.Description: Took the time to do a survey and for some reason the coupon wouldn’t scan. The lady kept saying the code was expired, but it was not. She just said there was nothing she could do. Always have issues with this location. Customer service is terrible. Won’t be coming back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mario Ruiz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Good

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eduardo Sempronii
user_reviews_extended.Description: Siempre rica la comida de Panda Express. Lástima su empleada en el local de Stonebriar, que dá por conocidas las comidas y cómo se componen los menúes. Debería ser un poco más amable. Por el resto repito, exquisita la comida. Y "el premio" que te ganas con el ticket, se puede usar hasta DOS DÍAS después! O sea Panda Express quiere que comas, vivas, duermas, etc, etc ahí!! Estamos todos locos! Un sistema de promoción así es casi alucinante, conminatorio!! En fin. Aparte de la comida, creo que esta gente tiene bastantes cosas y gente para rever. Si política de RRHH y RRPP dejan bastante que desear. Sólo la comida bien. El resto... Mmmhh

user_reviews_extended.Name: Adalberto Torres
user_reviews_extended.Description: Recomendable pero lleven limón

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joana darc oliveira Eva olivier
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tudo bem bom

title: Panda Express
description: Fast-food chain for Chinese standards, including some health-conscious options.

user_reviews.Name: Tony
user_reviews.Description: I have eaten here a few times and the food is decent. The service is fast and the food is good. They give you alot of food for a few meals for me.

user_reviews.Name: Thuan Pham
user_reviews.Description: OMG, cmon. Yall gonna get someone killed, like I’m appreciated how we keep kitchen utensils clean every time starting to cook a new batch. But this is lack of accountability and conscienceless!!!

user_reviews.Name: Shelly P.
user_reviews.Description: Placed my order via mobile app at 2:35PM, got home at 2:47 and opened my plate of food to discover dried old shrimp and the best part, mold on the side entry!! The super greens mixed with the chowmein has black, brown and blue spots with mold! I’ve been calling the store now the last 30 minutes and no one will answer the phone!!!!

user_reviews.Name: The Barnes Family
user_reviews.Description:
Listen… I actually have my Food Handler’s Certificate, I am beyond disappointed with this place. My wife and I ate here on 11/18/2025, and BABY… it tore us up. We’ve been dealing with the BG’s all morning. That is NOT normal, and it’s definitely not okay.

The food might look good when it’s served, but the way they’re handling it? Unsafe. The temperatures are off, it’s not being kept in the safe zone, and it’s clear they are not throwing out food when it’s time to toss it. That’s how you get people sick — and clearly, we were the proof.

I work too hard to spend my money somewhere that can’t follow basic food safety. Train your staff. Respect your customers. Because this right here? Unacceptable.

I will be contacting the food inspector and requesting a refund, because no company should be serving food that sends folks home sick.

Do better.

UPDATE: The manager, Gio, called me back and showed real empathy this time. She apologized, explained she was off the previous day, and her boss approved a refund. I appreciate her taking ownership on the second call.

But I still stand by my original concern — something is off with the food safety at this location. My wife and I got sick after eating here, and based on the reviews, this seems to be a pattern. I’m grateful they made it right, but I truly hope they focus on proper sanitation, temps, and overall safe practices moving forward.

user_reviews.Name: Karla
user_reviews.Description: I was disappointed with my Big Plate ordered at 3/8/22025 at Panda Express. There were far too few shrimp considering the price—I expected more! Instead of a well-balanced portion, I mostly got rice and noodles. On top of that, the broccoli was so hard that it was practically inedible. It felt like the vegetables weren’t even properly cooked. The quality definitely did not meet expectations. I hope the restaurant takes action and improves the way they serve their dishes!

user_reviews.Name: Adam Shadows
user_reviews.Description:
The Broccoli Beef and Green Beans Chicken entries were delicious, but the Chow Mein could have been cooked more thoroughly.

The servers were timely and courteous once I was served, but I had to wait a few minutes for them to handle drive-through orders first.

The atmosphere was friendly, but a few tables needed to be cleaned.

Altogether, it was a satisfying experience, aside from a few areas they need to work on.

user_reviews.Name: Chris Willis
user_reviews.Description: They give you a full bowl of rice and 6 pieces of meat need to do better on serving the food right

user_reviews.Name: Bks MDr
user_reviews.Description: I ordered two bowl from Uber eats. First of all, they messed up both of the orders. They switched selections between two orders. Secondly, I got like 5 or 6 small pieces of chicken in each order.Thirdly, this location Panda express food doesn't taste good at all. I had to throw it away and get some other foods delivered. The landa express I have eaten in different locations so far were far better. Really disappointed with this location Uber Eats food.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tony
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have eaten here a few times and the food is decent. The service is fast and the food is good. They give you alot of food for a few meals for me.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Thuan Pham
user_reviews_extended.Description: OMG, cmon. Yall gonna get someone killed, like I’m appreciated how we keep kitchen utensils clean every time starting to cook a new batch. But this is lack of accountability and conscienceless!!!

user_reviews_extended.Description: I ordered two bowl from Uber eats. First of all, they messed up both of the orders. They switched selections between two orders. Secondly, I got like 5 or 6 small pieces of chicken in each order.Thirdly, this location Panda express food doesn't taste good at all. I had to throw it away and get some other foods delivered. The landa express I have eaten in different locations so far were far better. Really disappointed with this location Uber Eats food.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cassandra Kennedy
user_reviews_extended.Description: I ordered the noodles, not cabbages with a hint of noodles. This is extremely disappointing. And I eat at panda way more than I should admit. Way too much crunchy cabbage it tastes disgusting.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Meranda
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ladies inside fixing food and checking out were very rude to my daughters. I do not appreciate their behavior. I will be making a complaint with corporate for this location.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David M
user_reviews_extended.Description: Came here on a very busy Thursday night, Diego and crew had exceptional customer service and very fresh delicious food!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alise Beauty Bar m
user_reviews_extended.Description: My food was cold. When she tried fixing it, she gave me hot sides and cold steak and shrimp. Why would I want hot sides and not hot meat. Make it make sense. Terrible

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cre_cre
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is the worst service I have ever seen at a Panda express. The order should have been ready at 7:26 and it’s still not ready. The workers at like they just didn’t care

user_reviews_extended.Name: John M
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fast Chinese food! You go through the line and tell them what sides you want(fried rice, steamed rice, vegetables, or chow mein noodles) and then you get to choose your protein. Current options include things like teriyaki chicken, orange chicken, walnut fried shrimp, and broccoli beef. Pretty affordable prices and you even get your fortune told by way of fortune cookie😃

user_reviews_extended.Name: pranaya gaade
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently visited Panda Express and was a bit disappointed with the portion sizes. The amount of rice was much more than expected, but there were only a few pieces of chicken. I was hoping for a more balanced meal, especially for the price. I think they could improve by giving a more generous portion of the main items like chicken. Hopefully, my next visit will be better.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lucien S.
user_reviews_extended.Description: Place was extremely clean-conscious, and the food was real well done! Staff was kind and friendly! Underrated

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rafael Diaz
user_reviews_extended.Description: I ordered Uber Eats..  I ordered the Chow Mein, Firecracker Breast and Walnut Honey Shrimp. I got more onion and celery than I did noddle's in the chow mein.. it was so gross, the shrimp was soggy and had a foul taste to the shrimp.. and the firecraker chicken  had no bang.. should just call it  plain cold chicken..   this is sad because i really  like Panda.. they messed this up really bad...

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alexandra W
user_reviews_extended.Description: The workers are always so polite and friendly. They always carry a nice smile and never forget to ask what sauces I need, plus they aren’t light with the amount of sauce unless you tell them specifically you only want 2 sauces. The food is always hot and fresh as well and I love their super greens & chicken egg rolls

user_reviews_extended.Name: Longyi Bi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Good food and service- it feels great to be welcomed by the staff with smiles

user_reviews_extended.Name: Persis Kaabi
user_reviews_extended.Description: I wished I can get 0 star but unfortunately I have to choose one at least to be able to write review. I was there today when it comes to me to order my food look what I saw inside of the food. Hair just zoom out to see it . I left without eating there. It’s horrible.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jack Edgar
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered six eggrolls via DoorDash. Paid for 6, got 1. Called and they would not answer phone.

user_reviews_extended.Name: D'Vaughn Bell
user_reviews_extended.Description: Not sure what all the four stars are about. I came here while waiting on something from AutoZone next door and the food was great, affordable and fast!!! Not to mention the staff here seems super friendly as well. If I'm in the area and want #Chinese food I'm definitely coming back to this Panda Express 🐼

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dejan D
user_reviews_extended.Description: I drove with my wife to get family meal. Ordered from Brian on drive through chow mein and fried rice and two orange chicken and one  Beijing beef and additional large chow mein. We have been ordering this for years. Pull up to pay and pick up and I noticed on receipt there was no additional charge for chow mein so I asked lady (in picture on left side) why there is no charge for chow mein and she said it's there in the bag it's included with family meal same price on family meal for extra chow mein. Got home and opened boxes and noticed it is only 5 boxes and one orange chicken is missing so I called the panda number on receipt and told them that I was just there and one orange chicken is missing from my family meal and explained over the phone that I ordered family meal and additional chow mein.  He told me he will prepare one more order of it and to come over. As I arrived to the restaurant lady that gave me the bag first time started telling that she personally packed the food and my whole order was there all 5 boxes. Then started telling me bring all 5 boxes back. I said I ordered 2 or. ch. 1 bei. beef 2 chow mein and fried rice and I came back after calling the restaurant that I am missing orange chicken. Then she left and talked to manager (in mid picture).manager started saying same thing ( I don't know what she was told) bring all 5 boxes back here . I told that is not what I was told over the phone and I didn't bring them if she wants me to do that than I want whole refund and I will never come back here. Then she changed her attitude and said I can give you box of orange chicken for full price of chow mein and I told her that is fine because that is what I wanted I first place and I paid $5.8+ and left. Really disappointed on miscommunication and misunderstanding and lack of customer service training in this place. Finally got what I wanted and ordered but had to leave family on the table to come back twice and finally get what my kids wanted to eat for dinner. I must say service is zero and I will not come back there again. Hope you get all the needed training if you continue working there.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michelle Holmes
user_reviews_extended.Description: It's a good and affordable Asian food! Lo mein and orange chicken are my favorite dishes.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeffrey Moody (MOODY)
user_reviews_extended.Description: Wow, the orange chicken is not even the same.  Change it back!!!  I’m sitting here and is different somehow.  Too much vinegar I think now in the orange chicken!!  Blah!!  Change it back!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: ahmet gokhan sasmazel
user_reviews_extended.Description: There are tables and chairs in the restaurant's garden, so you don't have to sit in the freezing cold air conditioning.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lucanh Nguyen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered a bowl of the hot orange chicken along with fried rice and broccoli to go. The hot orange chicken is only in for a limited time and it was good.

user_reviews_extended.Name: dred C
user_reviews_extended.Description: There's a reason why we love to order from this place. Today we have again experienced why we do. We always order our family pack via drive thru. It was past 12 noon and the weather was pretty hot. The sweet lady by the window greeted us with sweet smile, as always, and asked us if we could wait a few minutes for our order. No problem waiting when you see that wonderful smile, but she went beyond that, she offered free drinks for me and my kid while we wait! That really made our day, A big shout out to this young lady, I hope the management will not punish her for giving 2 free drinks to compensate our wait time. She is an asset in your company. Even the young man who delivered the food to us is worthy of our appreciation for being polite, and friendly. God bless these kids who work hard and gave a lasting impression to my 13 yr old son.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dave Schain
user_reviews_extended.Description: Not that it’s this location in particular, it’s Panda Express as a whole.  The food used to be so much better and now it seems like the quality is gone and they are using bad meat, vegetables and sauces.  I understand cutting costs to increase profits, but it’s just gone too far.   The orange chicken which is their most popular items, now just tastes plain gross.  This location is very nice and the staff are very friendly so it’s not their fault.  It’s just bad food now and will just not eat with Panda Express again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joseph Wayne
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food is good but my goodness, there seems to be no captain of the ship. Chaos, no communication, and a snail’s pace.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Thomas Anderson
user_reviews_extended.Description: I wish I had a different Panda Express close, I hate that I like it so much. Consistently I’m let down by the lack of beef and only getting brócoli. Hopefully they get better quality control

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mahmoud Albouidani
user_reviews_extended.Description: I used to come to this place regularly and always asked them if the rice and chicken were fresh. Unfortunately, they kept assuring me it was, but it turned out otherwise. This has happened multiple times, and I am very disappointed. I will not be coming back again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Fabian Vazquez
user_reviews_extended.Description: The manager is very kind and detailed oriented. It’s easy to see that he leads the team’s cohesion. I feel welcomed the place is in order and the food is great.

user_reviews_extended.Name: James S
user_reviews_extended.Description:
This particular panda express used to be good, but for a past couple of years, it really sucks. They don't add enough sauce to your order, not even what is required by Panda Express itself. Are they trying to make a profit out of NOT giving out sauces? Probably, it's that bad.
The quality of food really depends -- for a national fast food chain, the quality of the food they serve is very IFFY. It is bad most days and sometimes, if you are REALLY lucky, it's ok.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anna Gosling
user_reviews_extended.Description: This location never fails to satisfy my craving for their kung pao chicken and fried veggie rolls (with teriyaki sauce). Even on a busy Saturday evening and a short wait, I was treated with courtesy. I like dining in at this location and, now that they serve fried apple "egg rolls" for dessert, I have an additional yummy treat to take home👌👌

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bob Dole
user_reviews_extended.Description: Went in the drive through at 10:15 and literally nothing was ready. They told me they didn’t have egg rolls, teriyaki, or crab ragoons ready. I know it’s early but when it opens at 10:00 it should be ready by 10:00

user_reviews_extended.Name: Trevor O'Donnell
user_reviews_extended.Description: Would recommend going to a different Panda Express. They do not give a lot on the entrees. My extra order of honey walnut shrimp came with only 5 shrimps.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Danny Huynh
user_reviews_extended.Description: I could probably run 10 laps around the establishment before they’d have my order ready. Two bowls and a plate took them 35+ minutes to make, even when I ordered a head of time. Service and promptness is a joke…

user_reviews_extended.Name: Pure Silkiness
user_reviews_extended.Description:
When I tell you that I will NEVER visit this location again, that's REAL TALK! 👎 🙅‍♀️ 😒 🙄.
I went through the drive-through and placed my order. I had to repeat my order several times in. She still did not enter it in correctly. So I had to have her fix it. The drive-through associates name was
ANNIE Q. I wanted to ask her a question about the app.
I had a question about getting my points for the visit on the app. the app i wanted to ask her about, I said, I have a question..she didn't say anything, so when I got to the window.
I tried to ask her about it. She said on the app. I said yes, she rolled her eyes and closed the window, in my FACE..ummmm, wth 🤯😵‍💫🧐😲😳😡😤😠🤬. I guess she didn't have time for questions. Luckily, in the time she was gone, I figured it out.
When she came back, I said that was so rude how you just close the window in my face in the middle of me trying to ask you a question. I still had the app appointing it to it trying to ask you a question, and you slammed the door in my face.
She said..sorry that will be 16.02 in one breath... like she didn't even care. 😡😤😠🤬Then she told me that my order wasn't ready...the were waiting on supergreens and to pull around and the will bring it out. I waited 12 minutes.🤬 I almost went in when I saw him coming out with my food. Then, to put the icing on the cake. The order was wrong, and I had to go in anyway.😤😡😠🤬 They weren't even apologetic , they just fixed it.
I was on my lunch break, and I was ten minutes LATE getting back.😤😤😡🤬.
This is NOT the location for me, and if I hadn't already been an established customer liking Panda Express. I would never purchase it again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Karla Enriquez
user_reviews_extended.Description: I came in a couple days ago and I believe it was emily helping me in the drive thru & she was so kind & went out of her way just to help me. she’s the best!

user_reviews_extended.Name: paintguy60 it's me
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Orange chicken portions were super small and dry also hard and the rice was uncooked and still crunchy.
The beef and broccoli had only three small pieces of beef and had the honey walnut shrimp that had only four pieces of shrimp in it and the chow mein was dry almost as if it under the heating lamps for a while.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Narayan Ramesh
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I got Panda Express the other day and ordered the Fried rice and chow mein alongside with Orange Chicken and Honey Walmut Shrimp.
The orange chicken was amazing. The sweetness and crunchiness was fire as usual.
The Walnut Shrimp was solid and definitely will be the second thing I order with the Orange Chicken. The sweetness was really good on the shrimp and the cook was well done.
I was not a fan of the fried rice as it was really bland and will definitely be going with the chow mein from now on as it was a better base for me opposed to the rice.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marissa K
user_reviews_extended.Description: The service used to be so good. But now ever since they closed the inside and is only doing drive thru and online it’s gotten sad. When I order something and ask for 4 sweet and sours cause it’s for 3 people to share. Well they decide to get me 4 containers with BARLY anything in it. The amount they gave me in 4 different containers all filled up almost 1 full one. We weren’t too happy about that. And today We submitted an order online to be ready by like 11:10 and I had to drive there 10 minutes, drive back to drop it off to my sister, and back to work (10 minute drive) and since I got off at 11 and got there around 11:15 or so cause of traffic it STILL wasn’t ready. And instead of giving me what I ordered they had to replace my $4 item with a $1.50 item cause it wasn’t ready either. Even tho I submitted the order at Like 10:30 or so, and we don’t even like it. It wasn’t good service or fast. Nor was it even on time. Not very happy about them anymore 😔😤😠

user_reviews_extended.Name: michael yu
user_reviews_extended.Description: Highly disappointed with the fried rice, and the fact that they don’t even have white rice available was disappointing enough. Only redeeming factor was the soda, and meats did not taste like meat.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Daniel201
user_reviews_extended.Description: Picked up my food through drive thru to have an early lunch. Ordered a 2 item combo with fried rice/chow mein with orange chicken and chicken breast with string bean. Chow mein was dry and tasted like it was made yesterday. String bean chicken had just string beans and hardly any chicken. Panda's food has deteriorated for some reason. I will think twice before going back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Geoffery Acheson
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Ordered a family meal online to be picked up at 8:30 (an hour before close). When I arrived to pick up the order, the young lady informed us that they did not have mushroom chicken available, and it would take 15 minutes to make. As soon as I told her I did not mind, a look of regret spread across her face. After talking to what I can assume was the MOD, she then proceeded to tell us that they would not be able to fulfill that part of my order and ask if we would like a different selection.

I will not be returning to a place that blatantly lies to my face.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Darby Ferrer
user_reviews_extended.Description: The two ladies that waited on me were very sweet and friendly. It was right at 12 when I went today. I walked right up to order my food but it seemed like a lot of it needed to be refreshed. I asked if they had more broccoli. She asked the cooks and he told her it would be 5 minutes. The cook didn’t seem to have any urgency to refresh. I felt bad for the huge crowd of people who entered right after me. Food is always good!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kyle Dent
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I'm gonna first say that you have to remember this is Panda Express.
You get what you get.
But anymore this Panda is falling farther and farther in quality.
The last few times I've been here, the fried rice has never tasted the same and has been at best "sub par". But the entrees have at least been passable.
Not this time.
This time the Angus beef was even cold and tasteless.

I only gave 2 stars instead of 1 because they've yet to ruin the Orange Chicken.

Save the hassle and find a better Panda than this one.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ash Alvavi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great food. I love Panda Express I just wish the people working here were more receptive. I’m tired of micro aggression and eye rolling when ordering. SMH

user_reviews_extended.Name: Grotty Rogue
user_reviews_extended.Description: It's fast food, so keep that in mind...I think the food is good. The place is always clean. The staff is always quick and friendly. I don't think they've ever gotten our order wrong. The price seems right for the portion size and quality. We like it because of the variety and that they serve Pepsi products.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sanchit Mishra
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The only good part was a clean restaurant area. The food was blant, and noodles were really hard and had no taste.  Fried rice was tasteless. Wouldn't recommend this restaurant.
P.S. This feedback is not for the entire Panda Express but just for this restaurant. Panda Express at Stonebriar mall and other places have good quality food.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Adrick Hunter
user_reviews_extended.Description:
So glad the teriyaki chicken was available today, the tenderness of that meat is bar none.

Friendly staff, friendly service, even reminded me to get a packet of the teriyaki sauce to take as well.  The portions are normally rather nice as well, especially for the third item requested.

For those seeing this, I go there around dinner time, I don't know what their lunch hour is like.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jose Ramon Galicia
user_reviews_extended.Description: I didn't like the steamed rice, was over cooked.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bailey Barnes
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently went here and got the worst case of food poisoning I’ve ever experienced. To say it wasn’t pleasant is an understatement. I have a feeling it’s how they prepare their food. Seen quite a few complaints about cold/old food. Seems about right. Literally feel like I’m about to be sick thinking about the food, but I highly recommend maybe trying a different location than this one or just ordering in some takeout unless you want to be exploding out of both ends at the same time...

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marc Studebaker
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is by far the worst and most frustrating panda express I have ever experienced. Recently moved to the area and this is the closest one. They regularly do not have their top 5 menu items ready, which speaks to piss poor management. They will short you basic menu items condiments, and when you check, find it missing and request it, they will tell you they did give it to you. The last 5 attempts to order from the drive through has warranted me to have to drive away because they inform me my single item, which is on the top 5 menu items, is going to take up to 15 minutes wait. Absolutely unacceptable for a fast food restaurant. I recommend anyone avoid this place. Waste of time and money. And I'm a HUGE panda express fan.  Get your management in order.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vimal Anand
user_reviews_extended.Description: Extremely slow service. Had to wat for a solid 15 mins to just pick my online order which was right in front of me. The cashier dint bother to even turn around to see or ask what I was waiting for. Unfortunately this isn't the first time this is happening here

user_reviews_extended.Name: Yolanda Galvan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very upset we ordered 5 meals and they didn’t get our orders right. It was drive thru.  Of course we didn’t notice until we got home. I called to let them know how angry I was but of course no one answered. I tried calling several times. That’s so frustrating because panda expresses is like 20 minutes away from my home I couldn’t see myself driving back during traffic. So, Please check your order before you drive off.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alejandro Acevedo
user_reviews_extended.Description: I arrived to pick up an order, I was not greed and ignored for a while. Then the Lady ask if I was picking up. I said the name on the order and seem she did not even cared of my answer. I saw her putting the order on the tray and just going back with out even caring if it was my order. What a customer service practice. She should feel fortunate in this times she has a job and really make a difference, so customer feel welcome and come back again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Its Me
user_reviews_extended.Description: Manager was a joke! She should get a different job if she does not know customer service. Why would people pay this manager when she cant be decent the least? QUIT! This location has nasty food and dirty tables. Im amazed how they are passing the city health with the things they do. They served me without gloves and the manager girl just rolled her eyes at me when i asked to put on gloves. Panda need to do something with her sour face

user_reviews_extended.Name: Devo
user_reviews_extended.Description: As unhealthy as this place is, i still thought I'd stop in tonight, 8pm. Maybe it was fate telling me not to eat there. the lady in front of me was standing there a good 3 minutes before i asked her if she already ordered.  She said the lady told her to wait. It seems the lady, manager apparently,  was too busy taking Internet orders. To make matters worse, she brought a few tickets over to where the line was and didn't even acknowledge me or the 2 other customers waiting. I waited a moment to let her get organized but she still never looked up. I just walked out. I'll probably never go back now. Thank her for me.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Roly chakma
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The food is always so good but the customer service is the worst . I had a food from there today and the server the way she act It’s so rude . There is no hi hello or greeting before and after the food from drive through. This is the 3rd time happened with the this girl in the drive through she is so rude . I will never go there . I live like within a mile and I always like the food from them . But I always think
Like ok maybe next time I will see another server in the drive through but every time I go I see this girl . The management need to change theirs server in the drive through. We pay to get the food we are not getting free food to get attitude from them .

user_reviews_extended.Name: Phillip Russell
user_reviews_extended.Description: This location basically shuts down about 2 hours before closing faithfully. No orange chicken. No rangoons. Whatever is popular they’re out and won’t make it. Don’t waste your time.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sayre Ramirez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food was fresh and served quickly. Servers were attentive and prepared servings in timely manner. Very professional and friendly! Giovanna is running a magnificent place!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anderson Danielle
user_reviews_extended.Description: They raised their prices which is truly understandable but when I’m buying chow mein noodles I expect to see noodles. Not it being 90 percent cabbage. If you’re gonna have it be mostly cabbage an than noodles then don’t charge so much

user_reviews_extended.Name: Terryn Kelly
user_reviews_extended.Description: Although service was quick today my food tasted old and noodles were really dry. I went about 4:15 and got the orange chicken with beef and broccoli  with noodles. Normally this restaurant is good, but this was my first time at this particular location.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rebaz Akram
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I just bought it. It had long hair in it .
Nasty Place. It’s horrible.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Terri Fox
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food has gone downhill. Ordered takeout and my entree box wasn't full and the chiw main noodles!!?? Hard. Dry and had to poke around to find vegetables. Service was good tho.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kyle Compton
user_reviews_extended.Description: Pretty average Panda Express. Sometimes the food is great and sometimes it isn't. I do know that they can make a fuss if you order "to-go" and then dine in. Not sure what that is about as I sometimes I don't eat all of my food and want to take it with me. But yea, pretty much a Panda Express.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jonathan Collier
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had no idea orange chicken was a premium side. I have been ordering from Panda on 121 and never been charged a premium price. I called them out on it and they said they thought I asked for “Premium Orange Chicken” I said no and asked for a small side of premium orange chicken. It was given from the same bowl, I asked why was it so special? Anyways if the manager is willing to lie to your face and overcharge you a few bucks that says a lot about this place. I’ll still eat Panda Express but not this location.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sam Blumen
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Ordered on the app.
Got the plate which would be mushroom chicken and Kung Pau chicken. the vegetables got the combination fried rice and super greens.

First of vegetables: the mixed combination Supergreens we’re sparse and not nearly as tasty as usual. The kale was almost nonexistent. Just several large pieces of broccoli. The rice was a bit stale/old tasting and did not have much flavor. I usually like to rice so that was disappointing.

The serving size for the entrées was definitely a lot less than usual. To their credit the food was hot and tasted fresh. I just don’t feel like I got my moneys worth compared to when I usually go to panda express. This particular location has been problematic. I may not return.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lucky Whitmer
user_reviews_extended.Description: Good food. Service is midstream. Could be more affordable. Clean facilities. I have not had a bad dish herr and I really love their steamed vegetables. Is it too much to ask to have some lemons on hand?

user_reviews_extended.Name: Deann Armstrong
user_reviews_extended.Description: Their food is usually okay. But the order l placed today! It was nasty! Cold. No flavor at all! I mean none! I ordered sesame chicken. And received soggy something? It was not the sesame chicken I've had before. This was dry. Tasted like it was cooked in 'shrimp' left over oil.

user_reviews_extended.Name: tura karim
user_reviews_extended.Description:
People in this location are very rude, especially manager named Sue the Asian lady.
This poor guy who was helping us and tried to fill our order but Sue lady comes along and started to take the food out of the container telling him he is putting too much right in front of us...
0 customer service, no professionalism.. very poor management.
I saw all that and confronted her of why she would do that she replied saying it cost this much and it should not be that much... wow I was blown away.. First of all train your employees and then if accidentally they put too much, do not make a big scene in front of customers.
This lady has 0 peoples skills, she doesn’t deserve to be managing people, she is not teaching anything about customer service!!!
I don’t recommend this store not coming back to this location ever again
Stay away from Sue!!!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lara Hanson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food was delicious but portion size seems to be shrinking.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jacobe holmes
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered online, didn't have white rice but swapped me out with something better 😋 definitely appreciated. I got angus beef, chili shrimp 🍤, and orange chicken.

user_reviews_extended.Name: - PPC -
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Sneaky, Manipulating and Conning Poor Service
I am tired of calling them and letting them know they messed up my order. Have you noticed the serving containers   are modified in their favor to give you  less food. The lid has more depth then the bottom. The white styrofoam to go container has been modified to give paying consumers less food for the money. I'm just tired of them playing games with my food order. There is always an error or mishap. I ordered two entrees 1 had orange chicken which was majority on the plate and the 2nd had broccoli and beef which was 90% broccoli and 2 pieces of beef.. Consumers are you tired of  having to call companies back to tell them they   messed up your order? I'm not going to call them back this time. I'm just not going back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andres Franco
user_reviews_extended.Description: I went through the drive-thru. I had a series of unfortunate eventsvthat together seemed like bad customer service. The person on the window took the order incorrectly but I figured it before I moved on to the window. Once in the pickup window I was given the incorrect order, again I noticed and gave it back. They told me they were cooking the veggies that I should park up front and wait 4 mins, I paid but thr guy didn't provide a receipt. After about 10 mins I went in and they had no clue were my order was. Since I didn't have my receipt they were even nore lost. After about 4 mins they found it and fulffilled my order. They have should provided a free meal since yhey didn't provide a receipt, but I was a bit annoyed at that point and left without saying anything. The food was good but the service was as bad as it gets.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Liz Deisenhammer
user_reviews_extended.Description: It was the evening after Christmas when I went inside to order take out. The people asking what I wanted were very friendly. They had to make a lot of the food because it was very busy and I had to wait a while. That was ok. The manager on the other hand was so rude to her staff!  She started yelling very loudly at her cashier in front of customers!  I finally told her that she was very rude and if she needed to speak with an employee she should do it in the back. She gave me a look lowered her voice a litttle and continued to chastise the poor cashier!  I still had to wait a while and I told two workers that were just kids that I was sorry they had to work with that!  She is the manager and an adult!  Nobody should be treated like that especially in front of customers and other employees!  While I was waiting the manager again started yelling at another cashier this one at the take out window!  Seriously!  I would have taken off my apron and thrown it at her and walked out the door!  But these kids had a lot of poise and did not do that!  The manager continued to make a complete fool of herself. I will go to this panda again just to see if this woman is still employed!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hanan
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I wish I can rate this place zero stars do your self a favor and go to another location this is the worst place I ever ate at. Sorry for my long review but that’s my story with this location.........
I have been a customer for over 10 years now I buy food from Panda Express almost every week for my family, my sons are a big fan of the orange chicken and i love the honey walnut shrimp. I normally buy 3 to 4 large orange chicken entrepreneurs along with large honey walnut shrimp plus other things and i never had encountered any issues until today at this location. This was my first time buying anything from this location, unfortunately food did not taste the same as other locations food was lukewarm. Orange chicken didn't look bad but the tasted of it wasn't the same as usual, we were a party of 6 and we all said the same 2 kid were so hungry they were eating 1 bit and spitting 3 out chow mein tasted funny and cold as will the steam vegetables the carrots had dark color in the center, broccoli had black spots and the cabbage was over cooked and slimey like if it was rotten. we didn't complain at first since the staff were busy assisting other customers we tried to eat and leave fast, i had ordered a egg roll it didn’t look good but I took a bite of it and It was so rancid I had to spit it out into a napkin just like the majority of the orange chicken. I almost throw up absolutely disgusting gagging rotten rancid. Both chicken egg roll and orange chicken had the same flavor. I called the manager 4 times and finally she came to my table and i explained to her what was the problem with the food, and she said no food is fresh made every hour and that's not true she was rude unprofessional  she said i can't do anything because you have ate some of the food. I asked her if she at least give us a store credit that i can use at the usual location i buy from. She refused and said it only can be used at this location and she cant give me anything back anyway because i should had let them know before eating some of the food. After a long discussion with her she offered to exchange one large orange chicken for a medium entree and exchange the eggroll for another one i refused since it's the same food. By adding all my separate transactions i spent total of $75.89 me and my friend's family who i purchased food for we all went home hungry after spending all this money on rotten chicken. plus i was upset from the manager attitude who was rude and insulted us varios times by calling us a liars. At the end  when i told her i will contact headquarter about this rotten food she said to me give me your credit card and i will void one transaction and she did but she charged me $9.25 without my consent, and i asked her why she said because you ate the honey walnut shrimp. I am really so upset with this location it's the woset location i ever been to staff rude food rotten is a chame this place to be part of this franchise. (Last but not least putting the cherry on top of the cake) there was small cockroaches in the kitchen on  the floor next to the refrigerator. It's sad this place should not be part of Panda Express.
I can go on and on with this bad experience i just hope we don't end up with food poisoning. I am the only one so far who had vomited 2 times since we ate i guess because i was disgusted by that rotten rancid chicken egg roll.
one last thing when i was complaining to the manager about the food she asked me for my receipt and she keeps throwing it in the trach and when i asked her to give me my receipt she declined to give it back after a long struggle she gave me only 2 out of 3 receipt that had the lowest amount of what i had spent.

also i forgot to mention the men's bathroom floor it was disgusting urine on the floor both my 5 years old boys slipped, one almost fail on his face on top of the urine, thanks god his older brother grabbed him on time.

user_reviews_extended.Name: werewolf0517
user_reviews_extended.Description: The bourbon chicken is amazing, the Asian service guy with mask (manager?) is friendly and has sense of humor, a wonderful experience ever.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Wade Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: Quick easy and delicious. I haven't had any issues with the staff or location. Foods good as always.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lauren M.
user_reviews_extended.Description: My bf and I were so excited to eat here. Once we got there, we ordered and ate, well a few bites andddd well, EW it was gross. Nasty under cooked food and nasty egg roll. Even the Sprite was flat and we were so disappointed. We will NOT be back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: san max
user_reviews_extended.Description: I usually don’t go here but there was no panda near me so I went and I ordered chow min noodle with honey walnut shrimp, what I got was vegetable min. I paid freaking 9 something dollars jus to buy vegetables like where are the noodles. These people working here are so stingy. And they put a lot of soggy walnut shrimp which is more then 7 which every panda doesn’t. So they trinna sell the soggy shrimp so they put a lot of it in my bowl and vegetable under the shrimp. For reals there is 3 pieces of noodles. Y’all go find a different panda this panda is stingy and some worker are disrespectful.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephen Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: For a long time I've noted a downward trend in this Panda and so it went from a regular meal to an occasional thing.  Today was another of those occasions.  Its fast food so you have to make allowances but my meal today was disgusting.  I'm not even sure where to start, I could mention the stomach churning smell when I opened the carton or that some of the rice had been sitting in water so long it had turned into paste.   Or that I couldn't even verify the rubbery stuff in the orange chicken was meat never mind chicken.  Naturally it was a meal I barely ate.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Demetra Marie
user_reviews_extended.Description: The noodles are undercooked. There shouldn’t be an issue with the food, especially now that you have raised your prices. I used to love Panda Express The food sucks now…

user_reviews_extended.Name: Pranav Pradeep
user_reviews_extended.Description: Decent food. Messed up mine and my friends order. Asked for a plate but received a bowl sized serving with only one choice of my protein. Friend asked for spring rolls but didn’t receive them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Judith Vaughan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Semi fast food, this is my favorite Panda Express.  I have eaten here for the past several years.  Orange chicken with fried rice and veggies is my favorite, along with honey walnut shrimp.  Yummy

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cynthia Sherman
user_reviews_extended.Description: This location has greatly improved! I've been back a few times and the food is fresh and the staff is friendly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Oscar Yates
user_reviews_extended.Description: The closest asian food for me. So far they go par with quality except for the chow mien or the noodle, it is not the quality type. It taste like an old stock reheated. This branch has friendly people but one time they gave me a wrong order from a drive thru, still good food, I don’t have time to complain and change.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jason Mogollon
user_reviews_extended.Description: I always get a double order of Sweet fire Chicken Breast & a double order of fried rice. All of that is enough food for 2 full meals. Portion size is huge! Great value for the money!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Valerie Caviness
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food is also hot & good.

user_reviews_extended.Name: KG
user_reviews_extended.Description: Update:  It seems like the quality of the food has gone down.  I ordered orange chicken and it was cold and it had lots of gristle in the chicken pieces.  I really lost my appetite.  I didn't even finish the meal.  I am very dissapointed.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Negin M
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have visited this place twice and both were horrible experiences. They keep talking on their headsets and filling to-go plates for drive through costumers and keep dine-in costumers waiting. First time we went here we had to wait 7 minutes to be serviced even though it was not busy at all and there was no one in front of us. This time we wasted 15 minutes driving there, were first in line again and had to wait 10 minutes standing there being totally ignored by the staff! We left feeling frustrated, ignored and hungry. Will not go back to this place.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ulanat Sukumaran
user_reviews_extended.Description: Delicious food. Chow mein with fried rice, orange chicken, Beijing beef, grilled teriyaki chicken. Chicken egg rolls and cheese Rangoon also tastes good. Reasonable price and good portion. Wheel chair access entrance, dine in and take away.

user_reviews_extended.Name: L
user_reviews_extended.Description: Absolutely no seasoning in the steak! The fried rice is not fried rice. It’s more like sticky rice. It’s a chain, but taste nothing like what I’ve tasted back home. This is my first flavorless, not fried, sticky rice tasting Panda Express experience

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alyssa F
user_reviews_extended.Description: Easy and fast. Customer service varies by employees but mostly staff are just wanting to get you off the line. Grilled teriyaki chicken is not grilled enough compared to other locations.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vic W
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food is standard Panda Express but customer service is lacking, at least when I went there. Didn't get teriyaki sauce and was just handed the food with no comment at all. I'm used to people saying 'thank you' or 'have a good day' or even just 'here you go', but nope, nothing.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Warp Factor
user_reviews_extended.Description: Typical Panda Express. Good food, but you should go there during their busy times only to make sure the food is fresh. The orange chicken is the star of their menu. Its a shame that they don't have Coke products.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Han
user_reviews_extended.Description: Got the broccoli beef and Beijing beef and broccoli beef tasted really bad and soggy like boiled middle school lunch food broccoli and the Beijing beef was so soggy it tasted like it’s been sitting out for at least 6 hours. I have worked at a Panda Express, I know it tastes good, this location was not it

user_reviews_extended.Name: Katherine Elias
user_reviews_extended.Description: We were just here at the panda Express and Andrew from night shift was absolutely amazing.  Such a absolute sweet heart. I hope the manager sees my review and thank him from me and my husband for the outstanding customer service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Betty Doss
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food wasn't as good as usual. Had orange chicken, which usually always good. Had totally different taste. Not very good at all.

user_reviews_extended.Name: lalit dhingra
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worst PE ever. I have been going to PE from long now, but this was my first visit to this location, unfortunately this past Sunday night. I was trying to order at spring creek and 75, but accidentally ordered at Coit RD and Spring Creek. I and my wife both got sick. Order No. 20040642. I thought PE maintains same standards through out its locations, but doesn't seem like anymore. I strongly that appropriate authority should revisit this location and check even if they are maintaining health codes. VERY DISAPPOINTED.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Erin Facey (Wishmiss)
user_reviews_extended.Description: The rice was dry and the veggies under cooked. The KP chicken was bleh. All spice no flavor and it was mostly veggies because they were cut so big. The teriyaki sauce was thin but the sweet and sour sauce was okay. The Rangoon were pretty good.

user_reviews_extended.Name: The plaid dad
user_reviews_extended.Description: In this day and age with so much competition existing, especially in the food industry, customer service is paramount. My food was wonderful but the drive thru employee was very unwelcoming and that is why this is a 1 star review instead of a 5 star review.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gillian Emonts
user_reviews_extended.Description: I usually stop by here when I'm in a hurry, and not in the mood for traditional fast food. I have never been impressed with the portion sizes or the service, but the food is pretty yummy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paul Malone
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Even gave me chopsticks with my chicken egg rolls. Yay!!

2 Yesrs later and all I got was an angry Chinese lady who was abrupt and disrespectful. Orange chicken was great. “We Don’t Have Chicken Egg Rolls” according to above referenced lady.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Spencer W
user_reviews_extended.Description: This location is not very good. Love Panda usually but this location is struggling. Meat portions often very low and several times they dont fill the box. They also are usually out of sides or beijing beef. You're much better off going to the Panda on spring creek and 75. That one always has super greens and beijing beef and does good portions. It's too bad that the good panda is farther from me than this one!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dan Panetti
user_reviews_extended.Description: Our family probably eats at Panda a couple times a month - we're limited in what we order - orange chicken or teriyaki chicken - seriously, that's it - but we do order both the fried rice and the chow mein noodles! Honestly, for the price and the amount of food we get, Panda is a pretty good deal - and we've never had a bad serving of anything we've ordered. I've eaten at various Panda locations across the Metroplex and in other cities and I'll say I find them all to be good food at reasonable prices.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Debbie McKiddy
user_reviews_extended.Description: I don't know what everyone is complaining about. The staff was friendly and the food was just like how it is at all other Panda Express restaurants. If you like Panda Express, then you'll like it. Keep in mind it's a FAST FOOD restaurant, so it's not top notch. You get what you pay for.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maithilee K
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love eating at Panda Express. I always order kung pao chicken chow mein and veggie spring rolls. Love these two items. Want to try out orange chicken and mushroom chicken chow mein next time.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Raphael Mathias
user_reviews_extended.Description: got food poisoning after eating at this place, emailed company the same day got a acknowledgment in the email asked for the receipt from me and not heard back from them, was speaking with kiddo aftercare teacher and telling them about food at panda express , she mentioned that other have said the same thing. if your stomach is not strong avoid this particular location

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eddith Lancaster
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food is amazing!!!!!!!  The employees are ALWAYS very busy.  There is ALWAYS a line.  The only bad thing is sometimes it's so hot in there you can hardly stay in there.  Oh, did I already say the food is ssssssoooooo amazing!!!!!!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chris Young
user_reviews_extended.Description: Extremely rude teenager or young adult taking my order at the drive-in window. I'm not sure I'll be going back to this location. I'll drive 5 more minutes if I don't have to deal with him.

user_reviews_extended.Name: CR V
user_reviews_extended.Description: All managers here are stuP1d. This panda is a hostage situation. Everyone has no hairnets and working with airpods on. I tried to talk to 2 lady managers and 1 guy manager and they are all useless. Its a shame how they are trusted with a business they cant handle. All 3 are incompetent, i called corporate.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christopher Mapps
user_reviews_extended.Description: Wasn't sure where to go so I stopped by panda and there was a gentlemen named Kaden who was very professional. The staff were very friendly. Great culture

user_reviews_extended.Name: Leena Desai
user_reviews_extended.Description: We luv Pand Express  food when we are craving chinese and want it fast!! Limited menu but done well. Price is reasonable too. They are also great supporters of school fundraisers and very popular there too.

user_reviews_extended.Name: VALERIE Nichols
user_reviews_extended.Description: I drive 5 mi out of my way to go to this particular Panda even though there's one two blocks from my house this one is fabulous always consistently very good just if I could get the drive-thru assistant to be able to pack the bag correctly and give me the right condiments that I ask for it would be fantastic!!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: David R (DR)
user_reviews_extended.Description: Terrible service. They can’t get their online orders together. Pickups are out of the picture. Place an order, wait for ever and no food is ever made ready. 45 minutes later, they still have not gotten the request to pack some food in boxes. Stay away from this place.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Josh Wall
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Food was ok. But the service was awful.
It was my first time in and I ask the lady what she would recommend and she just yelled something at me and I didn't understand. I just got what my girlfriend got.
2 out of 10 don't eat a panda or at panda.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Pete
user_reviews_extended.Description: Gotten a lot better with the portions! Was a busy night when I visited, very long line. Went very fast! Girl that served me was very friendly and fast! Very patient with the people in line! Food was very Fresh!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Yaqian Zheng
user_reviews_extended.Description: Keep taking wrong dishes with my bigger plate after I said, and never confirmed with customers, bad attitude, taking wrong dishes out and my food becomes gross, no apologies. 3/16 Thursday 6:30 pm, the lady wears black T shirt.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Clover Mars
user_reviews_extended.Description: Steam rice is always moldy or stale. They could use the rice produced from several years ago instead of current year and not properly stored. They must get it for cheap price. Most people may not notice this because they normally pick up fried rice that moldy/stale tastes is covered by condiments. Sometimes you can find some of meat and veggies in your dish is from leftover of over night if you go there early in the morning.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Elizabeth Virgil
user_reviews_extended.Description: Maria, some girl who works there, got my order completely wrong and then blamed me. She refused to get her manager claiming he was on a break…that’s crazy to me.

user_reviews_extended.Name: King Pablo
user_reviews_extended.Description: STAY FAR AWAY something was wrong with the teriyaki I spit it out but it was too late ! Had me bedridden on fluids !!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Yasmin Awad Omari
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food was rotten, the manager with the name VIE was extremely rude, she started to argue with me and my friend because we complained about the food, the  Broccoli and carrot had black and brown and soggy, the egg roll we almost puked when we took a bite out of it,  The bathrooms were disgusting there was pee on the floor. I sent a  complaint to the headquarters

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tom Diekmeier
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been eating at panda express for 15 years.  The food at this restaurant is disgusting. The chow mein is completely devoid of any flavor and it’s like eating noodles made out of paper. The chicken teriyaki is dry and taste like it’s been cooked and sewer water. The kung pao chicken is equally disgusting.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Elizabeth Aguilar
user_reviews_extended.Description: Went in the drive thru ordered our food asked for a bowl with rice and teriyaki and asked for sauce on top and on the side. Didnt get any sauce on top. I also bought a plate i was given only one fork and one fortune cookie

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ignacio Meza Jr.
user_reviews_extended.Description: Average at best. 2nd time that I have been to this chain and it was a little better than the 1st. My daughter loves it but I'd rather eat a grilled cheese sandwich. 🙄🙄🙄

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joe Escobar
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worst service ever! Went there tonight and they had zero selection and were extremely rude. Literally had 1/3 of the menu! I absolutely loved getting snapped at by the cashier! Not going back!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Axel Carmona
user_reviews_extended.Description: I placed an order with Uber Eats and I canceled the order right away since something came up and they still charged my account. I have been trying to reach them all day and no one answers the phone. I get a machine telling me that no one can take my call and it hangs up. I have literally been calling the restaurant all day and get no answer.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nikola Trkulja
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was eating then someone comes and cleans my table and around me. Personally I do not like when someone is cleaning when I'm eating. I do not like that. Also table's should be cleaned before someone seats down and eats. Other then that it was ok 👍

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephen Cranford
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fast Chinese food when we are on a hurry. My wife is sensitive to msg. She never has a problem here. This is close to home and we will return.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alicia Vargas
user_reviews_extended.Description: I placed an order for pickup 03/11/2026 and went inside, waiting patiently. I was in no rush. While the lady was bagging my order, I asked if I could get some sriracha in the bag since I forgot to include it in my order. I repeated myself because there was no response or eye contact. The lady, I believe her name was Maria, then said dismissively and rudely, “I heard you.” I responded that I wasn't sure as you didn't respond. She rolled her eyes and said, "Well, I heard you." I then asked to speak with a manager, as this lady was being rude and all I wanted was sriracha. When the manager arrived, I explained what happened. I mentioned I could understand if you are tired or ready to go home, as it was an hour before close. I work in fast food myself and am just getting off. I'm pregnant and have a daughter to go home to, but there's no need for the attitude. The lady was acting sarcastic and still being rude. The manager just listened and nodded his head and said he would talk to her. I then said well you don't think I deserve an apology, as I came in here respectful and nice, but the lady processed to mock me, saying in a voice, "what do you want me to say? ‘I'm so sorry, ma’am, I heard you.’" I responded that yes, youcould have just said, "Yes, ma’am," or a simple yes acknowledging that I was talking to you. The manager said nothing, so I looked at him and told him the whole situation was ridiculous. I left, not even wanting to argue or deal with such a terrible environment. This was my first and last time at this location since it’s just down the street from my job, and I only wanted to grab something quick and go home.

user_reviews_extended.Name: JP
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have always liked Panda Express, I am always satisfied. I have noticed that in recent months they have reduced the amount of protein they serve, but in this particular location they went to another level, I placed my order through the window and I did not look at my plate until I got home and this is what I found.  It almost seems like I was given the dish that someone else left unfinished.

Siempre me ha gustado panda express siempre quedo satisfecho me he dado cuenta que en los últimos meses han reducido la cantidad de proteína que te sirven, pero en esta locación en particular fueron a otro nivel, hice mi pedido por l ventanilla y no mire mi plato hasta llegar a casa y esto fue lo que encontré. Casi parece que me dieron el plato que alguien más dejó sin terminar.
