user_reviews_extended.Description: El chow mein estaba seco y duró muy feo me atendió una mujer muy enojona deberían ser mas amable pagamos por nuestra comida no la regalan y poner más atención en la comida que la cocinen bien!! Gracias hoy es mayo/ 26/25 día de memory DAY!! Eran 2:30 pm de la tarde!! Pongan atención a sus trabajadores!! Gracias!!👍

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alfredo Revilla
user_reviews_extended.Description: La señora de lentes que despacha, habla español y sí, ayuda, por supuesto, pero sin ninguna gracia, con lo suficiente como para que ya te vayas. Es decir, si eres de las personas que les gusta una cierta amabilidad por parte de los que atienden, este no es tu lugar.  Debe ser porque no reciben tips, creo que la mayoría pedimos para llevar. Y se preguntan entre ellos sobre la comida o los pedidos pero gritando; como que estuvieran en el mercado del pueblo. Por más rica que sea la comida, ya no volveré.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Yiendry Marin
user_reviews_extended.Description: La atención de este lugar es pésima ... No si es porque soy latino no tenía buena atención y yo siendo lo más amable que puedo ser la verdad las chicas que atienden a las personas no deberían estar aquí .. no tienen gracia con el público .. lo único que puedo decir bueno es que habla español. Y puedas lograr comunicarte si eres hispanohablante pero recalcó no volveré más a este lugar ...! Solo por la atención .. no me dieron sauce , servilletas nada... Casi que me sirvo yo mismo mis platillos...!

user_reviews_extended.Description: Pues pedí dos platos de chow mein y le dije a la muchacha asiática que quería de los platos grandes, de los más grandes que tenía, me los dio, al momento de cobrarme me cobró por 3 y me dijo que si me cobraba lo correcto que me iba a salir más caro que mejor me cobraba por 3 platos y le pedí los palitos chinos y no me dio, ni me ofreció las salsas como la soya y las otras que ellas tienen, solo por que me gusta la comida de panda express iré a otra localidad pero ahí no se si regrese...

user_reviews_extended.Name: Raquel L B
user_reviews_extended.Description: Muy amables!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Owen McClure
user_reviews_extended.Description: Yumi Yumi Fruit Salad Yumi Yumi

user_reviews_extended.Name: Delfino Sanchez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Esta deliciosa la comida

user_reviews.Name: Part time Reviewer
user_reviews.Description:
I know this is a brand new Panda Express, but it is stilp the nicest and cleanest Panda Express I've ever seen.  It honestly felt more like a sit down restaurant than a fast food restaurant.   Nice and welcoming environment.   The Panda statue outside was great.
Food wise, one tiny piece of my orange chicken was a bit tough but ok.  The rest of the orange chicken was perfect.   The teriyaki chicken was great, perfect through and through.   The chicken egg roll was good.  Overall, the food did seem  tad bit more fresh than any other location.  Maybe cause its new?  Either way, will definitely be coming back just due to the food alone.
Service was great.  Most Panda's I've been to across the US all have fairly good service so initially I expected and received the good Panda service I'm used to.  Now one employee, Bianca was exceptional.  Definitely an outstanding employee that really cared about the customer before me and me.  Great job Bianca!
I recommend this location for the food and service, but walking in and seeing really just such a nice Panda Express, just felt like a different Panda experience.   No doubt you'll read lots of different reviews of this location, but ultimately each person should just stop by and experience it for yourself.   Maybe you'll notice something interesting on the wall that I didn't notice or another employee will give you that extra customer service that you just happened to need on the rough day you were having.   Go.  Take a picture with the Panda outside.  Interact with the employees.  Try the food.  Form your own opinion and then if you want to, leave your honest review.  This location will have mine, my friends, and my family's patronage.  Thanks Panda Express for opening this location and hiring good employees.

user_reviews.Name: C C
user_reviews.Description: Panda Express had a special kids event for Chinese New Year from 2pm to 5pm where kids ate for free, which was so awesome! The staff were incredibly kind and welcoming. The kids also received a cute panda keychain, headband, and, coupons, and coloring book with crayons and a drawstring bag. It made the celebration extra special. Such a thoughtful and fun experience for families!

user_reviews.Name: Little Penny
user_reviews.Description: Brand new location near the Tollway & Windhaven. Food is excellent and prices are reasonable for the market they're in.

user_reviews.Name: Jesus, From Google
user_reviews.Description: This new Panda Express is super clean, fast, and the food tastes fresh every time. The staff is friendly and the service is always quick and reliable

user_reviews.Name: Jake M
user_reviews.Description: Not the way to deal with bad weather. Store shows fully open on all apps, but anyone who happens to show up without a ride won’t get in. Sucks for anyone who decides to brave the weather for a meal only to find their doors locked, despite their being plenty of people inside.

user_reviews.Name: Bji
user_reviews.Description:
We stopped here for dinner on 02/15 evening. We ordered 2 plates and veg rolls.Almost all the  items were undercooked except the Kung pao chicken and the veg rolls. Beans in string bean chicken were almost green, grassy squeaky and raw.  Teriyaki and shrimp would be awesome if cooked for a couple more minutes.Egg in the fried rice   didn't blend and the egg flavor was off setting, on the raw side. Most disappointing was the chow mein, a very strong fish flavored noodles. The smell and taste was very fishy, may be cross contaminated with a fish dish.  Not the typical Panda flavors I used to.

Very beautiful location and a clean store. Nice employees, cleanest panda around DFW, Typical panda portions, loaded portions size and beautiful fountain soda machine. Silas and the rest of staff were very helpful. I wish they would fix things and turnaround our experience next time.

user_reviews.Name: Sonshine Window Cleaning
user_reviews.Description: I love the design and decor of this brand new Panda Express. It’s awesome!

user_reviews.Name: V
user_reviews.Description:
I was really excited when this Panda Express opened near my place, the location is perfect and the atmosphere is actually quite nice. Unfortunately, my experience has been disappointing.

Food: The rice and noodles are is consistently undercooked and lacks seasoning, not even salt, just bland. The sides are just okay, the seasoning is decent, but they are also undercooked. Overall, the food quality hasn’t met expectations.

I’ve visited this location three times, hoping things would improve, but there hasn’t been any noticeable change. At this point, I’d rather drive all the way to Colony than waste my appetite here.

Service: The staff experience is hit or miss. Some employees are very nice, but others are extremely stingy with portions, as if the food isn’t paid for and they’re giving it away for free.

I really wanted to love this location because of how convenient it is, but sadly, it hasn’t lived up to expectations.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Larry Davis
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fresh food, great service. Gloria was very helpful, and efficient. Highly recommend this location!

user_reviews_extended.Name: T Tee
user_reviews_extended.Description: I been to many Panda Express stores in DFW and plano and Frisco & Allen area. This store by far has one of the worst store managers I’ve seen . Always try to make me pay before ny food is ready & completely rushed my food . Cooked horribly ! Vegetables weee hardly chewable . Will never be going back to this location ever again . The manager is definitely the problem here

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paula Woods
user_reviews_extended.Description: Terrible service and the broccoli was hard as a rock, I asked for the broccoli to be cooked longer and was rudely told no, and it was even harder, they always give me too much chow mein and this time there wasn't hardly any. I'm a frequent patron of panda Express and have been to almost everyone in DFW so I know how the food should be I would to speak to a manager if all possible.

user_reviews_extended.Name: christopher mathis
user_reviews_extended.Description: 6pm today terrible bad customer service experience. I was mistreated in a bad way. Food was not fresh at all, tasted old and unhealthy.. staff refuse not to cook anything fresh, and I was over charged. Teriyaki chicken was not completely cooked all the way..

user_reviews_extended.Name: Trent Bennett
user_reviews_extended.Description: Nice, new, clean Panda Express, but the food quality is no different than other locations

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matt B
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I’m really disappointed with my recent visit to Panda Express.

I ordered a 2-item plate with Kung Pao Chicken and Beef with Broccoli. While eating, I immediately noticed the chicken didn’t taste right. The texture seemed off and it didn’t have the normal flavor I’ve come to expect.

Unfortunately, a few hours later I started feeling sick with stomach issues. the undercooked or questionable quality of the meat definitely raised concerns.

Food safety should never be questionable. I hope management takes food handling and preparation standards seriously so this doesn’t happen to someone else.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anna Ovalle
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fresh hot food everytime I have ordered. I've been there 5 or 6 times since they have opened. Fast and friendly. Ty

user_reviews_extended.Name: Edward Erazo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great service and fresh food made to request if needed ! My toddler loves getting the cub meal with super greens and chownmein and his teri chicken a big plus for me since he gets pretty picky. The inside looks really cool and a plus we live down the street.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Frank Sobyak
user_reviews_extended.Description: Dude, you saw me get out of my car and walk over to the door. You locked the door right in front of my face, and then when I held up my phone to show you it wasn’t closing time y’all pretended I wasn’t there. That is so wrong, really? I hope you were in a hurry… to get to your own funeral! Ha!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hrach Melikian
user_reviews_extended.Description: Every good American citizen who live this area need to come this location eat. Best selling food Thank you very much and God bless you, America, President Trump, Senate and Congress

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jacob Aragon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Its Panda!?! And its good like panda, these reviews are unfair! This is the coolest looking panda I’ve seen.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Keny Noda
user_reviews_extended.Description: This new location is very nice, and the food is delicious, as always.

user_reviews_extended.Name: E
user_reviews_extended.Description: The wait for my order was over 15 minutes. The manager Bare-hand contact with raw food or frozen meats no gloves were used. My concern for customer health and the establishment's hygiene standards were very poor.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Daniel Santana
user_reviews_extended.Description: Doesn't matter how new and pretty your store is when your service is unbelievably slow and terrible.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Natalie Berquist
user_reviews_extended.Description:
DO NOT COME HERE!
FOOD NOT COOKED AND WAIT WAS RIDICULOUS !

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jose Delgado
user_reviews_extended.Description: Rahhhhhhh panda express

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sammi Susan
user_reviews_extended.Description: I recently just went as in today five minutes ago and it was the rudest experience. I’ve had thus far yet at this location, didn’t you guys thanks just open?  Someone  needs to speak with the other cashier that worked with Gloria today - Gloria did fine, however , the one that was taking orders She was Very  unprofessional & her tone was completely off. I understand rush-hour, but there was quite literally no one else in the drive-through when they took my order and  still she seemed like it bothered her to take my order. Very unprofessional

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cristtie Concepcion
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excelent❤️

title: Panda Express
description: Fast-food chain for Chinese standards, including some health-conscious options.

user_reviews.Name: Karina Navarro
user_reviews.Description: I always enjoy eating at Panda Express, but this time I'm very disappointed. I ordered a bowl to take home, and they practically filled it with rice. The Kumpao chicken was miserable; only because I ordered a medium box of teriyaki chicken was I able to have a decent meal.

user_reviews.Name: Heather Herington
user_reviews.Description:
I had the bowl with fried rice and honey chicken and it so delicious 😋
I also enjoyed the pomegranate mango lemonade (I think that's what it was) and a chicken egg rolls.
Customer service was good!

user_reviews.Name: Victoria Gomez
user_reviews.Description: Upon arrival into the drive thru, we were greeted, not by a person, but by Artificial Intelligence. That already threw me off but since I was hungry I kept ordering. I’ve worked in a drive-thru before and I know other places intervene when a customer has trouble. I was having trouble. The AI could not understand me and we were “ordering” for five minutes. No personal help from an employee. I got the b&b and hws, in my b&b, I kid you not there was only broccoli and two puny slices of beef. Not only did my customer experience feel artificial but my food did as well! What a load of nonsense. Don’t go here.(If you do, maybe go inside)

user_reviews.Name: Jamie Doering
user_reviews.Description: Food was not cooked correctly. I got honey “this is the worst panda I’ve ever had don’t go here.” sesame chicken and green beans are like so over cooked. I don’t appreciate robots taking my order and going so slow to do so. Also service was super slow didn’t even get asked for any sauces. So I had to sit there for 5 mins extra just to get soy sauce. On top of that there are some pieces in my food that looked like someone had taken a bite out of it

user_reviews.Name: Monique Rogers
user_reviews.Description: I've Never been to a Panda Express where I felt like I received my money's worth, but this Location was Great! Food was fresh and Great Customer Service! I will definitely visit this location in the future!

user_reviews.Name: Dr. Milton Mize
user_reviews.Description: Today was a 5 star day! They greeted me kindly when I walked in the door. Very fast and friendly service down the line. Asked if I needed anything extra with good suggestions. Nice and clean inside with soft music. I was able to eat and read for a quick and delicious lunch.

user_reviews.Name: Vicky Soberanes
user_reviews.Description: Bad experience.I ordered  cub meal  Orange chickeni. The chow mein pasta was really  dry  like is bee there for while . It cost me stomach pain  on the middle of the night. No more Panda express.

user_reviews.Name: Animesh D
user_reviews.Description: Loved this local Panda Express besides the SH121 in The Colony. The store is clean and employees are available to assist. There are ample parking outside and have clean restrooms. The food is warm but requires some added portion. The tables are clean and menu is clearly mentioned. The taste of the food is good. They accept the online order pick up and always keep ready by the time customer arrives.
