user_reviews_extended.Name: Dana Hans
user_reviews_extended.Description: They were out of Rangoons, said truck would be in next day. Chow mein was dry. Chicken roll was burnt, couldn't eat it. Trash was over flowing. No soap in the womens bathroom. No clean tables.  Staff were busy with drive thru. I wouldn't go back to this location again

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brayden Eakle
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Moving out to this area from uptown dallas. Lovers & Greenville location never did us wrong. 2 months down the line trying out this location. Had a new item for 1.50 Upcharge (Black pepper steak) bet, specifically left off the orange chicken from my order. Had the sweet fire and sesame on my bigger. Not to mention straight up tired of the orange chicken (frequenting panda for the last 10~ years)

Husband did order one portion of orange for his bigger.

He goes to pick up the order (drive thru) handed off no problem. Condiments, cutlery, and the order neatly tied up.

Brings it home and we open the first box. Appetizers we ordered. Wow we thought, what great customer service or maybe an accident. There was a 2x portion for the spring rolls & rangoons. Close to closing we thought must have had extra.

Proceed to the entrees. All the stickers are labeled correctly. Upon opening though…….

It was a total of 5 out 6 entrees on our 2 bigger plate.

ALL are orange chicken. With the one exception of the kungpao… great.

All three of my entrees are not included in addition to paying an upcharge for one.

Being in the industry i realized that instead of dealing with the problem.. they faked it and hoped it would slide under the rug.

No way on earth they doubled the apps. And didn’t include 4 entrees, especially when one was an upcharge. And didn’t refund
The difference. Knowingly & that being said.. staff is incompetent or lazy…

Either way. Will be following up with this tomorrow, at the location and Panda Express corporate.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Texan Realtor
user_reviews_extended.Description: 95% of the time it’s good but the last guy was ton passive aggressive. “you have a nice day ok” like I was an hr threat. Every other visit was nice. Grey matter of a rock

user_reviews_extended.Name: Preston Salomon
user_reviews_extended.Description: So rude and kept following me around the place just bc I had to use the restroom before I ordered which I did

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sean S R
user_reviews_extended.Description:
As I sat down to eat I've noticed amd seen people try to come inside. The doors were locked with a piece of paper that say drive thru only, I also checked the hours of the store,  nothing indicates it's closing.

this is to the manager of the store, my picture has a time/date on it. Please inform your employees what they are doing is not acceptable

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maryiam Ahmed
user_reviews_extended.Description: Panda Express is a franchise so they don’t make their own prices. It is pricey for fast food though... I had a bowl with half chow mein half fried rice and honey walnut shrimp. Very fresh, tasted great, and clean environment. They had to re-make an order bc I got the wrong one at a different location and this was on my way, no hassle and everyone was nice.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tunisa Jones
user_reviews_extended.Description: The whole staff was very nice. Juan is the best he was very generous and I asked for everything free he did it with no problem! THANKS JUAN

user_reviews_extended.Name: Figz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Disgusting. Serving sizes were trash, noodles dry as hell with ZERO taste and rice was dry, tasting like cardboard. With what you pay, and the quality, might as well hit a Mickie Dees. Food was HORRIBLE.

user_reviews_extended.Name: SHAHWAIZ Sheikh
user_reviews_extended.Description: I like panda express but this location has different taste idk if it's not cooked well or the way they mixed up my bowl with more veggies.

user_reviews_extended.Name: jadastreon
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Panda is amazing, affordable high quality health options. Nowhere else offers such high quality protein and food at the price and flavor.

$13 for 114 grams of protein, Teriyaki Chicken Breast, with rice and veggies. Or the side of your choosing, if you get all three entree options as the grilled chicken.

In response to every review mad about the food selection at late hours, its this way everywhere, go to Chipotle an hour before close, they are out of everything. Its just part of it, if you want a fresh meal go to a drive thru not a kitchen....

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Lindsey
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Panda Express: Where the doors are open, the kitchen is closed, and common sense is nowhere to be found.

Twice now—TWO separate locations—I’ve shown up about 30 minutes before closing, and guess what? No white rice. Not “we’re out temporarily.” Not “we’re making more.” Just flat out: No. Why? Because, according to staff, “management policy” says they stop cooking an hour before close to avoid waste.

Oh yes, God forbid you waste a few cents worth of the cheapest food item on the planet. I guess it’s more efficient to disappoint actual paying customers than to possibly throw out a scoop of rice. Genius.

And what’s worse? They still happily charge you full price, like you’re getting the real deal. But what you’re actually getting is a sad mashup of leftover scraps and corporate apathy.

If you’re going to run a restaurant like you’re already closed an hour early, then do us all a favor—lock the damn doors. Or at least put up a sign that says: “We’re open, but only for disappointment.”

This is how you lose loyal customers. Over rice. Pathetic.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tricia Eskridge
user_reviews_extended.Description: I order food for my kiddo and I and her food was great but mine was terrible. I tried to call store 3 times that night and 1 time the next day no answer at all. My food barely had any chicken and only had a few pieces of shrimp. No please at all for being out of town. I couldn't go back to location cuz I live 2 hours away.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dylan Sommerfeld
user_reviews_extended.Description: Got the wrong food. The employee was helpful when we returned to get the correct the food. However, they substituted our food without informing us because they were out.

user_reviews_extended.Name: denae morgan
user_reviews_extended.Description: For my chow mein they gave me nothing but the cooked veggies and two bites of noodles. They know they were dead wrong for that.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Izzi Raine
user_reviews_extended.Description: The AI “ordering assistant” needs to go. I will not be returning to Panda Express until this is removed.

user_reviews_extended.Name: jon
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Ordered plate meal to go. Orange chicken was great, but the broccoli/beef was not cooked enough. Broccoli was incredibly hard and the meat was largely just gristle and difficult to chew. The chow mein was warm on top, and cold / almost frozen on the bottom.

Usually a favorite stop on my lunch, but this meal left little desire to return.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jon Tee
user_reviews_extended.Description: I typically stop by here once a week when I have to work late. I usually arrive between 8:50-9:05pm (store closes at 9:30) and like clockwork, they tell me they only have chow mein are sold out of nearly every entree, save for teriyaki chicken, and black pepper beef. I asked why is it every time I can’t order what I’m actually wanting? He told me they stop cooking at 8:45, yet the drive thru line is always full. Maybe cook extra kung pao, orange chicken, and the other popular items? It’s really frustrating always having to settle for something else. I know I’m not the only one upset because I regularly see cars behind me leaving the line after getting to the order screen. After all of that, looks like they didn’t even have enough of what was left to fill my plate…

user_reviews_extended.Name: Osiel Carizales
user_reviews_extended.Description:
usually very good at getting my order right.  today I ordered a honey walnut shrimp and spicy chicken.  ¹/² fried rice and low main plate.
instead I got a bowl with low main and regular not spicy chicken.  but I was already home and lazy I ate the bowl that had 2 pieces of chicken and I'm still hungry :(

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lily Andrews
user_reviews_extended.Description: Just a warning to others... very unclean location. Food poisoning twice from me and once for my husband so a total of 3x with cross contamination. I got super sick after having a bite of a piece of chicken that had something hard inside of it. No idea what it was and it tasted extremely weird like old chicken bone marrow or something. No idea what's going on in there, but health inspectors need to check this place and new management is a must considering the amount of times we've gotten severely sick.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Krystine Lisenbee
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Asked for fresh food. Was told no. One energetic friendly person.  I'll go to little elm
going further

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anna _
user_reviews_extended.Description: This Panda Express location is seriously disappointing. First, the drive-thru ordering system is some kind of robot, so if you have allergies or need to customize your order, you’re out of luck. By the time you get to the window, it’s too late to change anything. Then, when I got my food, I couldn’t believe it, there were barely four small pieces of chicken in my bowl. For nearly $10 after tax, the least they could do is actually fill the bowl. Every time I come here, they skimp on portions. And to make matters worse, the other bowl I ordered wasn’t even correct. If you’re spending this much, you’re better off eating somewhere else.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rajiv Pillai
user_reviews_extended.Description: One of the better PE centres with just better flavourful dishes and staff who are Warm. I'd come here instead of Stonebriar, anytime.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joshua Dawn
user_reviews_extended.Description: Do not eat the beijing beef from here. It has been coming out both ends quite violently all damn morning.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Bickerdike
user_reviews_extended.Description: Please get rid of the AI assistant as I can’t make custom orders. So annoying.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kyunghee Cho
user_reviews_extended.Description:
ordered two plates for togo tonight at 8:30 PM. Unfortunately, both the chow mein and fried rice were spoiled. I live less than a mile from the restaurant and started eating right after I got home, so there’s no reason the food should have gone bad so quickly.

As soon as I noticed the food was off, I stopped eating out of concern for food poisoning. the experience was extremely disappointing.

I tried calling the restaurant just a minute ago to let them know directly, but no one answered. That’s why I’m leaving this review. I hope this issue is taken seriously — food safety should never be compromised.

user_reviews_extended.Name: vincent sherwood
user_reviews_extended.Description: Just came through the drive through family meal containers are half full and no one answers the phone won't eat here again

user_reviews_extended.Name: Catalin Ghervas
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great food, we picked up a party pack and they were able to get us all the needed utensils as well.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Emma Bowman
user_reviews_extended.Description: I understand cabbage is a good filler but my chow main was 95% cabbage! I got the string been chicken so it’s not because I don’t like vegetables I just like to actually have noodles when I ask for noodles.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tiana G
user_reviews_extended.Description: Firstly the drive through features an AI communicator which rushes you and prompts you to pick from items you maybe didn't want. It can't answer questions of course like a human can. It ended up getting my order wrong and I had to fix it at the second window. Once we got to the second window we were not greeted. We were just told a price. The window guy was very unfriendly. Mind you, this location is typically very slow. I live right near it and I never see it busy. I'm not sure why they can't have a real drive-thru operator and friendlier employees. Secondly, once I received my food, I was disappointed to find large chunks of inedible hard to chew cabbage pieces. That space should have been filled with the Korean steak that I ordered. Instead I got a bunch of cabbage that I didn't want to eat. The rice was very dry. One can hardly call it fried rice. Anyway, I am quickly reminded why this location is never busy and also reminded why I have switched to Japanese, Thai and Vietnamese food. Way more flavor and healthier ingredients.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Geoff waikel
user_reviews_extended.Description: Best experience I've had at PE. Didn't over load the noodles with veggies.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ram Polavarapu
user_reviews_extended.Description: Cool looking and fancy panda express. Food is not good, that's why it has 3 stars.

user_reviews_extended.Name: J Centavo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Until they fix the drive through ordering process, I'll never go back. It's all automated now. You can't even talk to a human. Seriously?! How hard is it to take an order?! Do not recommend fir this reason alone.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ronald Ardt
user_reviews_extended.Description:
$12.13 for naked fried rice, skinny chicken, an egg roll and a coke! Greedy Panda with cheap, meager ingredients.
Watch out, Without you asking, they load you up with double rice and charge you twice.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nonna (NonnaK A)
user_reviews_extended.Description: This place sucks! I'm never giving this place my hard earned money again.  I went through the drive through and ordered a kids meal orange chicken with NOODLES and Broccoli and Beef with white rice and an order of Rangoon. The order was total of $18.29. I had to tell Karim who was very rude 2 times I wanted NOODLES. I got home and the kids meal had rice and there was barely any beef in the other entree. I called 5 times to speak to someone but no one was available and there was no way to leave a voice message. The food was horrible and a waste of my money.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Krista Waller
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food was very tasty and the staff was friendly. Location was easy to access, right off the service road. And the meal was perfect size for under $8!

user_reviews_extended.Name: suresh m
user_reviews_extended.Description: The store says it closes at 10:30pm but they shut down the doors at 10:15 itself .

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lisa-Marie Kelso
user_reviews_extended.Description: The only thing that I don't like is when you order something you have a machine answering you and not a person anymore. But the food is always fresh I never had a meat being to dry.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeff B
user_reviews_extended.Description: 5 tiny pieces of sweet fire chicken and it was so DRY and flavorless. This is not $10 worth of food.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brianna Anton
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is the worst panda I’ve ever experienced. Weird AI robot at the drive thru, super rude employees that can’t even say a simple hello or anything. Gross food, hard and stale hardly anything in it. For how much money you pay this is just ridiculous service. Do better.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dwayne Sneed
user_reviews_extended.Description: Make sure you double check drive thru.   They will forget stuff.  Chow mein noodles burnt, beef and broccoli had 2 pieces of beef.  Orderd 3 entre meal  only got 2.  Nobody answered the phone.  Everything is automated.  Do yourself a favor and spend your money elsewhere!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Diana Gonzalez
user_reviews_extended.Description: I literally ordered something so simple . No one was in the drive through and everything was wrong. You can’t even order food from a person it’s a robot . I came back home to all of my food being incorrect . When I tried to call and replace it they weren’t taking any calls. I was trying to call to let them know I wouldn’t make it back before close and I was going to try to find a solution. I was forced to keep my food that I didn’t order. I paid 24 dollars for this

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mark Whitcomb
user_reviews_extended.Description: They expressly don't serve pandas. So if you are a panda don't show up hungery . They will not disrespect you in and way. They serve very tasty Chinese food. Good quality ingredients, served from people who really like what they do.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rose's Reviews
user_reviews_extended.Description: We put in an order and were there to pick up before 10p. This store closes at 10:30. Upon walking up, one guy locked the door. Once my husband got to the door, he knocked and the 2-3 people pretended like they didn't see him. After he kept knocking and they decided to acknowledge him, they pointed for him to go to another door. The were out of one of the items, and the first guy (same one who locked the door) just said -we're out of those-. So my husband asked for a refund.. THEN a different guy asked if we wanted a replacement.  I'd have some compassion if this happened a few minutes before closing but this wasn't the case. Won't be going here again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Emilio Sandoval
user_reviews_extended.Description: They sell me food at 9:47 pm and at that time they don't tell me that I only have 13 minutes to eat because the dining room closes at 10:00 pm. At the store location they have to close at 10:30, it was too uncomfortable to eat in 13 minutes.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jason ZHOU
user_reviews_extended.Description: The portion is very small, make sure to order double for an adult, otherwise you will be still hungry after eating!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Josh Lederer
user_reviews_extended.Description: There was hair in my orange chicken employees not wearing hairnets, the chicken was also dry and not cooked right.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Broderick “Brody” Gough
user_reviews_extended.Description: I'm glad that this convienent location is here. It's quite fast in terms of just driving on through. The prices are decent as well. Recommended.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Israel Ramirez
user_reviews_extended.Description: The service here is great. Izyyy is such a nice kid & was so friendly. Just want management to know that you should value employees like him. He did not stop working the entire time we were there.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Monica Dixon
user_reviews_extended.Description: A AI took my order but real people stopped it and they took my ordered and prepared it. I ordered honey sesame chicken bowl but they gave me the wrong order; the green bean chicken bowl it was not bad but only had 5 pieces of chicken I’m so disappointed they will not answer their phone for me to file a complaint and the website will not provide me with another contact. I’m so done.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joshua Mathews
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Reliable food and the staff is usually very nice. The best is ordering online and picking up at the window. It's so convenient on busy days and a great price. This location is solid.

Not as happy about the corporate decision to swap the side of veggies for some bland greens/leaves. Whole family likes that less so while we go less often, we still like this location.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Paola Lo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Today it was a Asian serving my food and wow he gives bad customer service. Only for me shrimp he charge me 1.25 I thought it was to taste and the end for paying he charged me $1.25. I ordered the 1 panda bowl 7.90 and he ending charging me 9.90 which is not bad at least more shrimp for the extra charge only one shrimp is ridiculous for real. No I won’t come to this location anymore 👎👎

user_reviews_extended.Name: Martha Hundt
user_reviews_extended.Description: Got the two entree plate with orange chicken and beef broccoli... it's usually my go-to order. And, again, as usual, there was barely any beef...today, just one thin piece (and I looked through the copious broccoli to find more). Not sure why I keep ordering the beef broccoli, but this time I think I've learned my lesson. I can find better value elsewhere.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Thomas
user_reviews_extended.Description: Received the most burnt egg rolls I have ever had.n

user_reviews_extended.Name: OJ Keys
user_reviews_extended.Description: Went a couple weeks ago I asked if I could sample a new flavored shrimp I was told no we don’t do samples anymore I said ok cool. I went today 07/02/2024 and there was a middle aged white lady with a mixed daughter in front of me. The lady asked for a sample and the server gladly gave her a sample. I instantly felt some type of way. I asked my server do they still do samples he said idk and asked an Asian guy that worked there who looked like the owner or manager. He asked me what I needed I asked for a sample I was told we don’t do samples anymore. I was like well the lady in front of me just got a sample but ok cool. Then the lady asked for a sample of the fruit drinks they have in the fountains by the register and what do you know they gave her another sample lol. My question is are they being racist or just pick and choose who they wanna give samples to. Maybe my money isn’t worth more than other customers lol idk.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sondra Booker
user_reviews_extended.Description: This was my third and finale stop at this Panda Express. Customer service every time was below the mark. My experience on Saturday, March 18, 2023 around 7:45 at the drive thru service was so low that I had to post. My phone was taken in the restaurant to pay via Apple Pay because they can’t extend it out the window (come in to 2023, please). My meal was then thrown out the window no “thank you”, “come back” or anything. This is where it really went down hill. No receipt was given so I wasn’t sure our transaction was done so I waited. After minutes went by she returned to the window with an attitude. I asked for my receipt. She looked around and said “here”. Here attitude is what made me ask about the sign on the window. She stated “you have your receipt” I I responded “after I asked for it. Please escalate this to the manager.” 1) there is a sign on the window that says if you don’t get a receipt or the receipt is wrong the meal is on us. 2) I didn’t get a receipt. I looked for the receipt because I collect receipts for fetch. When she came back to the window show handed me cash back which was wrong amount than what she charged me. So I’m sure her drawer was off for the night. However, it wasn’t worth the fight. Customer service is a major key to where I spend my money. It will not be at this Panda Express again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chena Northern
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered food for delivery and only got the rice.  They won't answer the phone so I can tell them they forgot my food.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kimberly Brackett
user_reviews_extended.Description: Always go in to view food before ordering. Received day old white rice. Two lukewarm entrees: one with limited protein number orange chicken smaller than grapes. Consider another location. I asked twice about fresh, how food and was reassured. Not so...check food before leaving drive through. Not worth money spent.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sergio
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very dissapointed in the flavor! I ordered lo-mein as a side and got nothing but cabbage

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carolina
user_reviews_extended.Description: I want to talk about the manager working on Saturday June 11 around 7:00pm, she was super rude to her staff. Screamed to a kid because he was cleaning the tables outside and she started screaming at him saying she said inside. We also got the last pieces of orange chicken and it was so little we asked the staff if we could get more since that’s not the portion they serve she asked the manager and she said no. We don’t care much about the food portion but I do care about how she treated her employees, she needs better management skills

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gladys McClendon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered from Uber eats we specifically asked for soy sauce didn’t get it no utensils were given and they didn’t give us our drinks the driver confirmed he didn’t get any drinks so disappointing spending money $30 for what eating dry food no sauce and no drink WHAT A JOKE!!!!!!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Taylor
user_reviews_extended.Description: Usually great, but this time half of the food looked dead or was not available (had to wait) and sweet tea was available because no one wanted to make it.

user_reviews_extended.Name: anival aviles
user_reviews_extended.Description: Taste good  but i just found 3 shrimp in my bowl 🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jasmine Crawford
user_reviews_extended.Description: It's okay. I wish their chow mein was consistent. Some times its perfect. Other times, it's barely cooked. In college, I ate Panda Express every other day...I'd say I'm a pretty good judge of quality here

user_reviews_extended.Name: Love
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love panda but I ended up waiting 35 minutes for my food. Employee didn’t bring out the right order when it was FINALLY delivered. He also left my drinks inside and I had to remind him to go back and get them. I ordered fried rice and no condiments were in my bag. No soy sauce no nothing! Also my food wasn’t even hot when it was brought to me. What was I waiting for??? This is completely UNACCEPTABLE. I won’t be coming back until there is new management. Very poor customer service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: rodney gibson
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Always fresh food.
A clean establishment.
Great customer service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chaka Hood
user_reviews_extended.Description: First Panda I’ve been in that was actually a pleasurable experience. Catera was nice and  gave great customer service! The interest she showed when she found out  my daughter just started kindergarten was a pleasure to see.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Melissa
user_reviews_extended.Description: Catera could use a lesson in customer service. Also, we got there at 8:45 and your website says you close at 9:30 and you were out of Honey Walnut Shrimp and apparently I couldn’t even wait for it, because you’re not going to make anymore? It felt like she was rushing us to stop bothering her too. Not a good experience at this location.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mahir Zafar
user_reviews_extended.Description: The worst Panda Express I have ever been to. First of all, they forgot both my chicken egg roll and cream cheese rangoon in the drive-thru and I am about 30 minutes away from this location. Along with that, the fried rice was stale like it had been sitting out forever. Lastly, even the fortune cookie didn’t have a fortune inside like how is that even possible? I would avoid this Panda Express if possible because they don’t care at all.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Crystal Rush
user_reviews_extended.Description: I gave 1 star because I have to give something to review. Lets start with the Drive through...they didn't listen. Honestly it sounded like there was a lot of messing around. Which brings me to my next complaint, maybe if there was less playing and more working my order would have been correct and I wouldn't have had to wait so long! Myself along with 2 other cars were parked to wait for food and there were people inside, so my question is why? I work in the food industry at a very in high demand location and had I done this to my clients I would not have a job!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christopher Rivali
user_reviews_extended.Description: Had to wait for over 10 minutes in the lobby for fried rice. If you are running low and its the middle of the day be prepared.

user_reviews_extended.Name: A-lotta-nope
user_reviews_extended.Description:
If you enjoy paying extra money for something that you won't receive then I recommend this place.

I ordered the Angus steak today and the first portion only had 4 pieces of steak. The rest was vegetable. I asked the worker if I could maybe get a few more pieces of meat to which she responded "You should just get the double." So, I got a double Angus steak. I paid extra money just so I could get 90% vegetables? The total amount of meat was equivalent to half of a small container. And that's not saying much given the fact it only holds about 1 cup worth of product.They didn't have a problem putting a pound of noodles in there. Do not go to this location. It's trash.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Noam L
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Read the review left 4 days ago by another customer.
That is EXACTLY the same as what happened  to me.
Ordered at drive-thru- waited 15min- got my food, with no apology, no compensation. Nada.
Called the manager. She never offered a compensation beside apologizing bla bla.
Bad management.
You just lost a loyal customer that ordered from you on a weekly based.
Not the best business strategy to say the least.
So they are good when it comes to food (well...
Mostly), but ruined everything when things went wrong, and they actually needed to provide a customer with a solution, after messing up.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Daniel Jones
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've never had a bad experience with Panda until my wife and I ate at this one. It took forever to get three people through the line, customer service was terrible, wife said her noodles were very dry and the rice in my teriyaki rice bowl was crunchy!! This is not an exaggeration! When I say crunchy,  I mean I had a quarter sized clump of rice i was able to drop on the floor with similar effects of dropping an actual quarter. We laughed it off, however will drive further from home next time we want some Panda. Sad....

user_reviews_extended.Name: tania olanda
user_reviews_extended.Description:
We have ordered delivery online and that’s something that we never do because I don’t trust delivery drivers but my husband chose delivery this time and guess what our food was left our are door they didn’t nock or ring the doorbell so after almost 1 1/2 hours  of waiting  My husband said go check out side because apparently people just leave your food outside with out nocking , so I went and my food was outside so I picked it up and flies came flying of of the bag don’t know how long the food was out side but I decided to go to panda and ask to replace I told the lovely girl on the front why and she said they will replace it. So thank you for replacing my food, the food is delicious as always but will definitely never use delivery again. They still get 5 stars for the food, and if rating the delivery person will be and opción it will definitely get 0 star
Thank you!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Monica Taylor
user_reviews_extended.Description: A complete waste money!!! I ordered the honey walnut shrimp with brown fried rice bowl along with a medium order of chow mein noodles and both were cold. My noodles were not only cold but dry and old. I can't forget about my cold spring rolls. If I was not on my to work (which is less than five minute drive) I would have went back!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Greg Burkhead
user_reviews_extended.Description: I really like Panda Express, generally, and have eaten at many of them all over the metroplex for many years.  However, the new The Colony location was far and away, without a doubt, the absolute worst one I have ever been to. I arrived with my daughter at about 6:10 pm on a Sunday night.  Despite what you would imagine would be a busy time (dinner time), probably 1/3 of the entrees were either empty, or very close to empty.  A few of the others that were not empty, looked as if they hadn't been stirred in a long time and had just been sitting there. Both entrees I wanted were empty, Orange Chicken, and Kung Pow Chicken. We waited at least 15 minutes for both dishes to be cooked.  The portions were a healthy size. Once we got our food, we went to get our drinks.  The area was dirty and there were no napkins anywhere.  I went back to the line and waited another 5 minutes to ask for napkins and another 5 minutes while a person checked out front in the cabinets, under the drink machine and discovered there were no more napkins there, while she asked another person to go look for some in the back.  When she returned she had enough for maybe 3 customers.  She gave us 3 or 4 and put the rest of the small handful in the dispenser.  No fortune cookies were offered. Two of the three trash cans were literally overflowing.  The men's room had urine on the toilet and floor, and there were paper towels on the floor as well. Surprisingly, the very young staff was very friendly... just terribly inefficient.  There were probably 8 people working there that night. I don't think there was a manager on duty.  The average age of the people working there seemed to be about 18 years old.  I hope they can get their act together, because I like the food, but they don't seem to have any guidance at this particular location. They also forgot to give my daughter a cookie,which was supposed to come with her kid's meal.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gouka Kuroi
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Love Panda but hate this location. After they messed up a few orders in a row, I called the manager. He apologized and promised to do better. Gave it a couple of months and tried again. They left out half of my wife’s food.

The orange chicken, my favorite, has been historically hit-and-miss on the taste at this location. Something not right with the batter or the sauce, or both. Or maybe it had been sitting under the lights too long. Who knows.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Miller
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food was good. The service was quick and the employees were nice. Overall a great experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kevin Guerra
user_reviews_extended.Description: Check your bag if ordering a side with takeout. My sides have now been forgotten 3 of my last 5 times to this location, yet I have been charged for them every time. So,  it seems fair to leave a 3 star review.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Drew Campbell
user_reviews_extended.Description:
It's a Panda Express. Portions keep getting smaller, and prices keep going up. Expect around $30 for a family of 3 (one a small child).

The only way to make things spicy is to add their packaged "spicy sauce" which doesn't add much.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Wier
user_reviews_extended.Description: Walked in to order to go and see what entree is available. Patient lady in front of me frustrated with service and couldn't check out, no one running register. Workers more concerned over the 14 online orders coming in and 6 drive thru cars while I had already been standing there for now 7 minutes. Never greeted or acknowledged I was there. All about Doordash than an actual person willing to give them money and order. Poor customer service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ryan (Praetorian)
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The food is on level with the Panda Express quality you would get anywhere else, but that's about all that is on par.  I've been there 5 or 6 times since it opened because of the close proximity to my home but they've yet to manage to get either my order right or without a 15-30 minute wait (on drive through no less) on each of these occasions.  Tonight the guy in front of me got so fed up that he drove off.  I stayed and placed my order and when it was handed to me there were items missing but the cashier had walked away as soon as the window closed and didn't come back for several minutes and never gave me a chance to even ask for soy sauce, chopsticks, or my missing food!  I finally gave up and drove off.  Terrible service is the one thing you can count on here and I don't generally bother to write reviews but I felt the need to warn off anyone who expects even average service from this place.

The positive reviews on here seem to be written by staff or paid reviewers by how generic and poorly written they are, by the way!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shafis Cacix
user_reviews_extended.Description: Decent food. Kitchen staff is too noisy. They need to act more professionally

user_reviews_extended.Name: Raven Lyttle
user_reviews_extended.Description: My husband and i got dinner from there and everything looked fine. We got home and started  eating and realized majorly of the fried rice was hard and crunchy. The chicken was also hard. This the second time eating here and there will not be a third.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Burak Bay (Trend Daddy)
user_reviews_extended.Description: State of the restroom. I am scared of the food quality.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cristian Castorena
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worst Panda Express I’ve ever been to. I went to the drive thru and they told me to pull up to the front. They’ll be out to bring the food to me. I waited for 15 min. Then when an employee comes out she just hands it to me. Doesn’t say a word. No I’m sorry for the delay or have a nice day, nothing. Before I can even say anything to her she walks off. Stay away from this one. Horrible customer service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jason Rodgers (Zero)
user_reviews_extended.Description: Just went to the drive thru and the store opens at 10:30. Well this store had no food ready. 30 min wait for any food.... How do you open your store and not be ready to serve the food. I hope the owner sees this and realizes the poor practices put in place here.

user_reviews_extended.Name: John Georges
user_reviews_extended.Description: Never felt so ripped off. Got the new steak and shrimp.  Got upcharged twice for 3 pieces of shrimp. Lame. I officially will never eat at a panda ever again. Your food has never been that great.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brad Brown
user_reviews_extended.Description: Wonderful Panda location.  New design with tea bar.  Food is fresh and abundance of selection.  Staff very friendly and patient even when they have to deal with rude demanding customers!  I have never seen them lose thier cool and are always nice and fast even under stress.  Great place

user_reviews_extended.Name: All Truth
user_reviews_extended.Description: The chow mien was almost all cabbage . 85% of it.. the kung pao had no sear to it looked like it was just boiled vegetables and chicken with almost no sauce. Avoid this place.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joey Johnson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Horrible experience the last two times we have eaten here.  Tried it again tonight out of good faith and again ripped off.  Paid for Beef and Broccoli with chow mein and recieved an entire bowl of chopped cabbage with EXACTLY 2 peices of stringy, chewy, rubbery meat.  Maybe 2 fork fulls of noodles in all that.  They also do not answer their phone.  I won't be returning ever again.  This location is badly mismanaged.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Karrie Bibbs
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve had to come back to this location several times after going through the drive thru for to go. Every time we order teriyaki chicken, we get home and all we have is grilled chicken with no teriyaki sauces.  Today the steamed veggies were not fresh, like they were sitting there all day. So annoying and inconvenient. I've ordered Thai tea twice and it's not made right. Even after I've asked them to remake it. Now I'm back up here trying to get a receipt after going through the drive thru to get food for someone else and I had to come back up here to get the receipt which took 10 mins of my time. I told the manager I'm in a hurry which is why I went through the drive through and waiting for the receipt was my time!!!! Their policy is if they don't give you a receipt the next meal is on them but nope I got nothing. Every time I complained they offered nothing to make the customer happy and want to come back. My family and friends will not be back to the Panda Express is The Colony.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Akina McCann
user_reviews_extended.Description: Went through the drive through and the associate was super friendly and confirmed our order before we went to the window. The teriyaki chicken wasn't ready yet, which is fine (that means fresh food!). He was super apologetic and sweet. Great customer service and great food!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jennifer Carr
user_reviews_extended.Description: Came 1.5 hr before closing and they had all the chairs on the table, it was clear they didnt want you there. The food was old, cold and really had no options. Said it would be 15 min wait for fresh food. 7 workers there and cant get it together. Food was horrible. Should have asked for a refund. Worst pand experience ever.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Elyse Ramirez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Drove a good distance to get to this Panda, knowing that they close at 9:30. We arrived before 9 and went to the drive through. They said they were closed and when I said, “It says online y’all are open until 9:30.” The literal response was, “We’re closed. We have stuff inside to do.” If I was the owner of this place 1) I would be extremely upset, 2) I would not have people like this working for me.

user_reviews_extended.Name: John Conrad
user_reviews_extended.Description: I couldn't even order with their automated bulletin board menu thing it kept asking me the same thing over and over so I just drove away. If they're too lazy to have somebody pay attention and make sure the damn thing works why buy food there

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mark Castro
user_reviews_extended.Description:
“I went there to pick up my online lunch order today. The male crew member ( White guy) at the front was rude and displayed a negative attitude. He seemed very unhappy and showed absolutely no interest in providing even basic customer service.

I perceived his behavior as racist.”

user_reviews_extended.Name: srinath
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love panda but I ended up waiting 35 minutes for my food. Employee didn't bring out the right order when it was FINALLY delivered. What was I waiting for??? This is completely UNACCEPTABLE. I won't be coming back until there is new management. Very poor customer service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shea G
user_reviews_extended.Description: Like many fast food chains consistency is definitely the biggest problem but it would absolutely say this Panda Express was fantastic the food was fresh it wasn't all dried up sitting under the heat lamps really good and the service was great as well

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ryan Herington
user_reviews_extended.Description: Well it was hot. I've been here a few times. First 2 times were great. Tasty fast food Chinese.  The last two times . . . not so great. Chicken was NOT tender, dry and chewy. It was supposed to be spicy . . . Not spicy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shir'Mond Burroughs
user_reviews_extended.Description: Went during lunchtime, ordered orange chicken and food wasn't fresh. Employee put the wrong entree on top of my rice. When informed about it, she removed the entree with the tongs and put it back into the same pot of food and then used the same bowl of rice to put my correct entree on top. So I still had a couple green beans and onions in my bowl.

user_reviews_extended.Name: CD P
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kiana W. had some of the worst customer service that I've experienced. She was rude, trying to rush the order. I ordered it slow enough for her to make sure it was right. She gave an attitude and still didn't get the order placed in correctly. I wanted the honey walnut shrimp. She said that is wasn't ready and would take about 5 mins. That I should order something else instead. I said no, I'll wait for the honey walnut shrimp as it is what I want. She said ok with a lot of sarcasm. I pull up to the window and 15+ minutes later my order arrives. It must have been a shift change because the guy opened the window and asked what I was waiting for. He said oh, let me go ask about it. It finally came out and then he asked if Kiana ever gave me my drinks. I said no, he asked what they were and got them for me. You're Health Inspection B rating in the window, must have been very considerate of the inspection. Her attitude there, must be a reflection of the company as she is representing it with each customer that she is greeting. I don't think I'll ever visit this location again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jesus Ramirez
user_reviews_extended.Description: I came by to try their  wok seared steak and shrimp while the taste was okay at best I did not realize that buying a premium item meant less of it. Having to pay more for an item is fine but having to pay more to get less is wrong.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Durango
user_reviews_extended.Description: The customer service was very poor and the girl at the window kept rushing me to order and I didn't check the order when I left and when I got home she messed up my order. NO WALNUT HONEY SHRIMP ! She charged me for the shrimp and just gave me double orange chicken! I didnt even bother going back it was not worth the drive . I am very disappointed and unsatisfied 😠

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nathan McBride
user_reviews_extended.Description:
AI here. And it sucks. It cant recognize half and half bowls.

I thought we would get hoverboards, instead we get this slop.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kareem
user_reviews_extended.Description: So today I went to Panda Express to order some food, while I opened the door I was delighted with a dashing young man named mark welcoming me to panda! Oh my god, that made me feel like I am cared for. I ordered my usual, plate of fried rice with orange chicken and grilled teriyaki chicken. Mark advises me that the teriyaki chicken will take roughly 8-10 minutes. I had no problem waiting. What mark did changed my life, he offered me a free, yes FREE beverage for my wait! Oh my god.... I got my food, which by the way was amazing. This panda is 10 stars

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christopher Shaw
user_reviews_extended.Description: It's like most locations. Great selection, food was hot. Service was excellent!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Digby Whatever
user_reviews_extended.Description: Do you like getting you food orders complete?  How about prepared correctly?  If so, skip this Panda.  Otherwise, be prepared to be very disappointed.  How it remains operational is a mystery.  In fact, their incompetence leads me to hoping that COVID shutters the place permanently.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mary Samuels
user_reviews_extended.Description: Went on my lunch ordered the Beijin beef rice bowl...the rice was mushy and the beef was crunchy and hard. Called and drove back and they gave me the same batch of over cooked beef as before now im pissed will NOT be returning. Dont waste your time they have another location on Josey if you are craving the Panda.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jayden Sun
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love the Panda Classic with Boba. The store itself is pretty big compare the one in Carrollton. The interior is pretty nice with good lighting. However, they run out of silverware sometimes. The food is just like every Panda Express on the planet. Sometime, you have to wait like 30 minutes for item like Teriyaki Chicken. This place is pretty clean and quite from 2:00 PM to 6:00 PM. However, once it is rush hour. The place gets packed.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nathan Hoxie
user_reviews_extended.Description: How are you out of chow mein at a peak time? Making more fried rice while you have plenty of it isn't a good way of managing the store. Disappointing when you're out of a lot of items your customers expect.

user_reviews_extended.Name: dave salazar
user_reviews_extended.Description: 9:45 on Friday 27th and store is closed already ? On top of that order was wrong… me and family drove over here purposefully after softball game and being in town as it was close to hotels…

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chale Meza
user_reviews_extended.Description: I stopped by about 8:30 p.m this evening. After sitting down tasting my food I found two of servings were cold. I told the manager that two servings were cold. He told me the steamer was "no kidding" a couple of minutes or so and he.brimh some noodles. I thought they would be warmee yeah hold thought "not". I won't be patronizing this restaurt any anymore. If I have to tell the manager that his steamer isn't working I'm patronizing the wrong place.

user_reviews_extended.Name: AJ Klein
user_reviews_extended.Description: The AI that takes your order now doesn't understand 2 orange chicken and 1 Beijing beef. Thankfully the humans that run the restaurant know what to do.

user_reviews_extended.Name: J. Russell La Cour
user_reviews_extended.Description: I've eaten at other pandas and love the quality of the food. At this location is always a mixed bag and the portions seem to be a bit small for the price. Only use this location if I'm really tired and hungry and on my way home other than that I don't really recommend it.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kelsey Hunter
user_reviews_extended.Description: This location was closed 30 minutes before their listed closing time. I am always disappointed with this location for various reasons including terrible food quality, bad customer service, but this was the most irritating. I will not be back to this location and will go 15 minutes out of my way just to get the quality and service that paying customers deserve.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Xuejun Li
user_reviews_extended.Description: Why make everything sweet, even Gongbao chicken!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Larry Vermillion
user_reviews_extended.Description: Love this place for a quick delicious meal.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Rodriguez
user_reviews_extended.Description: I can't agree with Charles p on his response, had to catch her on a bad day! Seriously she's so funny and keeps me coming I visit panda very occasionally on work breaks and she's always considerate she always come up with a great solution when the customers upset give her a break! It's a few other workers that could work on the attitudes and smile a little more some seem not to want to be at panda. Mya should smile more and interact with the customers were on our work breaks we need to see smiles lol I just want to say that I love this Panda Express its gets very busy sometime but that's because of the great food so I don't mind the wait! This is my favorite location

user_reviews_extended.Name: La'shanda Edwards
user_reviews_extended.Description: This location servers half the portion size as other Panda Express locations. Either they are slow at making new pans to keep up or trying to save cost by ripping customers off.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lora Green
user_reviews_extended.Description: This particular location never has fresh food!! SMALL portions at drive thru. Their $10 plate wouldn't fill up a 8 year old.  Check your food!!!!!!!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sai Ravipati
user_reviews_extended.Description: It's good and the food tastes good the environment is clean and food quality is good. Service is good. Overall thumbs up. It's my second visit and they live upto my expectations again. I know it's not recommended for every day but what to do if it's so good.. 😁

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joseph Winton
user_reviews_extended.Description: You offer two choices for carbs, chow mein and rice.  If you ask me not once, but twice what I want, and then give me the opposite, it starts to seem intentional.  There are a lot of people out of work.  You could find employees that are a little more capable.  In the meantime, you certainly don't need my money.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Josh S
user_reviews_extended.Description: Absolutely no customer service. Ordered 3 item plate with chow mein and rice. They were out of firecracker chicken and told it would be 5 mins. 15 mins later I get my food. All the while my other 2 entrees with rice and chow me in are sitting on the counter getting cold. Why you wouldn't give me the other 2 items while I waited is beyond me but it gets even better. Come to find out, the firecracker chicken was cleared out by the employees who decided they would take there lunch during lunch hour! So I'm sitting there watching my order get cold that I could be eating and then watch all of the item I was waiting for, be eaten only by staff for free, and then be told they are making more cause it was already spoken for.  NEVER EATING HERE AGAIN!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sir william Pumpernickel lll
user_reviews_extended.Description: Kareem is a wonderful worker and greeted me with a HUGE smile. He always makes me feel right at home like I’m back in the fields of China. We talk for a frequent amount of time and gives me not 1 but 2!!! Fortune cookies , what a pleasure. I have to say that gentlemen deserves a mighty fine raise if I do say so myself 😉

user_reviews_extended.Name: zynthia cobb
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very, very friendly staff. We were assisted by a young tall blond guy and was VERY patient with my kids while ordering. Place was clean and food was great. Will def. Be back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Solace Service Solutions
user_reviews_extended.Description:
There getting better.
I think the lazy workers inside should have been helping the poor guy in the drive-thru.
Almost 14 cars in drive-thru, 2 customers inside eating, 4 employees standing around with a thumb in there ass wile the poor drive through guy runs around making each drive-through customers order and taking it back to the window while taking other orders.
Pretty ridiculous!
The drive thru guy needs to be promoted and the rest need to fire up their unemployment application.

user_reviews_extended.Name: D'Vaughn Bell
user_reviews_extended.Description: Single handedly the reason I stopped going to Panda Express. One order ruined it for life for me. I don't know how you could mess up orange chicken but they found a way, my order was disgusting, the meat didn't even seem like chicken!! Will not be back, whether or not I ever decide to eat Panda Express again!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robin Jenifer Cowhick
user_reviews_extended.Description: Hit and miss. I always seem to arrive before the fresh food is ready. My rice is usually hard and the chow mein is always cold. I've found a better Chinese food place. Wasabi & Wok, fresh and hot everytime.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alex Fierro
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered Honey Walnut shrimp and did not get it when it's a premium item that cost more.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chris Kabuki
user_reviews_extended.Description:
You want a chain gang kinda Chinese Food, this is your place. Never been disappointed here or any of their locations. The Chinese Food you can count on.
Broccoli beef and orange chicken every time. Unless I get the Bejing Beef.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brittney rednose
user_reviews_extended.Description: I visit panda very often, I can honestly say Kiana has a great personality. More of the workers should be more like her she makes sure all customers are content and leave with a smile. I know it's crazy because I'm always watching her and I see her doing so many things at a time she very energetic and I love her bright smile more people at your Panda Express should smile more like her! She also has a lot of humor she always put a smile on mine and my family faces, she's awesome!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Captain Dave
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food was fresh and delicious and was served very quickly. The staff was very friendly and made us feel so welcome. The dining area was clean and so were the restrooms!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eric shiner
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Size portion for price was not good.
The taste and quality of the food was good.
about 1 cup of ontre and 1 1/2 cup of rice and 1egg roll
$9.90.  alot of money for such little food.
no drink.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Karenia Morris
user_reviews_extended.Description:
We usually not impressed with Panda Express because it's a small restaurant but this one is off the mall site and really good, surprisingly good.

They even had a lovely Tea Bar I will definitely go back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jessica Robbins
user_reviews_extended.Description: Wish I could attach a picture of my burnt crab ragoon and hard rice. This food had to be sitting under a heat lamp for a while to be burnt on the top half. Shame on me for not checking my food before I left. 9:00 PM, went through the drive through, place doesnt close for an hour. I'm going to snap a picture to have on hand if management want to see it. Guess it's a cereal night.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tremain Brashears
user_reviews_extended.Description: The worst panda I’ve ever been too, multiple occasions the order takes forever to get in the drive through. Always out of something whether honey walnut shrimp or orange chicken etc.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Luke Westbrook
user_reviews_extended.Description:
UPDATE! 3rd visit, I get asked if I want something else like 5000 times (drive thru), both the food and drink order for 1 person were incorrectly repeated. I GOT NO RECEIPT! they showed me where their printer wasn't working and a blank strip of paper. this is comical at this point. drive thru guy at window doesn't repeat my order at all! I don't know if he's ESL (if so the MIC may not be the best position for him) or enhancing the Engrish accent for atmosphere.

2 star, demoted to 1 lonely star!

Also by judging the skew of 1 and 5 star ratings shows that customers are being told to give 5 star ratings for a promotion of some sort. If they were really good the majority of reviews would be mid 3 and 4 stars or hover in the 3's. Fake reviews can't make up for bad management.

There's nowhere to go but up panda!

Second visit, waited more than 10 minutes in the drive thru, both times.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Roman Back
user_reviews_extended.Description: Love this place. Employees are really nice.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lovely One
user_reviews_extended.Description: My food was old, semi cold and not enough compared to what I paid for it. I’ve called over 10 times and they will not answer the phone. This place needs a new store manager immediately. Ridiculous

user_reviews_extended.Name: Austin Beazley
user_reviews_extended.Description:
2 pieces of beef in my kids beef and broccoli.

Asked for chili, soy, and sweet and sour sauce, and didn’t get any of that.

Apple crisps and juice for the kids meal were also missing.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jay
user_reviews_extended.Description: They were friendly and food came quick. The only issue was the Orange Chicken was too crunchy. Looked over cooked. It wasn’t bright in color, very dark looking.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Daria Chung
user_reviews_extended.Description: Chow mein was so dry and didn’t have much flavor. Egg rolls were too oily. Orange chicken was not moist at all. Over priced... Overall, quite disappointing.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matthew Robinson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Drive through sugar-chicken what more could you want? easy access, close to my house and some interesting bubble tea, they got all that.  Food quality similar to a food court or airport, but when you want drive through flavored sugar chicken..... well, your get panda express.
One of the best and new location I've been to. Foods pretty decent for a decent price. First time tryout tea bar, and enjoying Oolong ice tea. Very satisfied for now :)

user_reviews_extended.Name: E A
user_reviews_extended.Description: Went through drive through to order and the lady taking my order had an attitude the whole time when I pulled up to my window she was looking at me ugly. Why you mad that you have to do your job?. The employee was Evelynn

user_reviews_extended.Name: Juan Roman (Tokyo Hippie)
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sometimes come by here during my lunch, they have fresh and fully cooked food. I dont ever hear any barking in the back either so i know its well made. Do try if you are looking for lunch.

user_reviews_extended.Name: BexvexXD
user_reviews_extended.Description: Horrible , horrible place, I roll never order from this place. Very unprofessional . Save your money and go eat done where else. I’ve ordered delivery thru UberEat from this place, they messed up completely my order, when I called this store to explain the issue with my order . The Manager told me , there is nothing he can do , since I’ve ordered thru UberEat, really????????. I’ve tried to explain , UberEat was just the delivery platform , they didn’t make the food. He told me there is nothing he could do, even after I’ve emailed him the picture of the order received. This is totally unacceptable!!!. AVOID THIS PLACE!!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: ButterflyTaxi DFW
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love to here when I drop off in The Colony. Food is freah, staff is friendly.  Love the honey walnut shrimp and the Shanghi Beef.  Panda Express is good and quick if you are in a hurry.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bridget
user_reviews_extended.Description: Way to expensive! A small box (size of my hand) of chicken cost me $4.22 took me 3 bites to finish. Nice people but my college allowance is minimum.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ban Olson
user_reviews_extended.Description: I rarely write a review. I went there for lunch today, the lady at front is rude and with attitude, she seems so unhappy and absolutely no interest in providing even basic customer service there.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dale Wolfe
user_reviews_extended.Description: Most filthy restaurant in Texas.   Clean your place. Please!  I have been here twice now and it is the same.   Customer wiping their own tables and the staff just looks aimlessly.   Sorry stuff here.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dustin Wright
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great location. Food and service is good. The interior is very chic, with a lot of varied seating. Also has a tea bar. Oh yeah, and orange chicken!

user_reviews_extended.Name: michael hand
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I came to this location twice now for pickup and both times you have forgotten to out something from my order in the bag.

Seriously how hard is it to put stuff in a bag?

People want a higher minimum wage but sure don't want to earn it!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Janet Gadd
user_reviews_extended.Description: This particular location is well managed.  The food is consistently good. It's quick, economical, and easy to get in and out.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Fernando Diaz
user_reviews_extended.Description: The chow-mein was delicious as usual.  My kids really enjoy the broccoli beef and teriyaki chicken as well.  All of us enjoyed our meals.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alan W
user_reviews_extended.Description: Drive thru VERY slow. Was only one in front and took almost 15 mins. Ordered Kung Pao chicken bowl with steamed vegetables and got a whole bowl of vegetables and a couple small pieces of chicken. Hardly distinguishable. Save your money go somewhere else.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Patricia Chavira
user_reviews_extended.Description: Mostly great. I will always be a fan of panda, but recently the chowmain has had a ton of cabbage than noodles. I love the Crunchiness, but it can get over whelming

user_reviews_extended.Name: Angie Ortiz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Order took long time to prep even though I had pre-ordered online. Chicken teriyaki was cold and dry. No sauce was given. On top of that, my Orange Chicken had a hair in it. Very displeased.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bolanle Asimolowo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered online the previous day for pick up. I was there on the dot and food was already packed on the waiting table. I was disappointed with the fried rice though. The entree was nice.

user_reviews_extended.Name: MIke hilliard
user_reviews_extended.Description: Walked in bathroom was looked. No one inside. Walked up to place a order and when he asked what I wanted he walked away after I started to tell a coworker what happen with a order. He came back to me and asked again just to cut me off again because the coworker need to ask one more thing.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Review Masters
user_reviews_extended.Description: Nice place food is Great and good customer service

user_reviews_extended.Name: Genesis Hernandez
user_reviews_extended.Description: I just went today, and I did cancel my order because the cashier   in the drive-thru has a bad attitude

user_reviews_extended.Name: Karri Hall
user_reviews_extended.Description: Service was great and very quick. The only negative thing I have to say is that I wanted extra mushrooms in my Shanghai Angus Beef entree but they said they can't do that.

user_reviews_extended.Name: John Winb
user_reviews_extended.Description: Don't go, the American waitress is very mean, feels like everyone own her money. I went there once, and she was very unhappy for some reason. Won't go there again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maryam Alkhatib
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very bad i will never eat again the food was cold,noodles chicken and beef throw it in trash Rice overcooked too Are you giving me left overs from two days???? Expensive either i would buy two big macs for 15$!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Timothy Runyan
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Order food to be delivered number 1 food was 30 minutes late
Number 2 I requested for extra sauce and all I got was 1 sauce
Number 3 food was cold

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andres
user_reviews_extended.Description: They have replaced the drive through person with a robot. Takes for ever to order and it literally gets everything wrong.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carvalho Jr
user_reviews_extended.Description: Got here 8:15   Pm can’t get  what I typically  eat, so many workers there and buffet only have few plate option

user_reviews_extended.Name: David White
user_reviews_extended.Description: The service was great. Friendly and helpful. The food was horrible. Undercooked spring roll and tough, overcooked orange chicken. Won't be going back!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amethyst
user_reviews_extended.Description: The woman who takes drive thru order Fxxxing rude. Is the way how the owner teach employees?? Educate employees first before operating the business.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ryan K
user_reviews_extended.Description: This facility looks really nice.  Decorated really well.  Not an overwhelming variety, but that's good.  They picked what most people wanted, and do well.  At a good price considering the competition.

user_reviews_extended.Name: kulluminati777
user_reviews_extended.Description: this panda is the reason i always check my bag in the drive through now. They stay messing up your order.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rayan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Been too many panda expresses and this one fills up plates the most, is clean and a good environment to be in.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Colby Stinedurf
user_reviews_extended.Description: The service was fast, and the food was good. I have no complaints.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Julie Mcclary
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food was good, so hats off to the chef! As for the customer service, they could use a little training. They were not customer friendly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: scott montgomery
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent service and food! Like night and day compared to your location on North Josey which I will never visit again. Great job — I will be back!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alvin Wu
user_reviews_extended.Description: One of the better locations in DFW. Friendly staff and good portions! I live close to the location on Preston in Frisco, but I’d rather drive farther to this one.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kris M
user_reviews_extended.Description: Staff are rude, never greeted. Looks like they are not paid well.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michelle Davis
user_reviews_extended.Description: The assisted order taking menu is the worst...

user_reviews_extended.Name: Re'Ana Garcia
user_reviews_extended.Description: The Orange Chicken was so hard, Teriyaki Chicken wasn’t even cooked and tasted like rubber!!! 🤮 The Chow Mein was hard… disgusting!!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jesus Lozano
user_reviews_extended.Description: Bad they change Manu but they don't want to give you a  taste to see how the food taste

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shanda Mitchell
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food was awesome.  The store was clean and bright. And the customer service was excellent! Thanks for a great lunch!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mary B
user_reviews_extended.Description: It was ok, the fried rice isn’t really fried rice - it just tasted like regular rice so we had to add soy sauce

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nancy
user_reviews_extended.Description: I PLACED AN ORDER ON 7/14 BY WAY OF DOOR DASH. "TWICE" MY ORDER WAS CANCELLED BY DOOR DASH! NO EXPLANATION. I TRIED CALLING THE STORE "MULTIPLE TIMES" BUT "NO EVER ONE ANSWERED"!! DOOR DASH EVENTUALLY SENT ME A TEXT STATING THAT THE STORE WAS NOT TAKING ORDERS..GOOD FOOD.."TERRIBLE SERVICE"!!!!!!! EVENTUALLY WENT WITH TERIYAKI MADDNESS!

user_reviews_extended.Name: wilson ch
user_reviews_extended.Description: There's a guy here who always change my brown rice order to fried rice, so that I have to double check each time...

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christina Peterson
user_reviews_extended.Description: I normally like Panda but this one gave dry noodles and what seemed like day old crunchy rice. Probably will never come back to this location.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hilary B
user_reviews_extended.Description: Don't bother with this location. It's impossible to place an order via the robot at the drive thru.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stella E
user_reviews_extended.Description: Good food but found a hair today in my plate that’s gross

user_reviews_extended.Name: LaLa Bear
user_reviews_extended.Description: My favorite location also first location to have full tea bar few years ago. This place is usually busy so the food is hot and fresh!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Roberta Nicholls
user_reviews_extended.Description: They were out of chicken teriyaki, 10 minute wait. Bathroom dirty. No paper towels in bathroom. No changing area for baby. Only 2 high chairs and both in use.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gene Brockett
user_reviews_extended.Description: Needs new management!!! Can't even keep food stocked. One week out of fry rice this week loman.... dont order form here terrible service!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marisol Alvarado
user_reviews_extended.Description: The cashier was very rude, and it's not the first time she's done it. I went to the store at 4:30 on Tuesday and she is always like that. So sad ……

user_reviews_extended.Name: Edgar Sanchez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Delicious food but the restaurant was a bit dirty. Most empty tables had left over food as well as napkins strewn all around the restaurant.

user_reviews_extended.Name: John No
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is one of the best pandas I have been to in a long time! The food was excellent, the service was fast and Manager Joshua was amazing!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andrew Terry

user_reviews_extended.Description:
La comida estaba muy rica, pero lo mejor fue la Atencion gracias  a la Srta Lucy por su buen servicio y amabilidad.

The food was very tasty, but the best thing was the attention thank you Lucy for the good service and kindness

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jhony Rocha

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephane Bentz

user_reviews_extended.Description: Me gusta que despachan rápido casi nunca esperas nada después de pedir la comida llegarás a la ventana y ya te tendrán la comida en bolsa ya lista para que pagues.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Griss Herrera
user_reviews_extended.Description: Muy mal servicio me encanta panda express pero en especia este siempre me tardan la comida por el drivethru un monton hasta 30 minutos y los cajeros nada amables

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carlos Gutierrez
user_reviews_extended.Description: El chouw menú un poco duro, es raro siempre la comida es fresca

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jesús Luenguer
user_reviews_extended.Description: Me encanta esta cadena de restaurantes. El arroz era muy rico, los nuddles buenísimos, los camarones rebozados muy buenos...y todo a buen precio. Repetiré.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Elmer Flores
user_reviews_extended.Description: Es un lugar muy bonito el servicio exelente recomendado 100%

PATRICIA DE LOS ANGELES GOMEZ NUÑEZ

title: Panda Express
address: 1121 E Spring Creek Pkwy, Plano, TX 75074
description: Fast-food chain for Chinese standards, including some health-conscious options.

user_reviews.Name: Ameen Shawwa
user_reviews.Description:
Panda Express has quickly become my go-to spot when I'm craving fast, flavorful, and consistently satisfying Chinese-American food. Every time I visit, the restaurant is clean and well-maintained, with friendly staff ready to help me through my order.

The food here is top-notch for a quick service chain--Orange Chicken and Beijing Beef are my absolute favorites! The flavors are bold, the portions generous, and everything always tastes fresh, never stale or sitting too long under a heat lamp. Even when I get it through DoorDash, the food arrives hot and packaged perfectly.

What sets this location apart is the efficiency--I've never had to wait long, even during peak times, and the staff are quick to greet you and keep the line moving. Plus, their willingness to customize orders with extra sauce or specific combinations makes the experience feel a little more personalized.

For fast casual, it doesn't get better than this. Panda Express nails it every time! 5 stars!

user_reviews.Name: Nessh Kessh
user_reviews.Description: I went to panda this morning before I went in to work I  wasn’t paying attention to the orange chicken but one of my coworkers came across these lil black sticks in my orange chicken.. as I was eating one unknowingly, my gums started bleeding and I pray I don’t have any stomach issues after eating realizing I consumed these! I love going here but now I’m kinda nervous on going back..

user_reviews.Name: Punkie TheGreat
user_reviews.Description:
It was pretty hot inside upon entering. It's pretty loud from all the searing food. Don't expect to converse much in here. As you can see from the photo, a cub meal is only 2 dollars less than a bowl, and they contain pretty much the same amount of food. I should have just ordered 3 cub meals. The rice to meat ratio is terrible. Way too much rice for the main entree.

My mushroom chicken was alright. A little bland in taste. the rice was a little grainy and dry. I ate most of it but it started becoming mundane and unappealing to finish.

The grilled chicken was dry, my son only nibbled a few before saying he "was full". Finally, the prices here are outrageous. Over 27 bucks for 2 kids meals, one bowl and one refresher.

There's plenty other Chinese cuisine in the area. I wouldn't come here but once in a blue moon. 🌙

user_reviews.Name: Willie carter
user_reviews.Description: This location could be managed more efficiently to ensure quality food and timing delivery. Everytime I go to this location they are either out of the popular options causing unnecessary wait times or the food is sitting too long and not fresh. Sweet and sour chicken tasted like it was sitting atleast 3hrs due to the dried out taste to it that indicates it was sitting way too long without a fresh batch.

user_reviews.Name: Brianna Hazlewood
user_reviews.Description: The staff were so friendly in the evening! The food was warm by the time we got home and tastes great! Definitely coming back to this location again.

user_reviews.Name: Ashley Gail
user_reviews.Description: EUNICE IS AMAZING!! So kind and thoughtful, and she kept me updated on my food while I was waiting! She has amazing customer service and a kind face is a huge bonus! Love this Panda Express so much✨

user_reviews.Name: Abdusalam Rasul
user_reviews.Description: I purchased the five person meal. And upon arriving home after tasting it, I saw that most of the chicken was half breaded and half chicken. This never happened before. I didn't complain about it because I was already home.But I won't order from them again

user_reviews.Name: Alyssa Bernardo
user_reviews.Description: My fiancée and I came to pick up dinner, and as soon as we walked in we got incredible customer service from all of the staff! Churee was especially wonderful and inviting, and got us our food as soon as she could. Absolutely great customer service! If you want amazing food and customer service, please come here it is awesome!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ameen Shawwa
