Churee was especially wonderful and inviting, and got us our food as soon as she could. Absolutely great customer service! If you want amazing food and customer service, please come here it is awesome!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Princess Nyquil
user_reviews_extended.Description: I ordered bigger plate. Portion size was small. Rice was hard orange chicken was soggy. Food dumped everywhere.  Ive been calling the store since Monday, no one has answered. Really upset that I wasted my last money. 😔😢😢 I also complained to Uber Eats.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Evelyn Torres
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been craving panda for a while and when I came in my expectations were met !! Adriana was super sweet and very helpful, she saw that I was looking at their new drinks and offered to let me try them !! Will be coming back !!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Emily
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered mushroom chicken and fried rice. Bit into a nut and I’m extremely allergic. Cross contamination issues and no one answers the phone. Absolutely unacceptable and could have been much worse!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bel Gardner
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Would be five stars if they actually gave you a reasonable amount of sauce. I asked for extra chili sauce and extra sweet & sour. This is what I got. Unreasonable. This happens nearly every visit! And the one time I said 10 sweet & sour and 10 chili sauce, I was laughed at and mocked by the lady because I likely sounded unreasonable and excessive.

It’s almost like the employees are incentivized to retain as much sauce packets as they possibly can. It’s really weird, and no other restaurant chains are this bad. -signed a serial foodie and loyal panda freak.

Ha ha.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Destiny
user_reviews_extended.Description: The service was great. However, the food is always dry and overcooked, especially the chow mein. Either the chef isn’t following the recipe or they don’t know how to cook. Do better please.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anthony Perez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Abagail was so nice! She made us want to come back and eat at Panda Express again. She is very knowledgeable and cares for the customer. Please give her raise and make her manager asap

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chris Runge
user_reviews_extended.Description: Bruh…. This was the FRESHEST, best tasting, Chinese food I’ve ever had! This location is on POINT. It’s piping hot, and it’s fresh! That never happens! Whoever made this food is a genius. Just sayin!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nick Ambriati
user_reviews_extended.Description: This goes for all Panda Express locations. There’s no chicken in the orange chicken. It’s all crusty breading or whatever it is but not much chicken. Do better

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jamie Thomas
user_reviews_extended.Description: Placed online order for pick up a bigger plate, ended up missing one entree. There was no communication with my husband who picking up the food. Tried to call them twice during business hour but no one answered the phone Horrible customer service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Duane Zook
user_reviews_extended.Description: Person of rice was generous. Portion of side was pitifully small. Very disappointing!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Manoj Varghese
user_reviews_extended.Description: Donot order  orange chicken if you need to use your teeth again.. BAD greasy taste and solid rock pieces of chicken . For $11.99 what more do you expect ?

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gigi “Lady G”
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worst Panda experience ever!!!! The food was very overcooked, dry and obviously had been sitting there for a very long time. There were only a few entrees available and I asked to wait on veggies because there were none, they hurried up and heated them so they were just warm, greasy veggies. We were starving so we got the teriyaki chicken which looked ok but it was also rubbery and cold. Terrible restaurant. THIS WAS AT 6PM...DINNER TIME

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ericka Alvarez
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food is very tasty, the cashier is very helpful and friendly, she makes you feel comfortable

user_reviews_extended.Name: shane anderson
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Paid $8 for a bowl 90% filled with rice and 13 pieces of chicken.

I asked the guy for more and he put two little pieces in the bowl.

Not mad, just disappointed.

I will not be back here.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lily Luu
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Service here is just IMPECCABLE! I love my chow mein and so when I walked in to see the chow mein bowl lacking in noodles, I was a bit disappointed to come in at "the wrong time." But nevertheless, I don't like inconveniencing anyone so I was going to order it anyway.

However, as soon as the lovely Asian auntie named Churee came up to me to take my order, it's like she read my mind and just asked me if I'd like to wait 8 minutes to get a fresh batch of chow mein coming out instead of what was currently left. NEVER have I been asked this and other locations just scoop up what's left (more oil and veggies, than noodles).

Then, as we were going to sit down to wait, Churee asked if we would like a cup of water while we wait. THIS level of service is something EVERY restaurant should strive for. This entire interaction made my night and even if it's a fast food restaurant, this specific place is somewhere I'd love to come back to!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chrissy Sperry
user_reviews_extended.Description: This location is one of the best. The people are great. Fast and friendly service with a smile. Food tastes great. Orders filled correctly. Good atmosphere and they constantly clean. Menu is very easy to read and understand. Menu selection has also increased in variety. On the downside, it can be hard to find convenient parking and I think their prices are starting to get a little high. I can still solidly recommend this Panda Express location.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Donald Hassfurter
user_reviews_extended.Description: I stopped by for lunch. The service was very friendly. The restaurant was clean and the food was very fresh.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Janet Berton
user_reviews_extended.Description: I went to this location and placed my order .  A large a la carte of honey walnut shrimp, a large black pepper sirloin steak and one of super greens.  I sat there for 20 minutes without an order.  I finally asked about it and they said they didn’t have my order!  What?  They finally made it and when I got home, the large a la carte of honey walnut shrimp was a third full!  You charged extra for a premium entree and then only fill it a third of the way full?  We’d just been to another location and they filled the box.  Rude employees and a ripoff.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Leah Powell
user_reviews_extended.Description: Churee is a breath of fresh air! Her customer service put a smile on our faces 😊

user_reviews_extended.Name: Fútbol Clips
user_reviews_extended.Description: My bowl was given to me uncovered and the Asian person did not give me sauces and also served me reluctantly and was going to serve me soda and was getting in the way to grab soda bad experience

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tom Diekmeier
user_reviews_extended.Description: The dining room is disgusting. Every table is dirty and the floors are filthy with trash and food.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Google User
user_reviews_extended.Description: Location was clean and team members were friendly, however the portion sizes of the entree were much smaller than what we always have gotten at many different locations. We always order the same items and are familiar with what is a typical portion at Panda Express. It was peak hours and the food temperature was just warm, not hot. They also didn’t give us our fortune cookies, which to many might be petty to complain about but to others it might be part of the full experience of dining at a Chinese restaurant. I couldn’t help but notice other customers went back to request their fortune cookies as well. So I think they might only give them out upon request nowadays.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Salazar Salazar
user_reviews_extended.Description: Anthony R. and the staff working there greeted as soon as I walked in with my family. It was very busy but they did an amazing job in serving. I ordered Chow Mein and orange chicken and Anthony suggested I try Rangoons so I did, and they are my new favorite side. Thank you so much Anthony for the awesome customer service! Also I wish I would have taken pictures because the store was so clean and good so freshly displayed!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michelle
user_reviews_extended.Description: food was fresh and so yummy. such a good panda location, whoever was working the to go orders tonight….you deserve a raise queen

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ramzan Hudda
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food is amazing as always, but that’s not what this is about. Lady at the front was disrespectful, rushing me to order, pushing the spring rolls on me and on top of all that was about to let me leave with no utensils and no soy sauce. WHO GOES TO A CHINESE FOOD RESTAURANT AND DOESNT NEED SOY SAUCE????

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sam Blumen
user_reviews_extended.Description:
This location ALWAYS provides product of lower than expected quality. I don’t know why I continue to think there will be improvement. Really, just about 3 miles away there is one in Allen that is consistently of expected quality. This one is NEVER.

Ordered a very simple to go of large super greens. This is my go to for when it looks like the diet will be going off the rails. I usually love the Super Greens and they are nothing fancy. Just stir fried broccoli and kale.

Today was not well done. Just warm (they had just made it while I was there) but no flavor and texture was raw. Not stir fried. Wok warmed is all. Not at all worth the $ and I’m just done. Really done with this location on Spring Creek @ N Central expressway in Plano tx.

****** NOT RECOMMEND ******

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael H.
user_reviews_extended.Description: Saadman is great. Always has my order ready and knows I like chopsticks and hands them to me without having to ask. Deserves a raise. Food is good too.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Leann C.
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Expect no chicken when you order the string bean chicken. Poor service from an older lady.

I would rather support a locally owned non-franchise establishment that gives you great portions and service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shawnda Jacobs
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is fresh ingredients, mostly healthy if you don't over do it on carbs and soda, good tasting to the average American palate, and more affordable than the majority of other food service providers at this time. Some weeks it is the best meal I have all week.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tagz Fiveightyduce
user_reviews_extended.Description: Bathroom was clean. soap dispenser had that aloe vera type of hand wash. I liked the granite tables the kitchen crew was a non stop team at the time of my visit and I was also informed about the app discounts available from the nice lady. My only disappointment was the menu listed the bigger plate at or around I believe $10.82 but when I payed my total came out to be $15.34

user_reviews_extended.Name: rizz monster
user_reviews_extended.Description: pretty good affordable Chinese food and it's fast. always clean and presentable. very kind attentive staff

user_reviews_extended.Name: LK DogLover
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very disappointed with the food!  It was mushy, I had a piece of grizzle in my mushroom chicken, and it was flavorless.  I used to like this place.  Not ordering from here again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rooz Bon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Absolutely horrendous,  order the large 3 and this Chinese lady extremely rude, just dropped a half/half rice and noodle and 3 choices she was counting and taking. Stingiest location I have seen.. extra buck 50 charge for shrimp side and you get 5 piece if you’re lucky. For $17.50 I got the greasy small portion with worst treatment ever!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: John Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: you’d think the employees who give you your food here are the ceo’s of panda express themselves, suffering some sort of penalty for giving you a reasonable amount of food. you pay $20 for ten pieces of orange chicken and white rice on the side and it’s absolutely ridiculous and stingy, i am so tired of this establishment.

user_reviews_extended.Name: JayRob
user_reviews_extended.Description: I like this particular location because I live and work across the street..the food is good but the service just kills me.. because I come often like every other day,  one of the employees recommended that I order online so I don't have to wait for them to cook the SUPER GREENS, so that's what I start doing, but yet every single time I order online, thinking it will be ready when I arrive, I still have to wait either for the greens to cook or wait for them to make the order..I hate leaving reviews because I'm a business owner as well. But this is the 4th or 5th time this has happened..it's just irritating....guess I'll skip the online ordering and just continue to walk in and order my food.. but service is good just not punctual.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rane M
user_reviews_extended.Description: I always come to this location, but no employee has ever stood out the way Cora just did. She was very friendly, informative, and courteous to me. I mentioned that I had been looking at the shrimp every time that income in but never tried them before. She quickly asked if I wanted to sample it. I sampled it and LOVED it. Added it onto my order. She met us with a smile and held that smile the entire time. Hire more Cora’s. We love her now

user_reviews_extended.Name: Suprawoman
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food here always tastes good with a good size selection and you can watch them cooking up fresh batches in the background. But if you go within 30 minutes to an hour of closing, they stop cooking, so the food isn't as fresh anymore and the selection starts dwindling to only a few choices within the last 30 minutes. Because of this, I try to get there an hour or more before closing time for the fresh selection.

user_reviews_extended.Name: ron blessed
user_reviews_extended.Description: Just ordered food and am seated. Cashier and servers are rude. Poor customer service. They act like customers are doing them a favor. Will never buy food here again and will recommend my friends not to come here. Improve your customer experience

user_reviews_extended.Name: maty G
user_reviews_extended.Description: Small space but the people are great and have amazing attitude l. Food was good and fresh and you can tell they are doing their best.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Deyci Garcia
user_reviews_extended.Description: The portions of stews are very few compared to other Panda.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Abraham Thompson
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love the food and the customer service in this place, thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christine Ramirez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Came in to order food on my lunch break. Ordered mushroom chicken and it was out which is no problem, I had time to wait. Was told it would only be 5 minutes. 20 minutes later it was finally ready. The worker never told the cook to make the chicken. Also upset that they make the rest of your order in the box while waiting for the chicken to be made so while one chicken side was hot the rest of the order was cold because it sat out for 20 minutes. The worker made a small apology at the end but didn't seem concerned about making things right. In the end I had 10 minutes left of my break to eat. Most likely won't visit this location again. No communication. The manager was on a computer the whole time.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lora McCartney
user_reviews_extended.Description: the girl behind the counter was great.  the food was not edible. we threw our food in the trash and went to chicken expess. I ordered orange chicken and she asked me to taste it first because they had a lot of people complaining about it.  it was awful so I ordered something else.  the rice was hard and stuck together.  the chicken tasted terrible. they locked the doors while we were outside closing the store.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carlos Diaz
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Good food & Service.

Came here in the middle of the week for quick pick up lunch & was not disappointed.  The staff immediately greeted me with warm welcome & taking my order.

I ordered 1/2 Fried Rice 1/2 Chow Mein, Walnut Shrimp, Teriyaki Chicken & Chicken Egg Roll.  I was in and out of restaurant within 3 minutes.  At the register the cash register was friendly and took the time to ask if I’d like to make $1 charity donation which I was happy to help and they took the time to ring the bell and make a big deal about it, fun atmosphere.  Even staff member on their lunch break took the time to stop and say thanks, great service!  😁

Food was fresh & delicious, very fulfilling.  If you’re looking for lunch the staff here care about customer experience and it shows in the quality of their food as well.  Keep up the good work & great customer service!  ⭐️😎⭐️

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rachel Legan
user_reviews_extended.Description: The man that took our order was awesome . It's Christmas Eve and there was a line of people because Panda Express was open and they serve with a smile. The food was great and the restaurant was cleaner than any Panda Express I have visited anywhere. 10 stars for great customer service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: suman bohora
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worse place to go for eat-in!They dont mix peanuts on your Kun-Pao,NOT COMING HERE AGAIN

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michelle Rudkin
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is one of the best locations for the food, but I'm not sure why EVERY SINGLE TIME we ask for sweet and sour sauce that used to come with the appetizers we order, we never get it. We even ask for extra and don't even get one. Why?!

user_reviews_extended.Name: S D
user_reviews_extended.Description: I disliked this location a year ago. I decided to try it again, NEVER EVER AGAIN! I asked for more meat and I would pay for it... wait for it... STRAIGHT VEGGIES ONLY

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michelle Reyes
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love this location the night crew from today September 10th 2022 they did an amazing job getting everything ready for the food and also made my experience good. Fresh food always I love that. They are a team not just one person was doing everything they were helping each other 😀😀

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jessica Green
user_reviews_extended.Description:
If you want something quick it’s alright. If you want decent customer service, or even good customer service, this isn’t the place. The white high school boys that work there on Saturdays didn’t greet us, or try to take our order. There is also an old lady that slammed our food down after ordering.

I’m not spending money somewhere where I can’t even get a “welcome to panda” greeting. Disrespectful, and suggest you go somewhere else as well!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gregery Riedi
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I was once a huge fan of Panda express on Spring Creek. Something has happened. During my last two visits the service was horrible. Lines were very long with only 1 or 2 servers. The place was a mess. The rest rooms  mess and the food was no longer as well prepared.
I had heard of their decline from others. Now I am disappointed to confirm it.
I recommend moving on to another venue.

user_reviews_extended.Name: garrett B
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I like coming here if i ever get of work early enough and when I go, Katrina always takes good care of me! She is a great addition to this store. The other employees are very nice and polite as well. They always give you a great list of all of your options and drinks (even though its on the menu..) hehe
Thanks for the great service, and please get Katrina that well needed raise please!

user_reviews_extended.Name: OG Daffle
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Supposedly this location is open at 930 however it was 1030 when I arrived only to find the front doors locked and employees watching me trying all the doors.
Change the hours if you aren’t actually going to be open!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: shaed sosa
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Locations food quality is good. But for WEEKS I have been coming and getting told that that stop making white rice after a certain time. That doesn't make any sense, that is also your only remotely really side option.

Also take down your items you are no longer promoting. The keep advertising up for food they don't even have anymore from like a summer promo...so frustrating

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shea G
user_reviews_extended.Description: Wow, like every place else the portion sizes have really gone down.. and it's pretty good for fast food Chinese (not really Chinese) ... if you can get it when they just made it... but the majority of time most of the stuff is dried up and has been sitting there for a long time

user_reviews_extended.Name: Madison Hopkins
user_reviews_extended.Description: I'm giving 2 stars purely because the spring rolls I got were good. The chow mein we got was old, the rice was not cooked fully, the orange chicken tasted like it was out all day and few pieces had no sauce at all, all the others were very lightly sauced and the Dr pepper was disgusting. Will not be coming back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alex Salamah
user_reviews_extended.Description: I enjoy entrees from Panda express when I have nothing to eat in the fridge or I'm in the mood to cook.  their new spicy Bourbon chicken is really good and I like their Kung Pao chicken... I like spicy food.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Erica Williams
user_reviews_extended.Description: I wish I could rate negative 0 for this location. My mother and I came into this location a bit after 2 o'clock and the customer service was horrible. No one greeted us at all, we were wondering if African Americans just aren't welcomed there. A young man came by the side where you can order looked at us and then proceeded back to the cash register as if we weren't even standing there. So we decided to leave and never to return again. The food looked like it was old also however we were just going to see what we could find appealing to the eye from the selection they had available. This place should really reconsider their staffing selection for the afternoon shift.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kevin Sanderson
user_reviews_extended.Description: I'd give it a zero if I could. The cook came in from outside at the same time I did. I watched him walk straight to the kitchen area and put his hands on utensils without washing his hands. Even after asking to wash his hands he still proceeds to do more kitchen work. I promptly turned around and walked out. Just disgusting.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rachel Wimbush
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food is always great however when ordering for delivery they never give any sauces... u can call but they don't answer the phone. That's the only reason I give them 3 soy and orange sauce should automatically be put in with orders..... food is great tho..... on the other hand just a call of no white rice..... this makes twice in a week and the lady who calls after the food is paid for was rude....... yall have got to get better good food or not I will look for another place next time with better customer service and appreciation......

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vanessa Willis
user_reviews_extended.Description: This location needs to be close down if they don't want to serve the customers. Pull up paper in the door window Online Orders Only, look like a little kid wrote it. This is my 4th time coming and it was a issue. 1st issue *****Broken Stove**** all the business they get and they can't get the stove fix, and they thinks its funny. 3times same situation. No apologies at all, (No Chicken). Really!!! Go to the Coit location services a little bit better.

user_reviews_extended.Name: JinxLusk13
user_reviews_extended.Description: Only 2 workers there are nice everyone else seems to be irritated anytime you come in to order. Very stingy on portions compared to other locations. But it's clean and they will let you wait for a fresh batch of your favorite entree (not happily lol but they will)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Darnesha Stokes
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tonight my wife ordered panda express for us, normally my experience at this location is great but tonight I'm highly disappointed. Our order was completely wrong and the soda we ordered was flat because it was out but no one bothered to telling the grub hub driver that! When my wife went to take our order back she witnessed the workers using food containers that ALREADY HAD FOOD IN IT, JUST EMPTY THE FOOD OUT AND PUT DIFFERENT FOOD IN IT . THATS NOT FOOD SAFETY AT ALL. and when my wife told the manager on duty Emily she didn't do anything about it or even seem to care. I dont know about anyone else but i have food allergies and i could get sick from someone being so careless. My wife ordered food because I'm sick and unable to be mobile so we had it delivered. Moral of the story is ill never go back to this location again! Poor accountability, poor training, poor customer service. And I've been a general manager for serval years with no guest complaints this is sad how this situation was handled.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nortell Brown
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is the absolute worst Panda Express location. The employees are extremely rude. After my first visit, I wrote it off as maybe just a busy night or something. I tried this location again after a couple of months and it’ll the service was actually worse. This location does not close until 9:30. I arrived at 8:30. They were out of several common entrees and when I asked if they could make more, the employee was extremely rude in stating no. You will be open for another hour and won’t make any more of a common entree at a customer’s request??? After both visits I have left and gone to the location in Allen and the service is 200% better. Although it is closer, I will never visit this location again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Erika
user_reviews_extended.Description: Good place, good food, good prices! I usually go to Panda Express and their food is always top notch

user_reviews_extended.Name: Adam Howard
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food is Panda Express food except a little colder.  They are bad with there drive through. Just waited over 15 minutes in a drive through line with 2 cars in front of me the whole time.  Went inside to find the manager was running the drive through and he wouldn't have the guy move forward in order to serve everyone else (Also 2 cars behind me). The guy behind me was yelling at the drive trough window.  They were chatting and laughing and joking... they put having fun with a friend over customer service.  I should also mention 2 out of the last 3 times they didn't get my order of fried rice and orange chicken right. It's not that hard.  I would take the ten minute drive and go to a different Panda Express every time.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jason Mogollon
user_reviews_extended.Description:
In my opinion, the food here tastes better than other Chinese restaurants. The food tastes more fresh And I like the sauce that they use. The service is always quick And they are friendly.

Added 03/08/26: Now I don't know if this applies to all Panda Express locations or just this one, but I was eating here instead of taking it home and I asked him where the salt and pepper are and I was told that they don't have it available. Now if this is a franchise location and not a corporate one, I would understand why they don't offer salt and pepper little packets because the franchisee is trying to save money. And it's likely that not enough people eat at the restaurant to justify paying to have salt & pepper available for clients.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jonathan Caldwell
user_reviews_extended.Description: Haven't eaten Panda in years, and it was delicious! The new Spicy Orange chicken absolutely rocks the tastebuds. 5*

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ra Nath
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Me: picking up online order, is there chopsticks in the bag?
Panda express employee:  🤷‍♀️
Me to manager: can I get chopsticks?

Sarcasm : this is the most efficient panda

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dusty Evans
user_reviews_extended.Description: $17 for a large a la carte box of honey walnut shrimp and you would only fill it half way. Such a rip off. What’s the point of choosing the bigger box if you refuse to give a larger portion?

user_reviews_extended.Name: joe lou
user_reviews_extended.Description: I go to this spot often and have picked up a few of the employees habits. The older lady Named Huong refuses to give me more than half a scoop of meat. I would avoid Huong as much as possible!! Today I was served by Sammy M. and he is a charm! Gave me a nice normal portion of meat on my plate and was very nice! Keep up the good work Sammy you are great!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alexandra E.
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent food! Good portions, well cooked & fresh! Friendly staff except for the older lady who rushes you as you order- no patience and not the best maners from her...but other than that a great Panda to dine in or take out! 😊

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sharon Abernathy
user_reviews_extended.Description: I like my Panda Express. The good is always hot, and most times fresh. Drive thru is always busy, but fast. That I can appreciate. Staff is very friendly and efficient. I go there frequently, and would highly recommend this restaurant to anyone hands down!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: E Fox
user_reviews_extended.Description:
No way I will ever eat there or another panda express again.  Bought a meal with a drink.  Ice machine was empty and I had asked for a simple cup of ice.  I waited and waited and still no ice.  Finally tired of waiting had asked for a refund.  Manager on duty said she couldn't do them.

So I left minus the food and no money refunded.

Went to their website to file a complaint and try to get a refund that way.  Not a word from corporate either.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Celia Rosas
user_reviews_extended.Description: Do not come to this location. The (asian older guy) owner or manager was very rude to his employees. When I asked how much longer on an entree, they stated 5 minutes and took 15 minutes. One of the employees asked and he did not reply. So I raised my voice to ask nicely and still no response. This will be the last time I ever stop at this location. He needs to have manners and respect his employees as well.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Earnestean Holloway
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food that I selected was not good. Black Pepper Chicken. Yuk!!! The meat is definitely not chicken, dark looking funny taste, to the chew almost like some type of a fat meat, but, what kind I don't know, a it made me feel sick, I tossed the entire meal into the garbag. Even the Steak in the vegetables was strange, it was not steak. I called to let them know of my displeasure, but they had evidently closed. I'm still going to call tomorrow. Almost $12.00 wasted, I'm a Senior Citizen, and I don't have any monies to waste, plus my health is very important to me. I don't like giving bad reviews, but this is real, and it's honest. I am requesting for the sake of others, that Panda Express will serve: Real Chicken, Real Beef, Real Meats period.

user_reviews_extended.Name: boneyard
user_reviews_extended.Description: Always fresh food, great portions, even better service

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dean James
user_reviews_extended.Description: Before walking in I could see two employees conversing which wasn’t a problem but as soon as I stepped in the facility the employees did not acknowledge me so I quickly got some hand sanitizer just to give them some extra time to finish their convo, stood in front of them for a good 10 seconds and they were still talking! I felt like a ghost! Then, as soon as I opened the door to walk out, the employee says, “ Hi how are you sir?” Hah, how pathetic. Will not be spending my money here and will NOT recommend anyone to visit this location.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amanda Robison
user_reviews_extended.Description: I just love the taste and quality of their food.  I treat myself a couple of times per month.  I get my order to go, then eat part of it at the restaurant and take the rest home for a meal the next day.  Portions are generous and the prices are a very good value.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tiana Ware
user_reviews_extended.Description: Spring creek location isn’t prepared as they open at 11am but popular food items are never ready nor are they consistent with keeping up with the demands. On several occasions I was asked to wait 15 plus minutes because they were out and it’s during the time they just opened so I didn’t understand the issue.

user_reviews_extended.Name: ERIC MOGENT
user_reviews_extended.Description: Nothing to brag about. The Lo mein wasn't good & the rice was salt less. This particular store will not be on my agenda next time when I'm hunger. I'm not telling anyone not to go there, your choice but I wasn't happy with both of our meals and don't you think they need to change the menu to something new?

user_reviews_extended.Name: Beverley Johnson
user_reviews_extended.Description:
This restaurant is close to the express way. Food is fresh and reasonably priced.  Waiting time is about 5 minutes when busy.  Both chowmein and fried rice has some vegetables and look appetizing.
However,  shrimp and meat platters are displayed and served at close proximity, also shrimp is fried in the same oil as chicken....for those with shellfish allergy this is dangerous.
Staff is courteous and friendly. There is a Drive thru.

user_reviews_extended.Name: dakine
user_reviews_extended.Description: Phenomenal staff and delicious as always

user_reviews_extended.Name: aaron yearby
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food taste good and nice size portions are placed on plate. Customer service at this location has always been friendly when I visit. Can get busy but the line moves fairly quick.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Caitlin Juarez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Always such nice staff. The location is very clean and always has exactly what I'm wanting hot and ready. Quick Service and everyone is so friendly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ashley Peterson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Terrible!! Everytime  I come here either the orange chicken or teriyaki chicken is out.. not out and some is almost ready because the employee who last served the last of the entrees made the cook aware that there is no more . But out and no one knew the chicken was gone.  So now the wait is at least 20 minutes.. To me that's terrible service.. Friendly, but I'm not looking to make friends..

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeff Harper
user_reviews_extended.Description: App would recognize my email address (because it ends in .us), so I had to try and use my corporate email. Then, the app couldn't place my order, so I had to wait in line for 5 minutes, and then wait another 10 minutes just to get veggies for my side. Not my best experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: John McCormick
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food is always very tasty but the parking lot is horrible. Starbucks drive through blocks parking spots and entry/exit.  Food generally takes 10-15minutes later than what their app shows.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cassidy Cleveland
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food isn’t the freshest as other locations. When the crew member asked how many hot mustard sauce packets I wanted I said 10 - he then threw 3 packets in my bag. Why even ask then?!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Natalie Hernandez
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have tried so many times to give this location a chance but each time the service, food, and staff is just horrible. The employees have no idea what they’re doing and the food is never fresh and they’re always out of something. Don’t waste your time just go to a different location.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Diana Gallegos
user_reviews_extended.Description: They NEVER Answer The Phone.

user_reviews_extended.Name: ELI SHAK
user_reviews_extended.Description: They were out of shrimp and orange chicken , and was told to wait... No problem they look busy. Waited there for 15 mins for the shrimp and as soon as it was ready they ran out orange chicken and was told to wait more....??? That's just plain stupid, I just walked out . Waste of time , never coming here again!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marty Barron
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food was very good but being lunch time you would think you would know that you are going to be busy and would have some of the things you sell the most of ready togo, but that wasn't the case here ! I had to wait for chow mein noodles and my friend had to wait and then ask about his teriyaki chicken twice, at least it was hot.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gerald Goad
user_reviews_extended.Description: Terrible. Panda is usually consistent and decent quality. Not this location. Beef and broccoli had no beef and broccoli looked wilted and soggy. Also got the steak and shrimp which was mostly potatoes, there was one small shrimp and 2 cubes of steak. Noodles were good. Overall worst wxoeri nice ever for a Panda Express.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Craig Waugh
user_reviews_extended.Description: Good food and good service. Not usually that crowded but there can be times where groups come in. Staff usually gets everyone through quick though. Dining area could be cleaned a little more often but otherwise, all is good here.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nathan Ramsey
user_reviews_extended.Description: Told me a 5 minute wait for shrimp then when it’s done I was told another 5 minute wait because they did not know they ran out of orange chicken poorly managed place

user_reviews_extended.Name: Crystal
user_reviews_extended.Description: Rounded up my cash transaction without consent

user_reviews_extended.Name: Keith Dearing
user_reviews_extended.Description: Last time for real. This place needs a new manager. Used the online app to order food and I came in when I was supposed to pick up my food then waited 25 minutes to get my food. Half of it was cold because they prefilled the order with the food they had and then sat it on the counter until the rest was cooked. Last time.

user_reviews_extended.Name: My Reviews
user_reviews_extended.Description: Really wish it had a drive through, especially for how difficult the parking and accessibility already is. The men at the counter were really nice. I think the layout of the restaurant as a whole is kind of flipped from what other panda's i'm used to. It was also raining outside and the awnings barely, barely helped.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Daniel Imel
user_reviews_extended.Description: They got my order wrong on multiple occasions and even left my appetizers out entirely on the most recent visit.  I never had these problems with the McDermott location.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chanel Smallwood
user_reviews_extended.Description: I ordered fried rice just a medium side the lady constantly tried to tell me to get the bowl because it would be cheaper...but how is $6 cheaper than $2.90? The fried rice was extremely mushy like I've taken one bite & I'm throwing it away. ABSOLUTELY HORRIBLE.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Danielle Jones
user_reviews_extended.Description: Came in yesterday order  the bigger plate with double orange chicken and honey sesame only got orange chicken and honey sesame  didn’t get the bigger plate asked for sweet and sour sauce got egg rolls the tried to charge everything separately I had to tell her I got the bigger plate and I also got charge for black pepper steak and didn’t get black pepper steak tired calling no answer I was On my way! To work and get lunch so I couldn’t come right back panda do better at service and answering you phone for me to spend 35-40 dollars my order should have never been wrong and I should have never been rushed too order my food  and that’s  part of the reason she messed my order up

user_reviews_extended.Name: Khoa Bui
user_reviews_extended.Description: It's okay for a quick bite when you craving; but its quality is far from a decent Asian restaurant. Every time I came here I have to remind myself not to come again because there's absolutely nothing special about the food.

user_reviews_extended.Name: flyingshaper100
user_reviews_extended.Description: Me and my girl friend ordered food. Girl friends food wasn't ready yet and had to wait for the hot orange chicken. My food was ready but they decided to hold my food with hers until hers was ready. So I get to stare at my food that's behind the counter until hers is ready.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sunshine Turner
user_reviews_extended.Description: Good service other than the fact every time I order Beef WITH Broccoli I get almost ALL BROCCOLI, like 2 pieces of beef ever....What's the point of getting it if you aren't giving me the BEEF?????? Poor portion balance

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matthew Sluberski
user_reviews_extended.Description: This location of Panda Express is my favorite, I go here so often that all the people know what I get normally.  The food is just so good, especially if your tired and in the mood for some hot orange chicken.  Highly recommend

user_reviews_extended.Name: holly ogorman
user_reviews_extended.Description: Really bad costumer service. They always get the orders wrong and argue with you trying to get you to shut up! Why would you waste your money at a place like this. If I'm going to over pay for food I would at least like my order to be right, you know? Don't recommend this location at all. Save your time and go somewhere else

user_reviews_extended.Name: Angela B
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered rice and orange chicken. The rice was undercooked and the chicken was soggy. They were out of sweet & sour for my rangoons. Thanks for a great birthday lunch panda!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Beverly Franklin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Trying to be supportive of local restaurants during this time. It is understandable that there will be limitations and changes to all menus everywhere, however a order of Broccoli and Beef simply must contain more than 3 slithers of Beef.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marcos Torres
user_reviews_extended.Description: I can't explain with words but the food and the price it is just unbeatable!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gabriella Bermudez
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have edited my review because I have been back recently and the food was fresh, staff was courteous and attentive, & menu items were available. I will definitely be back!

user_reviews_extended.Name: The Guerras
user_reviews_extended.Description: I don't usually leave reviews and I'm a pretty understanding costumer but this location is the worst  food establishment I've ever been to. Broken equipment, rude servers...spend your money elsewhere.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mikaela Rios
user_reviews_extended.Description: I got a bowl with orange chicken and chowmein and my girlfriend got the plate with half chowmein and fried rice with orange chicken and mushroom chicken. We both loved our meals and the staff was super friendly! Also the store is kept super clean!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Richard Chichakli
user_reviews_extended.Description: The expectation of Chinese food in this place can be only the result of marketing. A pretend buffet with minute portion at unrealistic prices for the value received is what I encountered. It is surely not a place to visit again

user_reviews_extended.Name: Veronica Taylor
user_reviews_extended.Description: Workers there older Asian lady and younger Spanish/Asian girl, not friendly. Do not greet, Hi or Bye, NOT even THANK YOU!! But reach hand out to take payment. At least pretend you like your HAPPY to be at work. You did apply for the position. I will not spend another $ in that location!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anthony Paden
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love Panda Express. They always have so many tasty entree options. Currently, one of my favorites is Beijing Beef. The staff are very helpful and considerate; the dining area is cozy and clean.

user_reviews_extended.Name: bruin83dkw
user_reviews_extended.Description: This location has brought "customer service" to a new low.  They don't listen to customers, can't seem to get the order right, never have the serving bins loaded with food, and can barely communicate.  I'm never going back.  Horrible example of a usually pretty attentive restaurant chain.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sam Uyokpeyi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Line was un-organized, food not hot, had no unsweetened tea, and when I ordered lg drink- for tea, nothing was said that they only had the sweet tea...ugh... did not offer refund,  so I got coke...ugh...

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ada Ortega
user_reviews_extended.Description: Churee is sooo pleasant to speak with !!! We are a big family and  were in and out!!! Everyone was so attentive and kind I appreciate y’all being so patient with us! See y’all soon!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kacy Murillo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Anytime there is a panda express we eat there because there isn't one close by where we live. I LOVE their honey walnut shrimp! Dream about it!! So good and always fresh!!! Please put one in central Arkansas!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mandar S.
user_reviews_extended.Description: Quick and smiling service even at 10 pm.

user_reviews_extended.Name: B
user_reviews_extended.Description: It was great! The employees were very helpful when ordering! Staff was very kind. The process was very quick but not stressful. The food was amazing! :)

user_reviews_extended.Name: jess jonnes
user_reviews_extended.Description: Horrible experience. I had to wait for more than 15 min to get my sides instead of 2-3 min. After all the long wait the food didn't taste good. Will never go back this location again

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ardy Rides
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The Fried Rice is terrible.
They're not using the correct rice to start with, and the flavor is bland.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Matthew Lambert
user_reviews_extended.Description: Went in for a quick lunch, and they were out of 2 of their very popular dishes: Beijing beef and Angus steak. Unacceptable to go in at noon and not be able to order what's on the menu.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Austin Jassman
user_reviews_extended.Description: my ehole plate tasted hours old. Rice was hard and orange chicken was saugy last time I went on 1/4/2017, all other times it has been one of the better Panda Expresses.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Damie Evers
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Rice with Orange Chicken
Egg Roll
Beef & Broccoli

user_reviews_extended.Name: Thomas Fagan
user_reviews_extended.Description: HORRIBLE!   The franchisee should have his franchise rights revoked.   Arrived to find a piece of paper reading “ online orders only.”  The franchisee clearly can’t run his/her business and is soiling the panda name….get it together.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeramicia Arnold
user_reviews_extended.Description: if you're a student like myself who was at Collin College you often find that you don't have enough time in the day to get a home cooked meal. This place is located on Spring Creek Parkway right by the college and I had the shrimp honey coated with almonds yum.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gerald Wells
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worst panda express I have been to. Out of almost everything at 2:00 pm. Service was poor and very confused.  Told to wait for teriyaki chicken but the server never told the cook to put any on the grill. Had to tell them myself. Poor management.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Monica Evans
user_reviews_extended.Description: Friendly staff that always offers free samples. Pretty good selection. Pretty much the same as any other Panda Express in the nation. Have you tried their Orange Chicken? ;)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sundina Palmer
user_reviews_extended.Description: This place is hit or miss...usually not very good (stingy portions and no flqvor!) but every once in a while I'll actually get flavorful food in good sized portions.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jalal Hafi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Some kid called Joffrey was serving me, best server I’ve ever seen. Gave me the best food I’ve ever seen.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sarah Lewis
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I think that was my first Panda Express experience!!!  Food was excellent!!!
Little lady at check out was very pleasant and wouldn't take a tip.
GOD BLESS Y'ALL!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Javier Vizcarra
user_reviews_extended.Description: Dissatisfied, food was okay tasting but, every time I come here the elder manager lady always stiffs me on the food idk what her deal is but it's always happening with her, and only her, Im sorry but Allen is the one to go to.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brett Yance
user_reviews_extended.Description: Mostly clean except a couple tables. Fried rice was greasy. But really, it's a fast food place; can't expect much better. Could definitely be worse.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Olivia Rose McDermott
user_reviews_extended.Description: Want Chinese but don't want to go to the store, Panda will stuff you full and give you enough to spice up your next days home cooked meal.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dr. Jeffyl
user_reviews_extended.Description: Find myself here a lot lately  it's never been bad, it's always been good ,great service nice people friendly and attentive keep up the good work would recommend 10 out of 10

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maurice W2
user_reviews_extended.Description: Rude and racist  had a problem with me adding g hand sanitizer to my personal bottle every restaurant encourages dashers to be safe and clean and this restaurant said the same I get it its the color of my skin have a bless day

user_reviews_extended.Name: Felicia Nicole Flores
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food is always good and fresh. The service is always fast and friendly. The location is always clean and tidy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Deborah Carter
user_reviews_extended.Description: We weren't able to try a taste of their new chicken dish, but ordered something else we knew we enjoyed!

user_reviews_extended.Name: ELIA ROSA TORRES
user_reviews_extended.Description: Esta franquicia es una de mis favoritas porque me encanta la comida, pero este local es terrible en cuanto a la limpieza, esta muy sucio y descuidado por su personal, tan asqueroso que había una cucaracha en el pasillo hacia los baños. Se me revolvió el estómago y se me quitó el apetito. Deberían supervisar estos locales porque dañan la imagen de tan prestigiosa cadena de comida. Si el área de las mesas esta tan sucio, como será la cocina donde se preparan los alimentos.... es un asco!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kevin Alleinzuhaus
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Das erste Mal das ich als Vegetarier was anderes als Nudeln, Reis und 🥦 bekomme. Es war suuuuuuuuper lecker.
Diese Filiale ist zudem auch so so freundlich.  Wären 10 Sterne möglich, hier wären diese richtig 👍 👍

title: Panda Express
description: Fast-food chain for Chinese standards, including some health-conscious options.

user_reviews.Name: Alvin Wu
user_reviews.Description: Absolutely hate this location and will never visit again. Came here one other time before and the older asian lady working the front was so stingy with the portions compared to other locations. Came back recently after a two year layoff and the same lady works there!! We should’ve just turned around and walked away when we saw her. However against better judgement we decided to stick with it since we needed something quick. She is still as stingy as ever. Ordered beef broccoli for one of the sides and when a new batch turned over I saw a pile of beef. I assumed she would portion a decent amount. NOPE she only gave 2.5 slivers (see photo). Also the chow mein is dry and doesn’t have much cabbage. I do not recommend!!

user_reviews.Name: Jaime Calderon
user_reviews.Description: I have tried this restaurant before but in another place, but this is excellent because the service. Staff is committed to attending with kind and being patient and explaining the diferente dishes and offers they have. Specially Daniel, a boy who attended very nice. Food is nice and tasty. This place is clean all around.

user_reviews.Name: Rose Misfits
user_reviews.Description: Arrived at 9:02pm, ordered my food and asked for fresh mushroom chicken since the one on display looked like it was sitting there for hours, and since they had ran out of Broccoli Beef I was willing to wait for fresh string beans chicken and Broccoli Beef. As I was waiting for my food I noticed that they were calling for half orders for everything. The lobby was extremely full and half of the lobby had been closed off. We were all crammed up. There was miscommunication with the staff and kitchen since lots of people were waiting extra for their food. As I was waiting I saw people who had been waiting for fresh food after me get it first. I asked for an ETA and was told they don’t have it started, I was originally told 5 minutes wait but ended up waiting almost 35 minutes due to them forgetting about my order. I had to wait 12 more minutes on top of the 35 minutes since they forgot about the mushroom chicken. The cook hesitated to making fresh Mushroom chicken for some reason. As I ate in the lobby I saw more than 12+ people leave due to no food being ready to serve. It was all chaos and I wasn’t satisfied with this location and due to my string beans chicken to be burnt ,since I didn’t get to enjoy my food, due to my appetite going down from disappointment

user_reviews.Name: Leticia Quintana
user_reviews.Description: The service was definitely very bad. I'm paying for my food, but they gave me a huge portion of rice and very little orange chicken.

user_reviews.Name: Eric Dickson
user_reviews.Description: went to eat with family got a cub meal and a larger plate. they forgot the fortune cookies and the cub fruit snacks. then upon leaving i refilled the cub meal cup and a older asian man with glasses not wearing a name tag walked up to me and proceeded to say outloud in front of the restaurant  "this is the water if you want" and when i asked what he said he said this is the water i proceeded to ask what he means and he shrugged his shoulders so i said okay and when i went to walk away tells me you need to pay for soda i then told him this was a cub meal drink and left. saying that outloud infront of people having them look at me is extremely embarrassing and beyond unprofessional from panda express this man should not be working here acting like that

user_reviews.Name: Angelica Rocha
user_reviews.Description: While waiting in line to be attended, I witnessed the manager yelling at an employee in front of customers. This kind of behavior is unacceptable, unprofessional, and creates an uncomfortable environment for both staff and customers. Managers are expected to lead with respect, not intimidation. It’s concerning that someone who speaks to employees this way has been placed in a leadership position, and the company should reevaluate who they promote to management roles.

user_reviews.Name: Aparna Tiwari (The wandering foodie)
user_reviews.Description: Decent place for quick Chinese food. Fried rice and noodles were quite bland and side were quite okayish. Had spring roll which was quite decent . Apart from that honey walnut shrimp and chicken were quite decent.  There could have been more taste too good which was missing.

user_reviews.Name: Cinthya Mauricio
user_reviews.Description: First time here, I’m not from the area very stingy place with the shrimp they up-charge you to give you shrimp 🍤 to only serving me 4!!! Very loud and rude employees! Definitely not coming back!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alvin Wu
user_reviews_extended.Description: Absolutely hate this location and will never visit again. Came here one other time before and the older asian lady working the front was so stingy with the portions compared to other locations. Also the chow mein is dry and doesn’t have much cabbage. I do not recommend!!

It’s concerning that someone who speaks to employees this way has been placed in a leadership position, and the company should reevaluate who they promote to management roles.
