Apart from that honey walnut shrimp and chicken were quite decent.  There could have been more taste too good which was missing.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cinthya Mauricio
user_reviews_extended.Description: First time here, I’m not from the area very stingy place with the shrimp they up-charge you to give you shrimp 🍤 to only serving me 4!!! Very loud and rude employees! Definitely not coming back!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeffrey Gonzales
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I hate hate hate this Panda Express location. Which is really sad because it’s the closest one to my house. And like the sick orange chicken addicted user I am, I still find myself giving these people my money. Reasons why any other location is better than this one:

1. There’s no drive through. This would be fine if there was ever any available parking for this restaurant. There’s usually parking in the shopping center behind this restaurant so it’s just a hike.

2. They are always either out of or almost out of everything! I’ve gone at all different times if the day and it’s always the same. I don’t even attempt at going in their last hour of the day because there’s nothing left and they don’t care. If you ask for something they’ll tell you no and come back tomorrow.

3. They are so rude! I have never met anyone there that has any desire to be helpful. They yell at everyone like animals, NEXT!  GO AROUND! WHAT YOU WANT!

I really wish they’d build another Panda Express somewhere near by so I didn’t have to choose between being yelled at and corralled like cattle to be served old cold food or driving another 15 mins to a better location.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sariah Bushnell
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am not sure why, but every single time I have gotten food from this location yall never get my order right. I always order beijing beef, orange chicken, and fried rice. WHY DO YALL GIVE ME DOUBLE ORANGE CHICKEN EVERY TIME. I’ve gone in person and I ask for beef. The older lady usually makes the plates, and she always gives me double orange chicken. I correct her when she put double orange chicken, and she fixed it to beef. Three times that’s happened in store.  Today. I ordered for pick up on the app… can you guess what they did? for a fourth time? Double orange chicken!!! Yall need to fire the incompetent employee because I am not sure if they can’t read or if yall don’t wanna make more beef? I cannot figure it out because the order was on a sticker on the box. It was also on the receipt. And yall still got it wrong. 4/4 times yall have gotten it wrong. At this point it’s no longer a mistake. It’s gotta be on purpose or someone’s just being lazy. Will not be returning to this location because this is extremely disappointing.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bianca Borges
user_reviews_extended.Description: On September 15th, around 1:00 pm, I had one of the worst customer service experiences I have ever had in my life. I went to lunch with my stepmother at Panda on Preston Road and we were mistreated by a person who I believe is Chinese and an old lady. She looked at us with such anger that it seemed like she wanted to throw the food in our faces simply because we didn't speak English. My stepmother is already an elderly lady, so she kept asking me what this was, what that was, because she can't eat just anything. This Chinese waitress had no patience at all. I felt so bad, so embarrassed, that I couldn't hide it. So much so that a gentleman who works at the same place, I believe he is Spanish, saw the situation and came to ask me if I needed anything. I told him I don't need anything. I just wanted to say that this lady is rude. She shouldn't even be working with the public because she has no patience simply because we don't speak English and don't know this food, so we needed to ask. In short, terrible service. I don't recommend that anyone go back to this place unless they change the waitress because this person is rude and shouldn't even work with the public.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Thomas Mendez
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Excellent service whole team was great
The store is exceptionally clean

user_reviews_extended.Name: hedieh H
user_reviews_extended.Description: We got a bigger plate with orange chicken, steak and Teryaki chicken as entrees and Chow mein as sides. It was not as flavorful and delicious as other branches but still ok!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kyla Thompson
user_reviews_extended.Description: i usually don’t leave reviews, but after this experience i feel i need to share. we did an online order 1 bowl, 1 plate, and 2 spring rolls, picked it up, and then headed home. we didn’t think to check the bag but after this we will always check to make sure, lesson learned. we got home and the bowl was correct, however the spring rolls were missing, and when we opened the plate that was supposed to have 2 servings of low mein, orange chicken, and the beef broccoli. to our surprise it only had the beef broccoli, and it was ice cold, not just from the 5 minute drive home, but like it was never warm.  very disappointed!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Orions Descendent
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very tasty food and good service

user_reviews_extended.Name: Derek R
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent location, super clean with a friendly staff. The food here is always fresh and every time that I've been in they've never been out of any of the entrees, I never feel shorted on portion size either. Even when it's busy they seem to make it through the line fastly and efficiently. The only drawback is parking can be tricky during busy times but that's to be expected anywhere around this area in Frisco.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Adrianna Teague
user_reviews_extended.Description: Briefly spoke (via phone) with person by the name of Jeff to ask a question about his location because the website said that the location had a drive-thru. He was very rude and hung up the phone in my face. When I called back he had the audacity to say “do you have another question” as if that’s the correct way to answer the phone. Jeff is a rude individual and should not be in customer service at all. He should be outside. Next to the dumpster, preferably! That’s more of his speed!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hunter
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I work directly next to this place so I come here often. The workers are nice and the food is... well... it's panda express. You get what you pay for. One time they didnt have the hot orange chicken so I had to go with a different protein. After checking out I started to walk out and the "tall Asian guy" (sorry I dont know his name lol) stopped me and gave me a free small box of the chicken I wanted. They're very nice.

Food: Panda express / 10
Service: free chicken / 10

user_reviews_extended.Name: carson 310
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food is good but the fried rice is horrible its very bland needs soy sauce basically whoever is cooking it needs to be retrained on how to cook fried rice. Worst fried rice i ever had.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lucia M
user_reviews_extended.Description: Rude General Manager , we decided to get water cups and last minute we poured a little bit of soda , but the manager came up to me rude and told me “here is the water mam” . Which obviously meant he didnt like the fact i got a little bit i soda and i understood and didnt do it again . Then he kept staring us from far away , we thought he forgot about it and wasnt mad anymore , but he proceeded to point at us to the employees and whisper them something , which i think its unecessary . ive never seen a manager so rude from panda before and so stingy , and my mom decided to get up and try to pay for the drinks and he decided to argue wirh her and not let her pay but he was being rude to her telling her to pay next time because water cups are for water only , i understand the frustration but the way he handled it was extremely unprofessional , and to go and point at us with employees and talk about us was just dragging it over some water cups with a bit if soda , i will NEVER be coming back here again

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rashad Taylor
user_reviews_extended.Description: Old food an bad services an when I asked for fresh orange chicken the manager got mad an responded with don’t say the food is old just wait for other food all because other ppl was in the line . Then he repeated to say something negative under his breath all because I requested for fresh orange chicken an this is at 11am prime lunch hrs

user_reviews_extended.Name: Thenewheather GH
user_reviews_extended.Description: The staff at this location are rude. Short with me, didn’t say thank you & just hand stuffed some fortune cookies in my hand when I kindly told her I forgot. Highest point - a good fortune. I won’t be back & let my Frisco friends not to visit either

user_reviews_extended.Name: Craig Marshall
user_reviews_extended.Description: Marissa was not very pleasant. Been here many times but this time she almost made me want to go somewhere else. Manager observed what was going on and had to calm her down.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jessica Scott
user_reviews_extended.Description: I come in 35 minutes before closing and they don’t have any food left. They said they only have orange chicken and chow mein and everything else was gone and not making anything else. I would assume closing at 10 you would want customers to come in and have most options still. It’s not even the first time it has happened. Every other panda I’ve been to has not done it but this one:/

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bejay Sanders
user_reviews_extended.Description: The old man who works there brings real grumpy energy. If possible bypass him and let the lil lady or someone else service your order.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kricket Saucedo
user_reviews_extended.Description:
This was my best experience at any Panda Express, ever. Including this location. I usually come here, and I'm happy with it, but this time, I felt compelled to leave a review. Audrey was hands down the nicest and most efficient person that I've ever had serve me in a restaurant.
She was so friendly. I wouldn't have thought to leave a review if it wasn't for her.

user_reviews_extended.Name: De'Nitra Calhoun
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was greeted when I walked in the door. The food didn’t look fresh but it actually was. This location was very clean.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alise Beauty Bar m
user_reviews_extended.Description: Came in and got a small side of honey shrimp. The lady said that seven come in a small and she still gave me only six.  I opened up my container and it was half full. Will not be coming back here again. So Unacceptable

user_reviews_extended.Name: T.j. Burns
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve seen a ton of bad experiences here but anytime I go (Around lunch time during the week) they always have fresh food and the service is super fast! Super clean too!

user_reviews_extended.Name: suzy marklay
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Im extremely disappointed with my recent experience. I found a blonde hair in my food (and I have dark brown hair!), which was off-putting. When I brought it to the manager's attention, he offered to remake the dish
which didn't address the hair issue at all. Honestly, I lost my appetite. I requested a refund, and that's when the manager became rude. He refused a refund and presented some kind of dirty brush as if it were related to my hair complaint saying this was the reason there was a hair. To top it off, he tried to charge me extra for a side of something that was the same portion size as in the original dish. Jacks behavior was unacceptable, and I'm very dissatisfied with the service i will not be coming here anymore.

user_reviews_extended.Name: gracie rodgers
user_reviews_extended.Description: please make the spicy orange chicken a permanent item. i haven’t had panda since they had it last. PLEASE

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joel Skariah
user_reviews_extended.Description: Had to wait for the food delivered. But my kids like the chow mein so we definitely get it when there. Try avoiding going to the store an hour before closing time as you will find less options available to choose from the menu.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Adriana Herrera
user_reviews_extended.Description: Lunch rush timing and they were still being friendly to everyone who walked in. Food was good and hot.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Trenton Larkin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food here is decent. The orange chicken 🐓 and the teriyaki chicken 🐓 are the best dishes here.

user_reviews_extended.Name: ashley logan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Every time I order from this location they text me that my order is ready and when I arrive and there is a delay. They always forget the condiments I ask for in my online order rushing to get the order completed and offer item to replace what is ordered like drinks that I already paid for with the order. There operations are very disorganized. Arrived today at 7:40pm pick up and order they text at 7:14 to pick up and the order isn’t ready. Poorly management location indeed.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rashad Johnson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Messed up my delivery order. Gave me no reason why they did it and hung up the phone abruptly when I asked for an explanation. His excuse was "we're busy". They need to reevaluate their hiriing practices and try hiring qualified candidates

user_reviews_extended.Name: Diana Tyler
user_reviews_extended.Description: Had the most ridiculous experience I’ve had at a fast food restaurant. They ask my order - make one plate. Stop fill 4 other orders. Then ask if I want something else, all while the 1st plate sat. Then made the 2nd plate - then went and filled 2 other orders. Then asked about my 3rd plate which they now have several missing food items and tell me I have to wait. When the item I am waiting on gets done, they continue to fill other peoples orders in line behind me. All while my food sits on a counter getting cold. I finally just walked out. I normally go to a different Panda Express. Customer service at this location is a circus town freight train on fire.

user_reviews_extended.Name: g45
user_reviews_extended.Description: Seriously. Its my third times visiting here. Everytime they give too little portions. If you want to eat something with 10dollars, this is not the place. Not worth it

user_reviews_extended.Name: Xavier Gore
user_reviews_extended.Description: Awful experience. I have a coupon for a plate for $5 and not only did the manager not honor my coupon. But she blamed the system and was very rude. Not very friendly to people of color. I witnessed another black person being spoken to very abruptly. Food was old and being mixed with new. Avoid this restaurant.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Treshea Long
user_reviews_extended.Description: My husband and I came here for a quick meal because we had a long day and no groceries at home to cook dinner. My husband went in and started ordering food. The person putting the plate together dropped some on the counter and he swiped the food BACK into the food bin with his bare hands. No gloves on. My husband walked straight out of there. Be careful eating from this place because they’re not sanitary.

user_reviews_extended.Name: sergio silva
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Watch me standing outside for over 15 minutes after schedule open time. In the end didn’t even open.
If you have any issues to open late let it be know at least. L

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jacob Golden
user_reviews_extended.Description: Every time I come in at 9:00 there is never much food left. They close at 10:00pm and they barely have any rice, no orange chicken. Then they ask if you would like to wait “5 minutes” but it’s always more like 10 minutes. Orange chicken is the most popular dish there. You would think they would have enough or have some ready. Not only that I come in tonight and they have almost nothing out. No rice, no meat, not anything. But 3 people cleaning, one taking orders and a long line of people wait. This is almost EVERY night. They need to do better. Unacceptable.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Grant L
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I recently did an online order at Panda Express on Warren Parkway and Preston Road. When I walked in, I gave my first and last name and mentioned I had an online order. The staff looked at the bag with my name on it and still asked me to prove it was my order. I was confused because how would anyone else know my name and have placed an order?

I tried to show my information, but the app was glitchy and took a while to load. During this time, the staff mentioned they have a lot of people stealing orders, which seemed odd. How would anyone know the details to steal my order?

After a few minutes, I finally got my information up. The staff still gave me a suspicious look before handing me my bag. The entire experience was uncomfortable and felt very unprofessional. I don't think I'll be returning to this Panda Express.  Also, the honey walnut shrimp was so plain and boring. No walnuts… no honey… barely any shrimp lol.  How many bad reviews until this place changes?  Sounds like the management here is very poor. I guess they don’t care about their reputation or customer service.  🤷🏻‍♂️

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kalyan Nandi
user_reviews_extended.Description: They serve rotten foods. The fried rice I got was really smelly. You go and ask them as usual they will upfront say no we just cooked it. Never ever coming back here, are most Pandas the same.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rajiv Pillai
user_reviews_extended.Description: The variety is nice. But the rice is usually under cooked and the veggies sometimes smell stale. The restaurant takes good precautions on account of the pandemic.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Daniel Roach
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food was good but the service was terrible. After getting our food they push to donate. Then asked for 4 medium drinks and he said they were out of medium cups and asked if I wanted large. I said sure if you charge me for the medium price because you dont have what I wanted to order. He said no and handed me 4 child size cups. I didn't want to argue so I took it. I would have paid for the large but he was rude about it. Now I had to make 3 trips to the soda machine to refill my drink.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kam J
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I know Panda Express is usually kinda strict with their portion sizes…however, this location SKIMPED big time. Never had such a weak serving of noodles and other items. $12 for a Bigger Plate…and it was basically a child’s portion.
Never going back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cameron Spence
user_reviews_extended.Description: This place sucks. I come in 40 minutes before they close and are out of half their options and won't make more. I have come here many times and their employees are never nice or make you feel welcome. Who is paying the managers to work at this location? Because they shouldn't be. Seriously, do not go here. At least spend your money at a better managed and operated panda express location. Garbage.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Philip Poon
user_reviews_extended.Description: No, I do not want to donate a $1.  No, I do not want to round my change up for donation.  Each and every time I visit.  I frequently visit Panda and have to answer these questions each and every time.  This is the only thing that is consistent at Panda Restaurants.

user_reviews_extended.Name: CRISTINA L
user_reviews_extended.Description: My delivery order was completely wrong and after having to drive there to get the correct order, the manager on duty was very rude and didnt want to replce the order. Did it with an attitude. No more Panda for me from that location!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Selvendran A
user_reviews_extended.Description: Never go to this place. Food is not at all good. Today i ordered teriyaki chicken and rice. That's totally spoiled food. Smelled very bad. I throwed away.. very worst experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Garrett
user_reviews_extended.Description: Poorly run location. Tables/floors was visibly dirty, silverware dispenser was empty, and communication with the employees was poor. I had to ask the cashier to correct the charges at the register, and had to return when part of my order was missing. Good management could turn this situation around in less than a week.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maria Freitas
user_reviews_extended.Description: I always go there and recently noticed this new guy I think his name was Ali, he was nice and at the same time did what he was supposed to and had no problems with my order and Molly the girl at checkout didn’t insist too much on donating like people usually do. However I noticed the managers are always being rude to staff and sometimes even to costumers.

user_reviews_extended.Name: jordan diaz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Literally the worst Panda Express ever. I’ve been to others, where it’s worth the amount of food. This is the first time I came to this location and ordered a “bigger plate” and the food was such a small amount it was embarrassing. I wish I opened it right in front of them. They should be embarrassed for being so cheap. Definitely going back to the Prosper’s location from now on. I hope people read this and do the same.

user_reviews_extended.Name: FullTimeMom NeedsVaca
user_reviews_extended.Description: The senior citizen owner / manager is very annoying by continously begging every customer to donate to charity multiple times during check out. This charity scam is used to pay the restaurants taxes so they won't have to pay them. Employees have zero costumer service and this is the only location too cheap to let you try a sample before ordering a new product. Food is cold and taste old.

user_reviews_extended.Name: HERMAN PETERS
user_reviews_extended.Description: Good food, first time I tried the spicy orange chicken and really liked it.

user_reviews_extended.Name: M RY
user_reviews_extended.Description: 50 dollars worth of food for the staff not to filled the noddles

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rachelle Galvin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Love Panda Express but seeing the cooks handle food without gloves was kind of disgusting. When ask why no gloves the guy was insulted! Praying I don’t get sick

user_reviews_extended.Name: Yolonda Woody
user_reviews_extended.Description: Customer service good, however, I order 2 orders of the honey walnut shrimps to go. They put both orders in small a la cart…when I got home and open the container, they only gave me 8 shrimps...keep in mind, they charge $2.00 extra for shrimps…so I was charged $4.00 extra dollars, on top of the original cost…for only 8 shrimps! Are you serious?? Count your shrimps before leaving…tried to call location, but unfortunately they close at 9:30pm. I’m speechless and shrimpless!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ann G ALG
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great food and great customer service every time.  Panda Express, it's always a good choice for dinner options/selections. The honey sesame chicken main item is my favorite 💓 😋. What's your favorite Panda Express main dish item? Love this location for the fresh food and nice staffers.  I recommend this location.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Farhangis Jumah
user_reviews_extended.Description:
With the speed and consistency they ask for charity & to round up, I wish they paid the same attention to the clients order. I have to ask 3 times for fork & sauce.
I come for food not for charity please pay attention to the clients requests.

user_reviews_extended.Name: suresh m
user_reviews_extended.Description: So rude people. Very rude customer service , don’t have patience. If people didn’t have patience they can better stop working., panda should to stop asking  people to donate and round up. Panda is making millions of money , they can donate. When we don’t donate the people serving getting really mad and bad .

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tina
user_reviews_extended.Description: It was hard to find this location, but the navigation eventually took me there. I feel like they give less the protein than in the other Pandas and too much of noodles. Most likely I try other location in the future.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Fred Moyini
user_reviews_extended.Description: I got to the restaurant at about 8:45 pm. Half empty food line. Barely any beef items selection. Rushed up food service. I had to ask for every sauce. He forgot the teriyaki sauce for my teriyaki chicken. Never any management present. I have given several opportunities, and returned with the hope they get better, but I wasted time and money. I won't return anymore.

user_reviews_extended.Name: venky raman
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I ordered food a family pack and six orders of spring rolls
I set a pick up time
I went 30 min after pick up
I sent my daughter for pick up showing the order number
First response is which location
I went inside showed the email confirmation
The lady working there gave multiple replies
We did not enter the order yet. Later saying they did put the pack and someone took it may be. We waited like 30 min to get our order made. Once she gave me the order I had to check each and every pack for the correctness. She gave three orders of spring rolls instead of six. I asked again and she added. Again I had to ask for sauces. They forgot the fortune cookies. They might be too busy. But the way the lady who was working there handled was not impressive. There is no complaints on food.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kristina Patterson
user_reviews_extended.Description: First time at this location and I'll never go back. The food was so unappealing. I took it to go so I didn't realize until I got home with it. I live 10 min away. The food was all mushy, orange chicken,  being beef and sesame chicken.  How does fried food become all mushy? I saw fresh Rangoon come out so I got some. I grabbed one in the car and it was mushy too! Just how? Ugh, if I got a receipt I'd have taken it back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: L M
user_reviews_extended.Description:
We have been coming here for 10 years since moving to Texas. The restaurant is always clean and food always fresh.

This is my kids favorite fast food place. With the price, you get fresh made food and has never been a let down.

Since I have a tribe, the family meal deal with 2 sides and 3 entrees for $34 can't be beat.

Our go to is 2 chow mein, 2 orange chicken, and we rotate the 3rd dish depending what everyone feels like.

Great place, located next to Starbucks and At&t store.

The staff is always friendly and kind. We love coming here!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mahek G
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Restaurant closes at 9:30. Went there around 8:30 and they were out of most items, As usual. I asked them to see if they could cook sweet fire chicken, i didn't mind waiting but denied, ignored and navigated the conversation to we have sesame chicken. I don't want that!

I can understand if this was at last 15 minutes before close, but hour?? Come on!!! This has happened multiple times at multiple Panda Express locations.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tarun Nekkanti
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is the stingiest Panda Express I have ever been to. I twiced placed orders for pickup and both times the quantity of entrees was so less. They just filled a ton of white rice and a thin layer of entree like an icing on a cake. I could excuse them one time but when it happened again, it cannot be a mistake.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jacob H
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered on the app 15 minutes before I arrived, got a text saying it was ready when I walked in. They had not started it and walked around for awhile trying to figure out where it was. Then they started making it without talking to me. Had to wait how long again because they ran out of what was in my order. They didn’t apologize or anything. Just handed me the food without saying a word.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Neal Clemens
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great fresh food and a great value as well.  I got the Orange Chicken Plate with steamed rice and noodles. Awesome.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jorge Daniel Arzola Sastre
user_reviews_extended.Description:
First Panda Express from all of over United States of America that is vetoed for me . The service was poor and guess what? I will explain why.

-I know guys this location closes at 10 p.m.  , nobody of you has to remain me every time I go . Even in 20 minutes left you close I can eat really quick tho.
-If you have a customer make SURE they has their own MEAL and everything they need to star then with the others .
Anyway , I will go to the other closest one to me where the service has been better, not perfect but it’s fine.

user_reviews_extended.Name: w k
user_reviews_extended.Description: The Korean lady serving at the front desk was intense, somehow rude, even her partner said to her: " calm down, relax!", in front of customers.  She needs to go get training about customer service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cristina Anguiano
user_reviews_extended.Description: They were polite and helpful. They were a bit busy, but the order was done pretty quickly. Food was good 👍

user_reviews_extended.Name: Donyale McNeil
user_reviews_extended.Description: They want to load the bowl up with chow mein less proteins and vegetables. I had to get a side of veg and meat to add to it later.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cody Wood
user_reviews_extended.Description: Wow! Love this Panda location! They are pretty busy most of the time and are good to the customers even when hustling. I want to single Andy out, he went above and beyond by noticing my hands being full and he personally put my two large fountain drinks in a carrier and bag. Great job! ☺️

user_reviews_extended.Name: Julia Bell
user_reviews_extended.Description: Panda Express is always delicious. But I won't be returning to this location. I can typically brush off people with an attitude; everyone has bad days. But the woman working the front (inside, getting your order and checking you out) was out of control. So incredibly rude, impatient, demanding...we weren't the only ones put off by her either. Every person who came in was just shaking their heads at her behavior. I don't want to deal with this lady again, I'll be eating at The Colony location from now on.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephanie Vasquez
user_reviews_extended.Description: The place is really clean and the food is good I’ll give them that. But the customer service is horrible especially that one main lady (if you know, you know) she is so rude! Please work on being a nice human being with decent manners please

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dami S
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food is ok. Nothing special for $8 meal.  You get what you pay for.  The worse part was the service from Jack (he might be the manager). I am in retail and I know what is customer service. Jack does not have the ability or the willingness to take care of his customers. Not sure if he is unable or unwilling.  He gives you half the amount of food other employees do and does it rudely.  If I go there again and Jack in there, I will walk back out. I’ll go somewhere else.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rhea Isaac
user_reviews_extended.Description: I appreciate the changes made to keep everyone safe.    However a few observations. One staff preparing customers plates was not wearing gloves. And the person taking my order on the computwe screen kept the same gloves on to prepare plate.   She should have changed gloves or remove gloves and wash hands to handle customer orders

user_reviews_extended.Name: Chris Anthony
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The Worst...

This was a really unfortunate experience with Panda. My wife ordered a bigger plate, and the attendant refused to let her choose mixed veggies as the side (he required the mixed veggies to be an entree later on and was very unpleasant to my wife).

In short, we paid for a bigger plate and only received a 2 entree plate and an extra side with horrible customer service. We have really loved Panda Express until today. I hope this feedback helps you avoid a terrible experience because this was awful. We love Panda, just not this one!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Raj Samy
user_reviews_extended.Description:
This store should be reviewed thoroughly for food and especially for customer service and fully closed. My humble 2cents.

I'm giving 1 star that's very generous !!!. Why the heck the servers here behave so rude and RUSH us sooooo much????? Why can't they be polite???and just hey just calm down?? Do they have annnnnny sense of customer service???? Or thier management ever taught to thier employees about it? Do they even know how to smile?? not only to the customers, but in life??? IM just wondering.....OMG....such an experience....hahahahha

Learn folks !!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Isaac Sauceda
user_reviews_extended.Description: Hot diggity dog these workers are nice and hardworking. It's a small area so expect it to be packed during lunch and dinner, but goodness do they make good food. At least better than some other locations. Definitely worth the wait if they run out of a certain entree option.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vakeidria Hendry
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food was subpar, could probably count on one hand how many pieces of meat I got. Employee Tien didn’t want to hand me my order and instead pointed towards it for me to grab & when I asked if I could taste the new firecracker shrimp he said he doesn’t do samples. Won’t be back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Donald Wilborn
user_reviews_extended.Description: You can never go wrong with chicken and rice for a healthy food option, so I from time to time hit up Panda Express when I'm pressed for time or on the go. This location is always very clean, with great staff and fresh, well-prepared great tasting food. Can't go wrong here.

user_reviews_extended.Name: miketg19
user_reviews_extended.Description:
We usually like Panda... 2nd time we have tried this one and 2nd time we have had an issue with our order. Today my wife wanted the fired shrimp and after finding what I wanted we placed an online order.

I arrived to pick it up and am greeted with "we don't have any of the fired shrimp, what else would you like?" My wife does not eat chicken or shrimp (medical reasons), and doesn't overly care for the walnut shrimp. I simply asked for them to cancel the order, and I would go to another location. Lady said we have to do that online, but the website says all changes must be done by the store. When I tell her that I am then told that only the manager knows how to do that, who is not there. And that I should come back tomorrow and talk to the manager. I asked why nobody there would be able to modify the order, she repeated that only the manager can. My next question was how were you going to modify my order when you just wanted me to pick something else? The fired shrimp is a premium selection and requires me to pay extra, if I took a lesser item how would I be refunded that extra money? This was met with a blank stare and her trying to tell me that they were all just simple employees without the access needed.

Long story short (too late) I now get to wait until the manager is there... was not told times that will be. All in order to just get my money that I paid, for something I didn't get, back... I hope. There should be someone during all operating hours that is able to handle these simple things, this really shouldn't be that hard.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shaheed Campbell
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Usually my orders are good and the service for me is top notch. This time it wasn't correct.

Just double orange chicken and fries rice. Instead I got steamed. That's what I get for not checking before I left. And I'm not driving 20 minutes to take it back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sam Sanchez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Uncalled for and bad experience. Sent my daughter to get our already paid for food. Sent her with confirmation number and receipt, with the location of pick up. They would not give her food saying that they don’t have it. Interesting that I have all the needed info and still not honoring. Called them and they said they would finally give her but then make a very uncalled for remark to my daughter saying that..”you can’t ever come back for free food”? What??! Completely rude and disrespectful to their customers.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Richard Orozco
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worst Panda Express ever, entered at 9.20pm and took a table, in 5mins asked to leave the table because that area was closed for cleaning. Went to order and they had nothing,  family order needed 40 min wait, the guy in the kitchen was making face after getting order from front. Had to leave with hungry kids.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mohammad Youssof
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent service and a spotless restaurant. Right up to the close of business, the staff continues to offer help. The idea of letting the customers donate to children hospital or any medical facility is a practical solution to help others.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kathryn Lowrance
user_reviews_extended.Description: You are much better off going to an authentic Asian restaurant. By doing so, you get a lot more food for the same price that tastes better!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mousumi Das
user_reviews_extended.Description: I like Panda Express for quick bite when I am traveling or on some lazy day. Though I have gone at late evening...there were not such varieties. Everything was almost empty. The shop keeper was not so welcoming. When I was eating my food, he was looking again and again as I have done some mistakes. Don't like his attitude towards customer.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dr. James MD, PhD
user_reviews_extended.Description: Terrible service from stingy manager. Never coming back here again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Vaughn
user_reviews_extended.Description: Shrimp is always fresh and fire!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marissa Blagburn
user_reviews_extended.Description: I come here all the time! The food is so good and  yummy! A lot of people complain that the noodles are too hard, but I think they just like noodles that are cooked forever, because this chow mein is to die for! Had a little bit of a problem with one of the workers once, but hey...everyone has a bad day, especially when in a rush. So thanks Panda express!! Customers, come here and love it!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Caceco
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worst Panda Express I have ever been, kun Pao chicken tasted so salty and does not have any red pepper or spice like other panda place. For a plate with two main,  I received total 7 pieces of meat, rest all vegetables.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Conservanerd: the Culture War
user_reviews_extended.Description: The manager came up to me as I paid and asked me to please use a credit card. I told him I don't have a credit card I have cash. He then told me there is a reason he won't except my cash but he will this once but next time please remember to bring a credit card. I told him next time  I'll spend my money some where that wants to accept my money and that doesn't hassle me for trying to do business with them. I work in the area and eat here twice a week for the past four years and this is the second and last time this manager tried to turn away my business. Well I've learned my lesson and will never spend a dime here again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Roger Waldrup
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am a diabetic I wanted splenda for my tea,they didn't have the sweetener out near the drink station . I ask an employee for splenda he said they were out.  He offered me sugar I told him that I am a diabetic I told him I won't get to enjoy my tea then sat down at my table.  Later an employee brought me sweet and low which is not what I wanted but at least somebody tried.  This is something that  should not be ignored a diabetic should be allowed a choice like most restaurants offer.  The restaurant needs to be far more sensitive to the needs of many of their customers.  I hope this is not a trend to avoid the needs of diabetics.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Surkein
user_reviews_extended.Description: I enjoyed the Panda Express at the Stonebriar Mall. When you go there in your lunch time and normally doesn't have his long line as many of the other fast food establishments. But the food is always hot and it's tasty and the staff is very friendly. I did enjoy my meal.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Saitej Sagi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered bowl with brocli and orange chicken got chomein and orange chicken, and got a plate with kung pao chicken with fried rice and chowmein but got no chicken at all, very much dissapointed by staff the lady that served me is very rude and not willing to listen at all!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Arvin Safaeian
user_reviews_extended.Description: very rude and terrible manager. I went there with my grandparents today and some lady wearing mostly black (assuming she was the manager) acted as if we owe her something. not a single smile, not a thank you, and she acted as if the customers there were a burden to her. Will probably not return to this location and I recommend either find a different restaurant or at least a different Panda Express than this one...

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mackenzie
user_reviews_extended.Description: The lady with the black shirt whose name started with an M was very dismissive and did not pay attention to the customer in front of her. I felt rushed during my transaction. I asked to try the bajin beef, as sometimes it's not fresh and so is chewy. She immediately put it on the bowl. I then asked for an egg roll, she ignored me as if I hadn't talked and handed my bowl to the next person. Who was the cashier, on my receipt is Diane. She had heard my request for egg roll and asked which I wanted, she also listened to my request for sauce. Who cashed my out was good. But the lady who prepared my bowl needs to pay more attention to who is infront of her

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mike Brad
user_reviews_extended.Description: The Panda Express at the mall is a good choice for a change of pace. I eat there often while my granddaughter enjoys another one of the vendors that are available. The portions are quite large and each one I've tried is is quite tasty.  Panda Express doesn't get too crowded even at lunch as compared to some of the other vendors so it could be a great option.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Claudia H LM
user_reviews_extended.Description: I went this afternoon and the manager was training a lady in the register. Usually people there are always nice, but this time, she was super rude, no even asking about donate a Dolar. Xioyang L. It's not all fault as guess they you have a bad day. She forgot to say thanks.

user_reviews_extended.Name: bk kim
user_reviews_extended.Description: manager and workers are incredibly rude and impatient and messed up my order and said the plate was $7.60 but i ended up paying $14. okay i got a drink and eggrole which was like $3 extra, but they said i got 3 entrees and 2 sides now and they charged extra for my entrees when i thought the plate came with it. so my food should’ve been no more than $12. i know $2 isn’t much, but as a high school teenager with no job $2 means a lot and they were very rude to me when i let them know of my situation. i also wasn’t finished with ordering and i wanted something but they scooped it on before i even finished what i was saying. i would like to say i will never be back here again. i strongly recommend not to come here.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Yelena Izgiyaev
user_reviews_extended.Description: It’s my first experience in this place in Frisco and for me this is last time. I don’t like very big portions, but this time it was minimum of minimum, half of half bowl noodles and 3-4 orange chicken. We asked take away and personal did not put forks and cookies with wishes.

user_reviews_extended.Name: RICK FUGATE
user_reviews_extended.Description:
App is dificult to use, even after you can get it downloaded. Gave up placing an order by app yesterday and foolishly tried to call about 15 min. before noon. I guess they were not taking orders by phone. They just dropped their phone on a counter so I could be entertained by hearing workers filing orders in the background. When I arrived 20 min later, they were BUZY. Sorry I went. They were out of many dishes and cooking everything. Anyone desperate enough to try and order here around noon on Friday, should take a diet day.
Great food! Terrible app! (Can't use gift cards or free entry tickets, or even order for pick up and pay then.). OFTEN, out of popular items you might really want and cannot solve this problem.
Their success, our loss. Just don't go at mealtime and take home your lukewarm food to mic when wanted.

user_reviews_extended.Name: cirilo reyes
user_reviews_extended.Description:
They ask for charity & to round up, I wish they paid the same attention to the clients order. I have to ask for a fork, and this location doesn't give you a fortune cookie !!!!!!!!!!!
I come for food, not for charity. Please pay attention to the clients' requests.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Geneva Roberts
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very friendly staff. Restaurant clean and neat. Not busy so easy to navigate. Orange chicken is a family favorite, I asked for freshly cooked and the team was very diligent and made for me in about 20 minutes.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Karina Medina
user_reviews_extended.Description: How on earth do they not have chicken with broccoli???? The waitress rushed us to order because although they close at 11pm on a Saturday she proceeds to tell us they decided to clean up earlier!! Excuse us customers who believe we can get something to eat before the place closes. They should post they take their last orders 45 mins before closing. This was my first time and last time coming here. I didn't even bother giving them my business.

user_reviews_extended.Name: N A
user_reviews_extended.Description: came in for lunch midday, all but 3 of the few options thet were available looked semi fresh everything else looked old. My fiance said his tasted old as well. This is the second time ive tried this location and have been disappoint ed both times. I asked the lady for something fresh all she had to offer me was orange chicken. :(

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alex Mackey
user_reviews_extended.Description: It's easy for people to say, "Panda Express is nothing special," but that belies the truth—the food here is consistently excellent, well priced, and the environment is clean and modern. This is one of the most visibly clean restaurant in Frisco, and the food selection is plentiful. Would recommend this restaurant for anyone seeking Chinese-inspired food around this area, Panda Express is my recommendation.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shiv1 sam1
user_reviews_extended.Description: We ordered spring rolls and they told us wait for 5 mins we waited there almost 15 mins and had to leave. We tried to approach them the workers are actually ignoring us.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dominic Lechuga
user_reviews_extended.Description: I do enjoy the place. But if your there around 3-4 or near closing. It does not taste fresh. Crunchy and overly sweet or dried out. But of the several I've tried in the Dallas area, this one does seem to be the best.

user_reviews_extended.Name: D G
user_reviews_extended.Description:
After wiping his face and mouth with his hands, the manager or owner's hand was in my food as he fixed it so I asked him to please fix another plate.  Instead of doing that simple thing he told me he did not do that.  In other words, he called a me a customer a liar.  He did not offer to fix a different plate until I began walking out.

Disgusting! So, he expected me to eat food his nasty hands were in otherwise? I will never eat there again.  Wash your nasty hands.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Génesis Méndez

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jennifer Allen
user_reviews_extended.Description: Meh. Lady meticulously counts meat chunks as though you are taking money from her family's bank account. We've had the discussion and I  argued that the display shows more than it is her "policy" to give. Lol. Often, the breaded items are dry. I've asked about gluten free items each visit and I am told YES, everything is gluten free. Lol. I know that's a miscommunication. If you order "to go", you get more food, no matter what. Even in kids meal. I've tested this. They hurry and don't count your chicken chunks! Lol. It's fast food, not authentic and sometimes cheap. I don't expect much. It is ok.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anjan Bhattrai

user_reviews_extended.Name: Daniel

i always ask my girlfriend to get some food from here. (Not anymore!)

Chow mein was burned, teriyaki chicken was alright, but kungpao chicken was not fully cooked.

Maybe new managership?
or
CEO of panda express made too much money and decide to do not care about food quality anymore?

user_reviews_extended.Description:
Do NOT buy from this location. This will be the last time we order from here. We were served raw orange chicken in our portion, which is completely unacceptable. I have a young daughter who also had a portion of the orange chicken. Thankfully I always check her food before giving it to her, but this could have been a serious issue.

I tried calling the location to let them know, but no one answered. Very disappointed with the lack of quality control and customer service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: PATRICIA DE LOS ANGELES GOMEZ NUÑEZ

title: Panda Express
description: Fast-food chain for Chinese standards, including some health-conscious options.

user_reviews.Name: J Grimes
user_reviews.Description: I came through the drive thru tonight and the young Asian man helping me was so polite and kind. Also the food was really good tonight. I know people are so quick to post negative reviews these days and for good reason as most fast food places have rude employees who can’t get your order right.  This Panda is doing things right. Will keep supporting this business.

user_reviews.Name: Justin Hershberger
user_reviews.Description:
I came kn a Wednesday night around 830pm. Once I bypassed the average AI to speak to a human, Luis came on the intercom and proceeded to be the nicest person i've ever spoke to at panda express.. this man was patient kind and very helpful when I got to the window..

I hope ownership or leadership reads this and praises.This man, because I had already left two fast food restaurants.Because of the quality of drive through service and filing complaints on them. Luis was awesome

user_reviews.Name: john mine (chenchedBird319)
user_reviews.Description:
Upon entering Panda Express, I was immediately greeted by Jack’s warm smile and kind, welcoming eyes. His positive energy set the tone for the entire visit, making me feel comfortable and valued as a customer. Jack worked with great professionalism and enthusiasm, handling every order with speed, accuracy, and care. Even though the restaurant was busy, he stayed calm, polite, and focused, ensuring that everyone received excellent service.

Jack went above and beyond to make sure my meal was perfect. He made thoughtful recommendations, double-checked my order, and served my food neatly and quickly. What stood out most was his genuine kindness and dedication—he clearly takes pride in his work and truly enjoys helping people.

It’s rare to meet someone who brings that level of energy and commitment to their job, but Jack does it effortlessly. He represents Panda Express in the best way possible: through great service, a positive attitude, and genuine care for every customer. Thanks to Jack, my visit was one of the best I’ve ever had, and I’ll definitely be coming back.

user_reviews.Name: Nancy Arellano
user_reviews.Description:
The moment I stepped into Panda Express, I was welcomed by Jack’s warm smile and bright, friendly eyes. His kindness and professionalism immediately stood out, creating a positive atmosphere that made my visit memorable from the start. Jack greeted me with genuine enthusiasm and treated every customer with respect and care. Despite the busy rush, he remained patient, attentive, and completely focused on delivering excellent service.

Jack’s attention to detail was outstanding. He made helpful suggestions, double-checked my order, and ensured my food was served neatly and exactly how I wanted it. His efficiency and cheerful attitude made everything run smoothly. It’s clear that Jack takes real pride in his work—something you don’t see every day.

Employees like Jack truly represent what great service should be. His dedication, positive energy, and genuine care for others reflect the best qualities of Panda Express. Because of him, my visit was exceptional, and I’ll absolutely be returning again.

user_reviews.Name: Raelynn Garner
user_reviews.Description:
Tried to get take out via drive thru the other night. They changed to an AI order taking thing, which was barely tolerable but accurately took our order. The voice was flat and harsh.

The 1-star part is that the AI voice insisted repeatedly that we move forward when there was a line of cars in the drive through, screaming at us every few seconds non-stop. Rolling up the windows helped but it was so loud and piercing that we drove off for our sanity.

user_reviews.Name: E Berrios
user_reviews.Description: We decided to stop at Panda Express for dinner and were very impressed with their Kung-Pao chicken.  Not only was it reasonably spicy, but it had an interesting twist in that the chicken was smoked.  Joshua was also helpful and attentive and did a good job in helping us.

user_reviews.Name: Jon Thomas
user_reviews.Description: Good food. Not as many selections as other locations.

user_reviews.Name: Heather Marie Driscoll
user_reviews.Description: Love lobe love Panda Express. The food tastes so fresh, and I never could complain on anything I have ordered and gotten from Panda Express. Highly recommend and will continue to rave on the delicious and healthy dishes here

user_reviews_extended.Name: J Grimes
user_reviews_extended.Description: I came through the drive thru tonight and the young Asian man helping me was so polite and kind. Also the food was really good tonight. I know people are so quick to post negative reviews these days and for good reason as most fast food places have rude employees who can’t get your order right.  This Panda is doing things right. Will keep supporting this business.
