user_reviews_extended.Name: mr laundry
user_reviews_extended.Description: Stopped by Panda Express around noon to grab food for my crew we’re hungry painters on the go, so it was awesome to get in and out quickly. Brian the manager was amazing! Super friendly and on top of everything, and his team was just as great. Super organized, helpful, and the customer service was spot on. Really appreciated how smooth everything went. Thanks Brian and team!

user_reviews_extended.Name: PhotoGuy OC
user_reviews_extended.Description: Be warned that this location has an automated AI drive through ordering process. It severely got my order wrong and there was no way to correct it. When I got to the window I was able to give my corrected order directly to the manager and he was very professional, patient and friendly. The other person working the window was also great. My food was hot, fresh and delicious. One star deducted for  the not ready for prime time ordering system.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tim Lam
user_reviews_extended.Description: I placed a mobile order for a family meal and arrived at the time when the food was supposed to be ready. I waited at the window for a good 10 minutes. Then a worker asked me to pull forward so they could help others behind me and promised the food would be out in 3-4 minutes. I waited for another 15 minutes before someone wakes out with my order.  No apology, but I guess the food was good.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jacquelyn A
user_reviews_extended.Description: DO NOT EAT HERE!!! Raw chicken being served and they don't even care. Talked to the manager and he had no concern. He just kept offering replacement food. So many people probably ate raw chicken from this location. Not okay!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Elizabeth Disney-Fanning
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Corporate should be made aware that guests are unable to complete a feedback survey from the receipt of a pick-up order as it doesn’t provide a code, nor does the pickup receipt provide the store # to continue with a review without the survey code. The only number listed is the order number and store pos number.

But I wanted to compliment this location! My food was great, the pickup order was made quickly and ready on time, all the staff inside the store were friendly and happy, and my food was packaged perfectly (straw taped to the drink, safety seals on everything , plenty of sauces, etc).

The website is one of the better fast food / grocery websites I have used and very easy to use and convenient.

I also love that they have a fundraiser option and give codes to organizations. I was able to help contribute proceeds to an animal rescue today.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Azza Qamar
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tira was AMAZING!! She was so honest in telling me before hand that there’s wine in the chowmein as I’m a Muslim. And she made one fresh bowl for us right away!! The customer service is mind blowing! Kudos to you guys!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vivian Phan
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Worst rice ever. Seems like the oldest rice in stock. Food tastes bad. One bowl costs 6$, cheap but doesn’t really worth.
Staff are nice though.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Roxanne Cassard
user_reviews_extended.Description: I feel very sorry for the front line workers. Food was severely backed up, and lots of people were waiting for their orders. Told it would be 10 mins. 30 mins later, finally food came out. Then they got the order wrong. Front line worker tried to give us free drinks. We already had our drinks. This fiasco was at 1pm, so management should have been on top of the  need to replenish items.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Romeo
user_reviews_extended.Description:
This used to be a favorite stop with good food, but they added an infuriating AI ordering system that is plain hassle to deal with.
Bizarrely, it plays fake "keyboard typing noises" between item orders.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joe K
user_reviews_extended.Description: Usually go to the Panda Express off PGBT / Old Denton County, but today this was on the way home. Ordered food at the drive through and was told to pull ahead and wait 5 minutes for an egg roll. Fine, no big deal. 17 minutes and 4-5 other cars behind me later, no sign of my order. When I ask for my food and show the receipt, I get offered "alternatives" instead of my original order or just a full refund. Eventually got my food 30 minutes later. Staff were friendly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian Washington
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Everytime I visit this location it seems like they try to see how much meat they can’t give me!  I always come to this location and get cheated out of my hard earned money!

Give people what they pay for and stop short changing your customers! Here is a pic of my kung pao vegetables...I mean chicken.  Spoke with a manager and he told me if I wanted meat to get teriyaki chicken. If this is the case then the sign card needs to say KUNG PAO VEGETABLES, not KUNG PAO CHICKEN!

user_reviews_extended.Name: susan martin
user_reviews_extended.Description: My food was burned when I got home and saw worst ever I would like a free meal I can include a pick but it won’t let attach it

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeremy B
user_reviews_extended.Description: The AI drive thru is a huge mistake. It allows you to order things that are not on the menu, it has a looping flaw where it asks you a question but doesn't give an option to decline or go back. Then after a minute or so a real human jumps in to say they are out of a particular thing. Much easier to go inside to order.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jay Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: If you cant even put a single hot sauce when requested 8 in uber eats, how am I suppose to trust this store? A simple basic is not flowing in this store.... unbelievable

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cassandra Willams
user_reviews_extended.Description:
My rice was overcooked. Doors were locked chicken was burnt

12/ 16 2021 came back manger made food fresh and thanked me for coming back

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kriti Sub
user_reviews_extended.Description: I went through drive through for the first time. The portion was so less

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jaime Luevanos
user_reviews_extended.Description: I ordered a beef and broccoli bowl with fried rice. Basically it was just fried rice very little beef. Won’t go back for a while.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Profit Bandz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Manager Willam  rudely jumped in my order I was taking with employee  he did not want to give me any condiments for me and my kid just one pack of sauce I asked for two of each he also had new flavor shrimp I wanted to try just a sample of  the sauce he said No  he was kinda being a jerk I don’t know why . messed up my experience .

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maryiam Ahmed
user_reviews_extended.Description: Drive through and inside is not friendly at all. There was a piece of steak in my shrimp. Yuck! Not clean, unprofessional, and I didn’t get a fortune cookie!

user_reviews_extended.Name: MICHAEL Durrant
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Not the first time this has happened.  Went through the drive thru and ordered orange chicken.  Guess they were out so they gave me honey chicken which I discovered after i got home. One other time they gave me sesame chicken instead of orange chicken.
I know now to check every time.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ashley Tobias
user_reviews_extended.Description: Gave us orange chicken with no orange marinade! Ordered the walnut shrimp, only gave us 3 shrimp. Customer service was awful. Never again!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Melwin Zachariah
user_reviews_extended.Description: Never thought I will ever put a negative review on a panda express. My family and I purchased a family meal. We had our dinner about two hours ago after our dinner 30 minutes ago we have been having severe stomach ache and pain in our stomach like no other both of our tummy feels gassed up like no other to the point that we feel that the food that they gave us has gone bad. Not to mention the event an hour before they closed so I’m certain that they gave me the leftovers not to mention. They also made me wait outside to get the food for almost 25 to 30 minutes. I have had panda express for over 20 years since I have been in America. I have never had this situation before. I’m very disappointed never buying panda express ever again!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jaime Canales
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andy took our order in drive- thru. He did an excellent job with his awesome customer service.  I used to be a manager for Arby's and ran the deli at Tom Thumb and that's how I used to train my workers. Andy needs to get a raise

user_reviews_extended.Name: Peters Valadez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Andy in the drive through was amazing. Really kind and dedicated to make sure I had great customer service. Offered me a drink while I wait for my food to be ready(it was going to take 5-10minutes). Amazing job Andy, definitely felt like this was one of my better experiences I’ve had in a drive through.

user_reviews_extended.Name: brittany mannie
user_reviews_extended.Description: Josh has exceptional customer service skills  he greeted us upon entrance throughout the interaction he was patient and made sure all our needs was met and overall an outstanding worker he needs a promotion asap at the Josey and Hebron location

user_reviews_extended.Name: Long Truong
user_reviews_extended.Description: A Chinese restaurant with just a few simple dishes. Too much oil in their food.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jonathan Clark
user_reviews_extended.Description: AI ordering machine got my order wrong. I asked for steamed white rice and got chowmein noodles.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Megan
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food poisoning from the beef and broccoli and Beijing beef, as I had the super greens as my side. Horrible. And they didn’t even give you that much meat, in this case, I’m grateful or I’d probably be feeling even worse! Not worth the money or the illness - I’m going on 10+ hrs of projectile vomiting.

user_reviews_extended.Name: J
user_reviews_extended.Description: Wish they had soups but everything is great here

user_reviews_extended.Name: Hassa Weatherd
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I arrived to the establishment and the inside was in disarray. There were bottles drinks just sitting on tables. I understand that employees in this day and age are understaffed and overworked. One employee I assumed was on their lunch break. Was asleep on the table next to her food she had gotten to eat.

I order a plate. Fried rice and double orange chicken and a drink. Transaction was some what smooth and the male employee was nice.

I got my food and left. I began to eat and when I said I want fried rice and I got FRIED rice. Rice was crisper than ruffles potato chips. The crunch was louder than your moms best fried chicken. The orange was great as usual. No complaints there. Overall a 3 out of 5 ain’t bad.

user_reviews_extended.Name: 주혜영
user_reviews_extended.Description: Clean, crews are kind. Easy parking

user_reviews_extended.Name: Fayzan Keshwani
user_reviews_extended.Description: Placed a catering order. The person who took the order, Phillip, was real nice and took down the whole order including “delivery” details. Later he texted that they can’t deliver to which i agreed to. On the day of order, i called at 11 am to see if it ll be ready by 11:30 and the person confirmed. I reached panda at 11:45 and my order still needs 20 mins. I requested for the manager and James, the training manager came to talk to me. Not at all apologetic, and very aggressive behavior. I told him that i have catered from you guys 5-6 times in the past year but i wont be doing it again because of my experience and he just said “okay”.  He said that we dont take phone orders and i told him that “Phillip did take this order over the phone” to which he responded “i will talk to him - all orders need to be online”. I wish James was more apologetic to earn my future business.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alex Sagcal, MBA.
user_reviews_extended.Description: 7/24/24:  I've been fasting since 10:00 p.m. night before. I had surgery at 7:30 am.  Just got out.  After recovering,  They sent me home... But I was hungry so where did I go?  Yep, here!  My comfort food is fried rice. Yes,  I'm Asian Filipino. So my wife and I ordered some fried rice, chicken and string beans,  teriyaki chicken, & crab rangoon.  Everything tasted fantastic!  Thank you team at the restaurant for a wonderful experience and super tasty lunch after a fast overnight.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bob Brown
user_reviews_extended.Description: Always a consistent experience.  My go to is the orange chicken with lo mein

user_reviews_extended.Name: E J Hoffer
user_reviews_extended.Description: Second Sunday in a row where they were out of ingredients due to supply issues. Had to wait 10 minutes for the crispy almond chicken. Worth the wait. Friendly staff with great customer service. Last week they charged me for a kids meal instead of the 3-entree plate I ordered and received. It was an apology for having limited menu offerings. This week they slipped in a small box of orange chicken because of the wait. Will definitely go back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Doug Washington
user_reviews_extended.Description: The drive thru experience was very smooth. I was the only car in the line, so I can't speak to how they are during rush hour traffic. The person taking the orders was very polite, and everything was right when it came out at the window. As you see from the pictures, the food looks excellent and tasted even better! 5 stars for this trip.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael
user_reviews_extended.Description: Just like most Panda Express locations, this one is extremely clean. Even the parking lot is well kept. Service here has rarely come with a side of a good attitude as of late which would usually lead to a lower number of stars in this review, however, my experience today with Jeana in the drive through was exceptional. She had a line forming behind me as I got to the window and still took a moment to connect with me there simply human to human. The interaction was very quick, but she felt very genuine in the moment as she wished me a good day. 5 stars for hopefully turning over a new leaf and hiring more employees like Jeana.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ronnie Williams
user_reviews_extended.Description:
It's amazing just how downhill this restaurant has gone. The food is so bad and so old that this point it's cheating people by taking their money. Today the Teriyaki chicken was not cooked, it was raw. The rice was old and hard. Rather than replace it, since it's gone passed its shelf life, they keep selling it. When the container of food was urgently passed through the window it was sideways, and partly opened in the bag.

I called to try and resolve the issue, but no answer. I won't be returning to this establishment.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tom OConnell
user_reviews_extended.Description: Panda Express, a reliable choice for consistently easy and delicious meals. The new AI ordering system adds a modern touch, ensuring accuracy in every order. Freshness is a constant, and the efficient service keeps those lines moving seamlessly. A satisfying experience that keeps you coming back for more.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mike S.
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Tasty food & generous serving size.

However, a much less than friendly Server.

And the fried rice serving bowl was down to the last serving (mine).  Right after she filled my order, she called out for a fried rice refill, and they literally walked right over with a fresh batch, and poured it into the serving bowl as I was paying.

Why wouldn't she have asked me if I would mind waiting about a minute, to get fresh, moist, fried rice?   She didn't care.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kathryn Bourne
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very disappointed every time! Stop using DoorDash! Only 11/12 rangoons delivers and drink missing…And no sauce for the rangoons that were delivered…even though I specifically requested it with my order. Now the staff at Panda Express won’t answer. Why do we just expected to deal with this horrible service?!

user_reviews_extended.Name: isaac g
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I order take outs only. Paid premium for steak but portion is always very small (about a scoop). Food is hit or miss, if you're lucky, you get hot food, otherwise everything is a sloppy mess and the rice is hard as rock.
But the last straw was when I ordered a bigger plate with two premiums the other day to get only one of them. If that wasn't bad enough, they decided to charge me TWICE, for the price of TWO premium entrees. Best of all, the restaurant wasn't even that busy.

Edit:
Brought the issue to a shift manager the other day and received a meal for the extra amount charged.

Edit 2.0:
Got the same problem again one month later and somehow service managed to get even worse. Will not come back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Richard Nichols
user_reviews_extended.Description: My family and I have eaten here many times before.  However, we've noticed the quality of food/service has been declining over time.  The last few times, the food was dry and salty (like having set out for some time).  Almost every time we go, at least a couple of the food selections are out so we either have to wait for it to be cooked or choose something else.  The last time we went, we didn't even stay because my wife saw a worker come out of the women's bathroom without even washing their hands.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Melissa Clark
user_reviews_extended.Description: Every time we come they are out of something…orange chicken, white rice, mushroom chicken. Better planning needs to occur on when to get good cooked. We have left the drive thru that last 3 times we went because they were out of food.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Zackhary Delos Reyes
user_reviews_extended.Description: I usually really like this location. Clean spot, quick service... I went to this location and got there at 9:33. They close the restaurant at 9:30 and open the drive thru until 10pm. That’s fine . I ordered a bowl with honey walnut shrimp and they gave me a kids meal instead of a bowl. It had 4 pieces of shrimp and a couple spoonfuls of fried rice .. unfortunately I didn’t notice this until I got home and was extremely disappointed... they charged me for a bowl.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Taylor Olszewski
user_reviews_extended.Description: We live locally and come to this panda often. We are always welcomed warmly and receive prompt service. The food is fresh and the employees work hard. Jane is an outstanding employee and goes above and beyond. She is extremely polite and helpful, making sure customers are satisfied. The seating area is clean and well kept.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alexander Davis
user_reviews_extended.Description:
This one is using an Ai assistant

And dispite being taken over by a person my order was still wrong

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michelle Lamm - Faries
user_reviews_extended.Description: They had their 35th anniversary special - orange chicken for 35 cents. However, you can't get it by going to the business. You had to order from their app which doesn't work.  Don't waste your time here.  Just go across the street to China One, get yourself a nice huge meal and eat half now and take the other half for lynch tomorrow.  Yes, it is a lot of food and really good for the price!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stephanie Delinois
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered in the app and was ready when I arrived and the food was hot and delicious as usual.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cindy Rose (TexasGal)
user_reviews_extended.Description: I used the drive through so I can not comment about the atmosphere.  I would like to note that I was never offered teriyaki or soy sauce with my meal by the drive thru attendant and neither was present in my order bag when I checked it on way home.  Portions were also smaller than usual.  So 2 strikes against them today.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Wenhan Huang
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Package order without checking the size,
All the large entrees only give me small size

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alejandra Rivera
user_reviews_extended.Description: I like this place. Fresh and good tasting food. Good atmosphere and clean lobby. Reasons why I am not rating 5 stars is because they do not have booster seats/high chairs. Staff needs a little work on customer service skills.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jose Medina
user_reviews_extended.Description: Theres a 15 minute wait line in the evening. Drive thru only. If you’re hungry, you will not be happy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: jessica lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food here is usually always good but the customer service is kinda iffy. Just depends on the day and who's working the window. I come here very often and there's a young (i believe Mexican) lady and gentlemen and they're both always pleasant and nice but every now and then there's a asian lady working the window with a kinda heavy accent and she's pretty rude. She's been rude to me on three different occasions now. I'm usually not someone to write up reviews on anyone but her customer service is not good and should be brought to attention. On this particular night 5/15 I came through the drive through to order as usual and she had a very annoyed tone to her voice as if she didn't want to take my order. As she was taking my order she kept talking over me in an attempt to shut me up. I just feel like if you're having a bad day you should'nt take it out on your customers. I work at starbucks and we're trained to always be happy, friendly, and welcoming so being treated like that makes me never want to return again which is inconvenient as it's the closest location to my home. I hope this location will put more care into training their employees to be more friendly and welcoming.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Antonio Boloniano
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Try the Panda Nuggets. They taste just like chicken.

As of March, 2022, the masks are gone, the prices have gone up, the menu selection has contracted. Outside the store is a sign on which the advertised hourly wage is $12 for servers and $14 for cooks.  Food, labor and utilities costs are going up. Panda Distress.

The coronavirus plandemic, supply chain disruptions and labor shortages have really impacted this restaurant negatively.

Make your selections very carefully and check your receipts.  On a recent visit, I was overcharged slightly, by only $0.50.  the man taking my order had separated items into an a la carte order, instead of combining items into a "larger meal."

After my tasty meal, I approached the counter and requested a refund. The manager told me that I had ordered improperly, that my two entree plate plus egg roll could only be considered a "larger meal" if I had ordered it that way.  I asked her what had changed, that I had always ordered a two entree meal plus egg roll and only recently have they begun to fail to ring it up as a "larger meal."

The manager argued with me that egg rolls were not an entree and could not be included on a 3 entree larger meal. In turn, I pointed out that my receipt showed egg rolls as an "entree."

I showed the manager my receipt and she begrudgingly refunded me 50 cents, crunched my receipt into a little ball and requested that I never again ask for a refund.  Perhaps she was having a bad day.  Perhaps she is under extraordinary pressure to increase profits.

I believe many restaurants are under increasing pressure from their food suppliers and from labor costs. As their costs are going up, they are reluctant to pass those increased costs on to the customers in the form of higher prices.  Wherefore, nickel and diming customers or refusing to take coupons may be come the norm.

Order carefully and check your receipts.

user_reviews_extended.Name: My Point Of View
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Food was good as always. I do miss however my favorite dish that has been removed from the menu, which is pepper chicken.  They suggest pepper beef, and sorry it was not as good.

Sorry no photos, we were too hungry.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jaye Navarro
user_reviews_extended.Description: Staff is very nice and helpful. Lots of people in the reviews are saying things like it's slow or complaining because they're out of something. It's a Chinese restaurant, food takes time to cook and it takes time to make orders. And if you go to any job you are allowed to have a break so you can eat.

user_reviews_extended.Name: S Tesfazghi
user_reviews_extended.Description: This place I been going to for over 10 years and wow it used to awesome the only problem was waiting in line but it was worth it now the food is not the same the attitude of the employees is rude you don't even get a napkin anymore, the prices went up  but the food decreased and the service and its so empty I sometimes wonder if they are open today is my last time to. I got to find a new location cause I love their orange chicken and chaw main.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Terri Hayley
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food was pretty good. It was so difficult ordering. Took about 10 minutes to order 3 people's food. Then, they didn't get it right when I got up to the window and had to sit there for another 10-15 minutes. It took so long. Didn't get the right order after all. It was after 8:30 at night, so I didn't think they'd be slammed.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christine Snyder (Snyder's Carpet Care)
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Man, this is tough.  I had to return my entire meal today bc the rice smelled of mildew.  This made me nervous to eat anything else.  As we came back, another patron said the same thing.  The guy behind the counter said it was a bad batch, well then why did it get served.  2nd then I over heard the same guy tell the other guy helping him cook to go wash the rice.  No!
The smell was like all the dishes had been washed with a dirty dish rag if you know that smell.

The people were nice and returned our money.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Wesley Williams
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ok don't get it wrong the food is good but come on now for the price that we pay our plates is crazy when yall giving us one damn scoop I mean barely a scoop is so crazy to me I'm done with panda yall gotta do better seriously

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alan Veloz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Aiden took my order really fast and when I ordered a drink he had me double check if it was good because it was out of syrup so might be flat. He immediately offered me an alternative and made my experience so great. Aiden provided top tier customer service!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Justin Babb
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Rosa the manager was very rude when I tried to return a plate of very old orange chicken. She needs training on handling customer concerns. Quote of hers…”lower your tone, you’re in my house right now”
She didn’t want to refund me but eventually did after an unnecessary argument.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kay K
user_reviews_extended.Description: fried rice wasn't cooked all the way and soggy. also had a bad smell like being in a rice cooker for long time. orange chicken tasted old and soggy too. worst panda express ever. how come franchise food tastes different from other location.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jose Hdez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Clean location, courteous and expeditious team members. Always asked about samples of new recipes. Considerably low noise (compared to other locations). Good floor layout with patio option. Overall, a good express good option (personal top three).

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marcus J
user_reviews_extended.Description: One of the worst panda’s I’ve been to. I gave them a chance despite many bad reviews and sure enough they live up to the expectations of serving poor quality food. Orange chicken was inedible; dried out and extremely chewy however  they still served it to me anyway. Workers seemed unengaged and unenthusiastic about their jobs and it reflects in the food. They must be in competition with The Colony Panda Express for worst Panda of all time. The servers don’t wear gloves even though they are manning the cash register as well and we’re in the midst of a pandemic. I wouldn’t be surprised if someone gets food poisoning. I hope corporate comes to rescue both Josey Panda as well as The Colony 121 Panda because they both have done me a disservice on more than one occasion.Beware if you try them out.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nicole Richard
user_reviews_extended.Description: Came here to compliment one of the managers at this Panda Express location.  I was eating here with my children when a man can came in the restaurant and asked for some food of any kind because he was walking and didn’t have any money.  When many places would turn someone like this away, Anshe the manager on duty gave this man a free meal.   He was very appreciative, and I was truly touched by her generosity.  Great job Panda Express!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sergio
user_reviews_extended.Description: Came here around 3pm, apparently the two women working here have no customer service skills took them 10mins to acknowledge my presence , it was busy, and there was one worker in the corner Im assuming on break. They were fast with the drive thru orders but slow with the orders inside. I was the first one inside and I spent about 10mins waiting/standing since you can’t even dine in. Every other restaurant you can dine inside but not this one, who ever is managing this place needs to be re-trained. Now I know to never come inside.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ricky Ker
user_reviews_extended.Description: The portions are lacking. If you get a entree with veggies in it, you'll get more veggies then protein. Cho mein was mostly cabbage and a minimal amount of noodles. Even the Dr. pepper was flat. Everytime I tell myself I won't go here again, I do and then regret it all over again lol.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ronald Williams
user_reviews_extended.Description: I ordered through the drive through and got the 2 meat plate i got orange chicken and pepper steak with half chowmein and half fried rice. There was seriously an embarrassing amount of steak. There was 4 pieces and the chowmain was barly filled if they dont make it in front of you expect to get shorted. What I got for over $10 was horrible. Never again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brittany Trujillo
user_reviews_extended.Description: Thoroughly unimpressed. I went through the drive through to get my food but when I checked the reciept my order was wrong so I had to go inside to tell them. I had to wait while other customers got their food when I had already paid. Then once my order was corrected and I got i found multiple hairs in my food. I called to get a refund but denied it and could only give me store credit for the one item that had the hair. I then called other stores to see if they did refunds and they said they did. I had a very bad experience and won't be returning again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amy Gonzalez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Just left I ordered Orange chicken with fried rice & chow mein ... The chicken was cold and stale hard to chew and was definitely left over chicken from yesterday that was just covered with more orange sauce. The chow mein was cold and hard. I would have taken it back but I got it in drive thru and was too far by the time I tried it. Really upset that I spent almost $9 for this.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jessica Lister
user_reviews_extended.Description: Not consistent. I keep giving this place a lot of second chances. They had a coupon for buy a bowl get a bowl. My mom & I ordered the same thing with Kung Pao chicken. We had to wait several minutes for the Kung Pao chicken to be ready. The server put the old soggy & dried bits of the previous Kung Pao chicken on top & then proceeded to give us new & old Kung Pao chicken after we waited. Got home & it tasted as such & the fried rice was broken & had hard clumps.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Carlos
user_reviews_extended.Description: I came here around 8:30 pm . They had 2 entrées availability, no super greens and the stuff looked angry because we walked in . I asked when they close and she they said 9 when the online says 9:30pm. I don’t care if they close at 7 or whenever they chose to do so but please don’t mislead people with wrong information. Some other people showed up and they were denied . Horrible business practice.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kathy Sechrist
user_reviews_extended.Description: Their bowls and plates really give you the ability to customize your order. I love the half fried rice with half super greens and green bean chicken. Fresh and delicious!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sean Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: It is 8:40 pm and I jus partially ate my food and I am not satisfied. I can tell by the stale rice and cold chicken that they did not intend to make anything fresh for customers that came this late. I work in the food business that involves a buffet and i always make sure the buffet is hot and fresh, no matter what! The customers that come to your resturant are the reason you have a pay check! This Panda Express closes in an hour and 20 minutes. There is no excuse why my food tastes so bad. Normally when I come here, I enjoy it. But not this time. Gotta do better! Won't be going back anytime soon. Recommend the readers of this do the same.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Daniel SM
user_reviews_extended.Description: The worst experience! They closed they’re dining room at 8pm and you can see a bunch of staff just eating and doing nothing. I was hungry so I decided to use the drive thru! Bad decision. took over 40 minutes to have something waiting in the line. This restaurant really needs an audit the staff is rude and lazy!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ren Varghese
user_reviews_extended.Description: Very Disappointment with service. I purchased a Family Feast and found out that one  entree was missing after I got back home...I live around 8 miles away. I tried to reach them via call atleast 10 times and nobody picked up.The next day I called and spoke to their Manager who didnt even want to assist. SHe said, just come back and get it...I was like....is this how  someone should respond for causing inconvenience to a customer!!!!!..  Anyways I went back yesterday and she gave the entree that I didnt get, with an attitude like I did something wrong and gave only 3/4th portion Very bad customer service!!!!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Adilene M
user_reviews_extended.Description:
It’s Panda Express so you want go wrong. Prices have gone up so don’t come as often but it’s fine for nights you don’t feel like cooking.

Not super busy so you move pretty quick in line through the drive through. We’ve been inside and it’s well kept and clean.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Truly Hollis
user_reviews_extended.Description: I went to panda express for a pick up order on friday dec 23rd and again another black person jim crow racial profile 2.0 tactic happen. a female named holly approached me and asked me how can she help. which i said that I am here to pick up an order.  Suddenly  she just turned a walked away while the order was right next to her. I asked the manager to hand me the order and he did. No apology from Holly means that she did it out of spike with silence.  this is becoming more common by the day with these companies so they have to be put on notice publicly from a legal stand point since these managers will not discipline there employees. no apology is needed unless this person is removed from her position. this happen between the hours of 11:30 and 1pm. Your video will show your company this incident.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rosy River
user_reviews_extended.Description:
16 minute drive thru wait in an empty drive thru.
Arrived today at 5:45 pm in the drive thru to order a to go order-the teriyaki chicken was not available and involved a 10 minute wait. I waited in an empty drive thru line for 16 minutes....16 minutes in a drive thru really? They were also limited on bottled drinks. Just seems like they didnt anticipate people coming here for dinner

user_reviews_extended.Name: Heather Hallberg
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is my first time eating here and Im really disappointed. Dont waste your money on this white people version asian food. The food was dry and overcooked. The crab rangoons were burnt and the cream cheese was gross. You think your getting your moneys worth but you get diddly squat portions. The lo-mein....nasty...its was more like thin ramen noodles and again over cooked.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sheera DivaNae
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was impressed with the accuracy & ease of this visit but questioned why I couldn't receive the type of service a few days before & every time. Upon leaving a 4 day stay at Baylor Carrollton all I craved was Panda Express but when we got home there was NO RICE in my rice dish. How?! How do u forget that?! Just chicken & veggies! I literally had to make my own brown rice while weak, exhausted & on pain meds. And for some reason, they thought I was about to make a trip back up there that night! No Ma'am....this location has lost my business for sure & I'm honestly doubting other locations!  Just kinda over Panda Express at this point!! Too little too late!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Karen Castillo
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have been coming here for a few years now and i have always liked their customer service. They had a young gentleman working and he was very friendly and nice. Today i went and the lady at the Drive thru (Melissa) was very rude. I understand we are going through some rough times but honestly there is no need to be rude. Very disappointed

user_reviews_extended.Name: Darrick Little
user_reviews_extended.Description: I go to panda express alot I am a truck driver so have been to one's in different states this one gives you small portions and still pay the same money I would go to a different one if you want to getvtoyr money's worth

user_reviews_extended.Name: Adam Crawford
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food quality is really poor at this location, nothing is made correctly and the food is bland. There’s no flavor. And besides that the service is bad too. When the gal at the window took our order, she sighed first. Never again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Valerie Harrison
user_reviews_extended.Description: The worst I've ever tasted in Carrollton area . I ordered crab rangoon and got nothing but sheel . There were no crab filling on the inside. We ordered egg rolls and they gave us spring rolls . Than told me that they don't sell egg rolls.  Just terrible. Not go and will not be doing business with them ever again  !!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Scott P
user_reviews_extended.Description: I'm just not a big fan of Panda Express in general. Other family members absolutely love it, so maybe it's me. I just don't like it that much. Fast food oriental just isn't my thing.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rí
user_reviews_extended.Description: Service has slowly declined and gotten worse. I used to love this location however some staff members need retraining and some lunch/ dinner wait times take excessively too long it’s just disappointing really they could be doing their jobs better.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Patrick
user_reviews_extended.Description: I presented an E-GIFT CARD that was on my phone because it's ELECTRONIC GIFT CARD, it was given by family for last years birthday. An Asian female manager called me a fraudster because she is unknowledgeable of Panda Express's form of payment processes. She, "Accused my gift card Fraud, asked where I got the picture and told me they could not take it because they were unsure if it was real or not". I've never been SO insulted, I am even more furious because the manager was unwilling to try until she saw me get upset. How rude of you to accuse me of being a criminal, not giving effort towards your customers until they get upset? What is that? PIss Poor leadership and manager skills. Just another reason not to go to Panda and only another reason to express the horrible experience with others!!!!! How rude!!!!!!!!!!!Embarrassing!!!! Insulting!!!!!! I can't believe I was discriminated today.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lais McKinney
user_reviews_extended.Description: Went to the drive thru about 40-50 minutes before they closed, when we were ordering our food they said they only had 3 shrimps so I said I would wait for more but for my surprise they said their kitchen was already closed! I just left without ordering anything... Went back there after a few days at the same time and surprisingly the kitchen was still open so I guess the Thursday crew is lazy. My tip, don't go there on Thursdays...

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kimberly Willis
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food is always hot and fresh, but don't expect the service you get to be good. Everytime I've been the cashier has been in a horrible mood.

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Spitzer
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was driving by and smelled something delicious, so I had to stop and get some of whatever it was they were cooking. It turned out to be the Beijing Beef and it was delicious! Super fast and courteous. I recommend this location.

user_reviews_extended.Name: andrew lucas
user_reviews_extended.Description: I don't know why online orders take so long, it's not like there are a ton of menu choices but every single time I've come to pick up my order it hasn't been ready AND I got their later than the time they told me. The food is good but the prices are high.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kaytlyn Marie
user_reviews_extended.Description: Yuushoo Huang is the rudest most selfish manager! Even in this time of crisis shorting people on their family orders so her check can be fatter 😡 I ordered a family order first time it was great second time she gave us different containers which was waaaayyy smaller portions also they told they had no beef and Judi was rude at the drive and was upset that she had to bring my order to my car . Not to mention I had to re make this review because I have had issues with yuushoo in the past.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Hill

title: Panda Express
description: Fast-food chain for Chinese standards, including some health-conscious options.

user_reviews.Name: Jose Bandong
user_reviews.Description: This resto is good for a quick bite. The food was warm and the selection was varied. The interior was bright and well designed. We ordered a plate and a bowl. The orange chicken was tasty and paired well with the fried rice. The plate came with sides.

user_reviews.Name: X Tal
user_reviews.Description: Food was great, so it was awesome. The place looked nice. I love the panda lights on the island with the high chairs. Ps liked the music 🎶

user_reviews.Name: Joey Pauga
user_reviews.Description:
I was in and out quickly even with a lot of people there. Furthermore, one of the young men that served my lunch was very welcoming. He smiled and asked how my day was going. A very simple thing but it's the small things that always count.

This location was clean and tidy. There is an outside eating area with retractable umbrellas. It's a good location and the service was great.

Since all Pandas sell the same thing, I usually look at the service and the physical location as a base of my review.

user_reviews.Name: Hali Wood
user_reviews.Description:
Last night around 9pm, my sister and I went through the drive-thru at this location. She had the green bean chicken with lo mein noodles and super greens, while I had the honey walnut shrimp with one of the steak options and super greens. Unfortunately, around 5am, my sister woke up vomiting, and I strongly suspect it was from her meal. We ate the same meals prior to this trip with no issues, so it seems likely that it came from the chicken. My meal was fine.

Another issue was the AI speaker box. I asked for a moment to look over the menu before ordering, but it immediately pestered me with questions like, "what can I add to your plate..." etc, and didn't stop, so I had to roll up my window. Once a human attendant spoke, the ordering process was smooth and pleasant. I really don't think artificial intelligence should be replacing human interactions like this.

Hope this feedback helps improve the experience. Thanks for reading!

user_reviews.Name: Ana Khalil
user_reviews.Description: Marco Escobar had amazing customer service. He came on the speaker while I was ordering with the AI bot and informed me of a two minute wait instead of just surprising me with one. Then when I got to the window to pay he offered me a drink for the wait. His customer service is top tier! Panda, you have a true gem on your hands!

user_reviews.Name: Random “Random” Blueper
user_reviews.Description: The noodles were very dry with almost no colour or sauce at all in them. The rice was undercooked. The food items not as good as other stores. The orange chicken was soggy. Didn’t enjoy

user_reviews.Name: Blanca de la Garza
user_reviews.Description: STOP USING AI. We were trying to place a drive through order and the machine kept adding extra plates and wouldn’t register when we said to take it off. An employee intervened and helped us. (Which should have been that way from the beginning) stop trying to replace human jobs with machines

user_reviews.Name: Mr. Frawsy
user_reviews.Description: Food was good but the Uncooked fortune cookie w Mold in it ruined it for me
