user_reviews_extended.Name: DZL
user_reviews_extended.Description: just want to say how happy i am about daniel’s service here amazing customer service and attitude and willingness to help I needed my reciept for a work expense and threw it away on accident josh and keeren went out of their way to go back in the day and find that paper for me regardless of how busy they were i want to say thanks! amazing service !

user_reviews_extended.Name: Valerie
user_reviews_extended.Description: I never leave reviews, but the customer service here was 10/10. They brought out fresh fried rice when I chose that entree, offered samples of the new drinks, which I ended up getting, and were generous with the sauces. Super friendly staff.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Revant Ranjan
user_reviews_extended.Description:
This is my go to Panda Express location, and they consistently go above and beyond for their customers. One time, after placing a drive-thru order, my food wasn’t immediately ready, and the team took about 7-8 minutes to prepare it fresh. Instead of just apologizing, they invited me inside, offered a complimentary drink, and made sure I left happy.

That kind of thoughtful gesture shows their real commitment to customer satisfaction.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Auldrick Brown
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food was clearly presented and menu simple and easy to follow. Staff pleasant and efficient. Easy to mix options and create your plate, vegetable options also included, and food tasted fresh. Good Chinese style fast food

user_reviews_extended.Name: Milind Singh
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I placed an order for a bowl of chicken and rice, but regrettably, the rice was undercooked, nearly raw, which left me dissatisfied with this significant oversight.

I reported the problem to Uber Eats on March 24, but it seems they have not shown concern regarding the issue.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Isaac Doggett
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've always enjoyed Panda Express food, but when the app sent my order to this location (which is strange because I've never order from there and live in a different county) I called to cancel the order and was told by an associate that I may see a refund tonight and if not it would post in 3-5 days. Then the manager called me back to say they don't do refunds on app orders and "it was already made so it's a loss" and she offered to let me save my receipt and come in at a later date and show it to get my meal.

Not sure how "it's a loss" if you're able to make the same meal 2xs at the same price but aren't willing to refund my purchase. The only loss that occurred was my money. But I'm sure in a few weeks when I make it down to that county I can show them a screen shot on my phone and I'll get the food that was paid for!

I really couldn't be less happy with how this was handled.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tijuanna Battle
user_reviews_extended.Description: Today my teriyaki chicken was awful. This was the 1st time in the last 2 times that I've been by the Panda on Montfort that they actually had it. My chicken was almost raw and cut in BIG hunks and had a lot of fat on them. I didn't hv time to tk it back so I tried to call and of course I didn't get an answer. I'm am totally disappointed.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rameen Taherzadeh
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The Kung Pao chicken was not spicy, even in the slightest....
on the other hand panda express in college station  - - the kung pao chicken was so spicy I called my chinese friend to tell him about it

FIX YOUR RECIPE

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jimmy Dutch
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ive been coming here for past couple weeks just moved into area and my past experiences were good. Today however I felt like I was being dismissed when I ordered. I asked the girl serving me to please not add so much vegetables in noodles and beef. In the past the server gave me minimum amounts of vegetables. Today the server I felt like she just brushed me off when I asked her and proceeded to give me way more vegetables with my food. I understand it is mixed but she could've put a little effort in.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rebeka Tóth
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food used to be better and the service could be nicer. However, still good value for money and the orange chicken doesnt disappoint! The serving was quite big for me (ordered a plate), couldnt finish it at once.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sergio P.
user_reviews_extended.Description: Had the orange chicken with rice and it is delicious and tasty, will come back to this place again. Clean and well organized with outside tables.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lee Lee
user_reviews_extended.Description: This was my first time here. The Lady was very respectful and patient as we figured out what we wanted. Will recommend

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brittany Watson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Went through drive through on my lunch break, made it back to work and this is what I had. How do you see this and still give it to a customer? Called back and the manager was pleasant and apologetic and willing to refund me. Other than this, every other experience at a Panda Express has been pleasant.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Randy Thathapudi
user_reviews_extended.Description: Went in to get a plate.. half n half.. they filled the plate with rice with a very little chow mein… the rice was not cooked fully.. and the orange chicken was too sweet n greasy.. bad experience..

user_reviews_extended.Name: T Shire
user_reviews_extended.Description: The day shift manager is rude and disrespectful I visited her twice and she stated I come all the time at this point she will lie as well I went back to go shopping in the area and the ambulance and fire department was present and she was setting at the door on the ground crying I wonder what happened next poor service at this point food caused ambulance and fire department to come out 10-28-2025

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Lara
user_reviews_extended.Description: I come to panda often but this time the person in front viviana was so rude to us and to person next to us we don’t understand why although the cashier was so nice I understand we have our bad days but still that’s not the way to treat people food was good tho

user_reviews_extended.Name: Castillo Verito27
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food was good, but it was hot inside, probably AC wasn't working properly, it happens. Overall Good!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brende Mendoza
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is absolutely ridiculous! We have been coming to this location for 8 years and this placed literally ripped me off the entree. I ordered shrimp and beef. The filled the bottom layer with beef and put shrimp on top of that. Definitely will not be coming back

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mike Patterson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Had to wait for them to make more of something I ordered in the driver threw had to wait an extra five minutes but gave me and my crew free drinks

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vanessa Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love this place, we go here alot. My daughter and I just went here Thur.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sire Lando
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The Panda Express (Mumford location immediately struck me with the impeccable cleanliness and efficiency of the establishment. A charming associate, Naka, went above and beyond in ensuring that I felt like a valued customer. Her meticulous attention to detail was evident as she took the time to explain the nuances of various dishes, making sure I had all the information I needed.

Equally impressive was Maria, the cashier/associate, who made the payment process a breeze. It's not often that you encounter someone who can turn a simple transaction into an engaging and friendly conversation. In an age where genuine customer service seems to be waning, Maria's warm pleasantries, coupled with her radiant smile, truly made my Friday night.

All in all, for anyone looking for a quick bite to eat without compromising on cleanliness, efficiency, or stellar customer service, Panda Express is the place to be!  Thank you to Naka, Maria and the entire Panda Express team at this Mumford location!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marahya Mora
user_reviews_extended.Description: The drive through was pretty fast and the food came out as ordered. Didn’t get any soy sauce packets though

user_reviews_extended.Name: Natalia Gamez
user_reviews_extended.Description: The girl working the drive through was rude and kept interrupting us, we ordered a plate and got fried rice with broccoli beef and orange chicken and they didn’t put the orange chicken. Terrible service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: jeremy robbinz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Perhaps not after tonight..This is by far my most favorite Panda Express! I usually eat here on avg 2 nights a week. Tonight, Oct 1st 2018 I'm getting my usual and while standing at the check out I glance back towards the front of the line and something caught my eye...  sure enough it kept happening and what it was ...  I'm not sure is safe .. for food or anythi g else...  the 3rd light fixture above (just after the fried rice) was dripping water..  I'd say 1 drop  every 2 or 3 seconds ... steady. Couldn't tell if it was landing on food or not but this is definitely concerning....  panda please fix this. Only reason I even saw it was because the way the lighting was as it fell. 3rd recessed can light above at the beginning of the line. 5 stars for visibility

user_reviews_extended.Name: amen okansai
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is a 0 star but just wanna say that service is terrible ordered a plate with brocoli beef fried rice and the shrimp on the box and gave me rice and brocoli that is not even enough very terrible mangaement and terrible training really needs improvement on the customer service

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maritza Gonzalez
user_reviews_extended.Description: I prefer more noodles than Lettuce for next time please. I don't know if they were running low but my bowl is literally 70% Lettuce 30% noodles.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Fayeth Brown
user_reviews_extended.Description: I'm all for veggies, but when I ordered the black pepper chicken today I expected more than 4 tiny pieces of chicken in a pile of peppers and onions. The food is usually good but this was very disappointing. Won't be ordering again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alejandra Ortiz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Terrible service from the person Jenny, she is too rude to be serving up front and charging, they should move her, the rest is excellent, the food is very fresh, I would eat here a thousand times again, only if this person wasn't there. Lol

user_reviews_extended.Name: Laura Hess
user_reviews_extended.Description: Normally this place is a great spot to eat. Today my food was unacceptable. Burnt entrees and barely any sauce for my meal. I had to ask 2 times for my drink.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tim Whitehead
user_reviews_extended.Description: It's reasonable fast food Chinese. 'nuff said.

user_reviews_extended.Name: StAr DuSt
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food was fresh, lot of options, service was quick and staff was super nice. Had a good time

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ohr Zhao
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had the most terrible experience at Panda Express. As soon as I walked in Jessica saw me and ran to the back. She made me wait a few minutes before she came out to take my order. I did not appreciate that. After placing my order I had a coupon and when Brenda rang me up she refused to take it. She told me it was all through the app and when I asked for assistance since I haven't used the app before she refused to help. At that point I was so disgusted by the service that I decided to leave. If you would like a good meal with good atmosphere I would not go there. The employees make it obvious that they don't want to work and they don't want any customers coming in. Jessica and Brenda make it an unpleasant experience for all.

user_reviews_extended.Name: J.D.
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I stopped by to grab a quick bite. Marco was polite, helpful, and had an amazing attitude. I highly recommend this location.

Thank you Marco for doing a great job!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Theo Adodoadji
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love this panda so much! Me and my partner come here all the time when he visits and we have a lot of memories here. The workers here are always so nice, especially the girl with a big smile and glasses. The food is always ready quick and I have never had a problem. This is the best panda express ever!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Carranza
user_reviews_extended.Description: Started off already inconvenienced by having a sign on the door that said cash only. So I had to go to bank to get cash. This is one of the few stores that has the beyond orange chicken and I don’t eat meat so I had to come back to this one. THEN, I tried to order the beyond orange chicken with no sauce. I was told yes by one of the employees then the manager walks in and doesn’t even come to talk to me he tells one of his employees to tell me they can’t do it. My issue is that how come I can be inconvenienced twice and yet the manager doesn’t even have to decency to talk to me themselves. I am not even pulling the “the customer is always right” bs but the manager SHOULD always be the one to address miscommunications instead of just telling someone else who I know doesnt get paid enough for handling customer issues.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Abbie Griffin
user_reviews_extended.Description: So, are they instructed to not give beef with beef and broccoli? This is the 3rd time this has happened and it’s never the same place. This is ridiculous

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nic _
user_reviews_extended.Description: This particular store has changed significantly and I’m no longer able to dine in due to the corners they have decided to cut. We dined in over the weekend and usually the kids love coming here. Unfortunately, the store manager has now refused to offer plastic cutlery knives or spoons - so kids that need their meals cut up into bites or are still learning with spoon fed eating can no longer dine in. As a result, we aren’t going to be able to enjoy their service further as a family. They have also stopped offering CHOP STIX. They also no longer provide a cup of sweet and sour sauce with ragoons or spring rolls. Soy sauce, and any other sauce, is only available if you ask for it to be retrieved from behind the counter, and in no more than 4 packs per family, per each back-of-the-line wait while asking. Cheap and tacky unauthentic roadside take-out is the new theme here.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jedidiah Woodcock
user_reviews_extended.Description: The mushroom chicken,  which is one of my favorites, is really hit or miss here. I'd say at LEAST half the time it is maybe 10% chicken and 90% mushrooms and squash which is really disappointing when it's supposed to be my dinner. Haven't had this issue at other locations.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lametria Marable
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food was fresh! However,  the drive thru could be better! 😊

user_reviews_extended.Name: trenique horne
user_reviews_extended.Description: Went through the drive thru tonight and saw an employee sitting on the counter with his feet right next to the fried rice!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andrew Hibbs
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Despite the website stating they have the General TSO's chicken and there being 3 pieces of signage in the store trying to sell me General TSO's chicken and the girl telling me they don't have General TSO's chicken any more actually sporting a hat advertising their General TSO's chicken.  Am I still alive or stuck in some form of limbo on my way to Hell.  I just don't know any more.

Now one of the cooks put a bowl on one of his crew mates heads like a hat and then placed cooked food in it.  What kind of a restaurant are they running here.  I do not think I will be back here again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sonia Guzman
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food was good. It's been a few years since my last visit.  The atmosphere is just a place to sit but the food was a bit better than I remembered! Loved the spicy bourbon chicken!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jeff Wilson
user_reviews_extended.Description: Karyn did an OUTSTANDING JOB at resolving an issue I had with a serving size. She saw and had enough brains to see that it was not fair for what I paid. A+ job at Great Customer Sevice!!!!!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kristy Morales
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food tasted fresh and full of flavor. Definitely better than any other location I’ve been to. Employee Josh gave amazing customer service, I’ve never expected his kind of customer service from any regular fast food restaurant but he went above and beyond. Super hard worker I’m sure the company is very lucky to have! Only thing is that it was really hot inside the restaurant, felt like they didn’t have the A/C on.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jason Gandy
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered two beef and broccoli.   There was very little beef and very little broccoli.  Very dry with little sauce.     Definitely not to the standard of other Panda Express.

user_reviews_extended.Name: legion cold
user_reviews_extended.Description: My food always cold I never experience a Panda Express where the food cold

user_reviews_extended.Name: Damna919
user_reviews_extended.Description: Robot took my order and spoke over me the whole time. Took forever to order at drive through. Family down from houston hurricane knocked us out. Too tired to go back. Food cold and almost like it wasnt cooked all the way through. Not gonna lie i love some panda but this was $50 of old cold undercooked food. Pretty ticked off.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Erictigerawr
user_reviews_extended.Description: Panda Express is my favorite place to go for Chinese food! Great selection of choices to choose from and great taste.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jennifer Taylor
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Drive thru order, broccoli beef was being made fresh and I was asked if I wanted to wait 5 minutes. So I paid, pulled forward into a parking spot and waited about that amount of time. Young man brings to my car confirming I was waiting on the broccoli beef. Drove home opened the container and there were 8 pieces of broccoli and absolutely zero beef. Called and asked for my money back. No manager to speak with so if I wanted a refund I had to come back. Refunds are only done on the same day. So I took back the food and in 3 to 5 business days I'll get it credited back to my card.
They've lost me as a customer.

user_reviews_extended.Name: veronica martinez
user_reviews_extended.Description: When they have an automated machine and it keeps repeating and not getting the order right. It became really frustrating.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Daniel Perez
user_reviews_extended.Description: Although the food tasted alright, there was definitely something wrong with it since I proceeded to vomit it back up the same night I ordered it. The amount of rice to meat portion was abysmal as well. Barely any meat for a whole bowl of rice, not worth $9. I’d rather spend my money on Taco Bell then on some poorly sauced and cooked chicken and rice.

user_reviews_extended.Name: eden
user_reviews_extended.Description: Absolutely terrible. Multiple bugs in my food, hair, even NAILS. I cannot STAND the sight of this place anymore. I was excited to take my kids out to this place just to be met with absolutely disgust. NEVER come here. They were openly racist to my children and husband and the manager was just as bad. Constant disgusted looks towards my family and I, did nothing about the bugs in our food, and nothing about the racism. I'll never set foot in this place again. EVER.

user_reviews_extended.Name: T.L. Lincoln
user_reviews_extended.Description: I ordered a bowl with half chow mein, half rice, and orange chicken. The chicken was so old and some of the very last pieces that it tasted like plastic. I went into the restaurant to ask for a fresher batch and was met with some resistance. Finally it was re-prepared only to taste even worse than the first batch. The chicken was clearly overcooked, over-breaded, and rushed. I paid $10.83 for my meal and could not have been more disappointed or unfulfilled. DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS LOCATION.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Randall Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food was okay just not enough shrimp on an order. They only give 5 shrimp. The fried rice was bland, and the orange chicken in my opinion didn't taste fresh. The staff was very friendly and polite. I wasn't very hungry so maybe that's it. I might try them again when hungry and see if taste improves.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Austin Seay
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love bringing my family here and eating! Such delicious food and they give you plenty of it!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Keep the Momentum
user_reviews_extended.Description: The drive thru uses and AI to take orders. The AI cannot answer questions and cannot understand anything beyond the most basic requests. Then, there is the menu itself. For about $9, you can order a “bowl” which includes and entree and a side. I ordered beef broccoli as an entree and chow mein as a side. I asked if they had lo mein and the AI just automatically gave me chow mein. When I got my food, there was no side. The entree bowl was the entire thing with the “side” filling most of the bowl and some space on the top of then bowl for the actual entree. It should absolutely be zero stars for deceptive practices. Also, the food was mediocre at best.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Trisha Ramsey
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I ate there for the 1st time and they asked me what type of rice I wanted and I said regular  white rice steamed. When I got the order home I had Fried Rice in the bag. I was disappointed..
It runed the experiencec for me  because I wanted to have it with my entree

When I went back the next day with my receipt, to tell them about it,  the woman that I spoke with was very rude to me treated me like I was asking for a hand out when I already had my receipt for $30 in my hand, m to show it to the manager. All I wanted was the correct rice because I saved the meal for the next day and ate something else I had in my refrigerator instead. Her interaction with me was uncalled for and I will never go back there again!

user_reviews_extended.Name: BJ3 Enterprises
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love coming to this location. The staff everytime is amazing and so sweet. Special S/o to Viviana(may have spelled wrong lol) and Mar who took time out to make sure I had fresh batch of orange chicken, which I request everytime and just all around exceptional customer service! I came around 6:30pm and order number 460515

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jonathan Greathouse
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Ordered a plate through the drive through this afternoon.
Orange chicken, Broccoli Beef and steamed rice.  Got it home and opened the box to eat. There were 4 pieces of broccoli and one tiny piece of meat.  The orange chicken was all batter with very little meat.
Not sure if this is happening throughout the entire company but I would definitely stay away from this location.  Not worth the price at all.

user_reviews_extended.Name: yasmine nancie
user_reviews_extended.Description: Chicken was super fatty and and the veggies in the lo mein was not cooked..they also did not give me my receipt..

user_reviews_extended.Name: Pat Vincent
user_reviews_extended.Description: This place is the same. Floor Cleaning towel is kept 5cm away from the food. After wiping the glass Juliana didn’t wash her hands before touching food. Rain attends more than 3 orders at a time and mess everything up. Billed wrong amount. Entrees we’re missing in the bag. Fried Rice is under cooked. They give priority to drive through than people ordering in store. This place needs some professional staffs and a manager who knows his job. Staff Rain put some fried rice into my to-go plate and took it from mine to another persons entree plate another so she can finish some orders. Some employees working 200% and others working 10%.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Albert Castañeda
user_reviews_extended.Description: I placed an online order for pickup. The pickup time eta was impressive. I walked in and was greeted by this a young staff member who was really nice and welcoming (I was really tired from my day I forgot to check his name tag but he had some cool looking tats and nice smile ). The whole process was seamless. I stopped by bc of the T-Mobile Tuesday promo and glad I did bc the meal was delish. I'll definitely be coming back 😄.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Serg Ko
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Good food, much better than traditional American burgers)
Some food is sweet, but you can find also meal without much sugar.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maná Diario
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was visiting the store and the manager was not nice at all, and yelling to me , when i was ordering , the food looks good but the customer service is not good.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Steve Griffin
user_reviews_extended.Description: If items are not available they dont need to be on the menu. I tried to order an item from the menu for shanghi steak and it was switch to an alternative type. When i said i didnt want that type the lady said that shanghi was nor available. So i said it shouldn’t be on the menu and you just change what i ordered without telling me you were going to do this. Not the first time ive had problems here

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lisvi Zavaleta
user_reviews_extended.Description: So I grabbed 1 meal and 4 cubs meal. They forgot to give me my drink so I had to go in and get it. Than I o Lu got one fork. I was so disappointed. I was grabbing meals for my kids to eat while brother was in practice and now I am stuck with having to share one utensil. Than I asked for some chili sauce. I asked twice! I was told everything was inside and then I had none. Very very disappointing.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lushen Ivies
user_reviews_extended.Description: As if my last visit could get worse... today's was just pure comedy. 25 minutes spent in the drive-thru line with no food to show for it. Credit card reader was down, but oh wait. STILL have to sit through the rest of the line because of how messy this location is.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Luke Janning
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food is terrible. I ordered the two entree plate with fried rice and double orange chicken. My chicken tasted several DAYS old and my rice was overcooked and extremely dry. My wife got the broccoli beef which was sitting in oil and burnt as well. The service is fast and the workers are nice, but the food is horrible.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sharla Abbott
user_reviews_extended.Description: Staff is never friendly in drive thru. This is the 2nd time I’ve been recently and they’re out of soy sauce. You would think you could always get soy sauce with your food here. The cream cheese rangoons were not cooked properly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Fairy Hall
user_reviews_extended.Description: I am so happy we came here after a busy black friday.  Nathan was so totally friendly and exceptional on his service. We need more service like this ,but total kudos n hand claps to Nathan working evening shift. Fresh food n awesome service pairs well. But that beyond chicken was the beesThank u Panda

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jason
user_reviews_extended.Description: My experience here was unsatisfactory.  First, they left out my orange chicken, second, they often do not have Super Greens ready to serve, causing people to wait in the parking lot for their orders.  When I called to get a credit for the missing Orange Chicken, they refused to give me one over the phone, telling me to come back to the store.  They offered to put me in the "Credit Log" for a free meal the next time I drive through, but who remembers to ask for the credit when they go back?  This is a scam to never end up giving a credit to people, unless they remember to ask for it again.  To top it off, the Broccoli beef wasn't warm.  Very poor customer service all in all.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Charles
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I will make this nice as possible.  2/10/2023 Dealing with Marce the manager on shift. Was rude and unprofessional. Tried talking to Marce she just ignored what I had to say.
Bad enough the chicken was hard and horrible customer service sucks! I can only imagine food from a shelter would be higher quality than this restaurant under Marce's management. I apologize, tonight left me with nothing nice to say. Just garbage, thanks Marce.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Terry Franklin III
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food was good except my beef was missing from my broccoli beef very upsetting

user_reviews_extended.Name: JJ All
user_reviews_extended.Description: This location is THE BEST of all the Pandas. The place is always spotless and the staff is friendly. You are immediately greeted when you walk in to that location. Every location in town, SPECIALLY that god-awful one on Greenville avenue and Lovers Lane, should come to this location to see how a store is run. Reminds me of Dallas back in the 1990s when we were still known for having Southern hospitality. Great job and I'll drive outta my way to come here (even though I live close to the dirty Greenville avenue Lovers Lane location I will never go there again horrific service 😖).

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cat
user_reviews_extended.Description: Its panda express. Different every time.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Scott DeArmon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Place is clean and appealing. Staff is nice and usually generous with portions. Orange chicken probably being their main draw is very good and I love their seasonal honey sesame chicken.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rod
user_reviews_extended.Description: Improved their wait times for food prep and service is fast & friendly.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Drupad Chittaluru
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Staff is not that friendly, I ordered a mobile order to save time and effort.  And when I went to the speaker and mentioned my name and order, they asked me to pull over to the window, and once I got there, the woman asked me what I wanted by 'Nodding her head' and didn't speak at all. I said mobile order, and she again nodded her head, and I again said mobile order, then she pulled her mask out and then did the talking, " I want the name".
It doesn't affect me anyhow, but it's just some manners that they should learn on how to talk to your customers.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rosalie Arriaga
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food is fast and reasonably good for being a "fast food" chain. The place is very clean. There are several things I don't like...you have to ask for everything...napkins, spoons, knife. The crab Rangoon is lacking sufficient filling. But, my kids eat their food!! :-)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mike Lowrey
user_reviews_extended.Description: was just there got a plate an some other items but got home and found I only got half my plate. called down there someone answered, but not what I expected. seemed airheaded not all there an seemed surprised. but I didn't expect to pay 18$ to not get what I ordered. no way of rectification on there end so seems like theft. I wonder how companies get away with this.

user_reviews_extended.Name: free account
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Horrible experience at this location!! Went here last night and the workers were so rude and obviously wasn't listening to what we were saying at all. Ordered 2 plates, one half n half beijing beef and honey sesame chicken. The other chow mein, beef and broccoli and orange chicken. they gave us orange chicken on both plates, no bejing beef. The orange was wayy too sweet with an overwhelming amount of sauce on it. The broccoli was undercooked, hard, cold and tasted like a strong chemical taste. The noodles were cold and bland.

So we went back in line atleast about the chemical taste on the broccoli since that was all the beef and broccoli was was just a lot of broccoli. And they said that's how it's suppose to taste and said I could get something else but all rude and stuff saying "but that's probably going taste the same since it's all "fresh". So we asked for bejiing beef and got this small container filled with burnt, unsauced meat.

😡 Horrible location! Rude workers! Won't be coming here again, I should have just asked for a full refund! Horrible experience!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jim covey
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have enjoyed panda on previous few visits,but today's visit was just terrible. Hard tough sweet and sour chicken. Beef and broccoli was not even edible .The beef tasted like rubber. Unfortunately, I will not be returning.

user_reviews_extended.Name: mitchell gillette
user_reviews_extended.Description: I live right by this location and they have LITERALLY gotten my order wrong 8/10. Today I ordered Beijing Beef and got pineapple chicken instead. They have great food so I feel bad for even complaining but it's hard not to when I can rarely get what I actually paid for.

user_reviews_extended.Name: william
user_reviews_extended.Description: the experience was not good, the manager was very rude to me, and  yelling to the employees . She didn't care about the customers could hear when she was yelling and not good atmosphere

user_reviews_extended.Name: AliBebe Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: The employee Benz is HORRIBLE! I WILL Never go to this Panda Express again ! This is by far the worst location . Benz put my family in danger ! I REPEAT DO NOT GO TO This location!! She is extremely racist and needs to find another line of work ! Bc this is not it for her ! She clearly hates her job. If I could give zero stars I would! I worked in fast food for years and know it’s difficult but she clearly needs a new line of work .

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brittany Martinez
user_reviews_extended.Description: I normally really like this place but they never give me soy sauce or mustard sauce or any chopsticks after I ask. When I don’t go through the drive through they usually give me everything I ask for. Food is fresh. Also through the drive through they rip me off on my portions but if you go inside and look at them make it they won’t disappoint.

user_reviews_extended.Name: BigDouja Fresh
user_reviews_extended.Description: I go here 2 to 4 times a week.  It's busy from 11:30 am to around 1 pm, but the wait is typically no more than 5 to 10 min.  Sometimes they may run out of item and have to cook more, but that may add another 5 min.  No matter though.  The food is good and very well priced.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andrea Moseley
user_reviews_extended.Description: Nice counter help in general. However, the girls filling the orders didn't even bother asking if we were eating it here or taking it out. Overall, customer service needs to be worked on to better serve guests. I felt rushed and was treated as 'something' on an assembly line.

user_reviews_extended.Name: DIANA NOYOLA
user_reviews_extended.Description: they always forget to put straws or a sauce for my food, this time they forgot to put my eggroll in my bag. Wednesday 06/11/2025

user_reviews_extended.Name: Candice Soils
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered my food tonight got home to attempt to dig in. Got about 3 bites in when I noticed the very large leg of an unidentified insect (I'm mortified I may have eaten the rest of it) called the restaurant, the manager wanted to argue semantics about which part was the entrée and which was the sides. Ma'am,  I have my receipt and I brought the food back with the leg included I'm not worried about what was what I'm worried about why there's a bug in my food and why she was completely unphased by the fact. Yes I received my refund but the lack of shock or empathy involved leads me to believe this is a recurring issue. Shame

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tohho 1972
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered online,  tried to pick up from drive through, was told to come inside, to find out order was not ready yet, will not come back. Took them extra 20 minutes to get order ready, after application told me it was ready. Beef and broccoli had minimal amount of beef, do not go there.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Martha Aguilar
user_reviews_extended.Description: The service was great ! Friendly and fast, just 4 stars because the facility was hot like the AC was broken. My favorite dish is very spicy so I was sweating and the soda machine didn't had ice and no sugar available for my cold/ hot tea.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tranita Piffins
user_reviews_extended.Description: I ordered the orange chicken & chow mein bowl. The noodles were very dry. I also ordered the cream cheese rangoons & they were a little chewy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mark
user_reviews_extended.Description: WOW. This is by any definition or degree barely classified as edible. As a big eater, I could not believe less than half of this landfill quality substance was eaten. For those who ask, "how much can anyone ruin fried rice," this place is your answer. This is not inferior for Chinese food but inferior for anything resembling something should go into your body. This should be served in a red haz-med bag.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian Shanklin
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love Panda Express.  The onarge chicken had become my latest food addiction.  But in this night, the cook must have put on WAY to much sauce.  Because it did not taste like normal and actually I did not enjoy my plate.  I'm certain it was a one time experience though

user_reviews_extended.Name: Terry Chaney
user_reviews_extended.Description: Today, on the Chinese New year's day, they have given out special coupons for a free sample of the firecracker shrimp entree. They also included a coupon for a free drink. Only one coupon can be used each day. It was a great taste of a great new entree.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kevin Schwantz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Portions have greatly reduced. What a rip off!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mason Everett
user_reviews_extended.Description: My friend and I used to get food here once a week. The staff is very friendly, but sometimes the food just doesn't come out right. It can be a little too greasy, a little too fatty, or just a little off in taste. But not so bad that we stopped coming back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: HB D
user_reviews_extended.Description: The woman serving today was rude and unfriendly. Skip this location!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shrelle
user_reviews_extended.Description: A joke… they give you less and less food every single time and the price is still the same. This was the last straw, I’m never going back. Just shut down if you’re not going to give people food. This is ridiculous. Never again and I’ll make sure everyone I know stops patronizing them. We need to put this spot out of business. I’m rallying all my Dallas peeps on this one..

user_reviews_extended.Name: David Ornelas
user_reviews_extended.Description: The person who makes the fried rice should be fired ASAP. The rice is not cooked it’s hard to chew.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tex Morgan
user_reviews_extended.Description:
One the best service food chains out there !
Always a great experience due to consistency in top notch friendly service and fresh food.
An example for all fast food chains
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian O'Neill
user_reviews_extended.Description: Probably the worst Panda Express in North Dallas. Employees are incredibly rude like they are doing you a favor, terrible portion size, and EVERYTIME I eat here they give me lip when I ask for a fortune cookie or sample from their seasonal menu. Save your money cause this place ain’t worth it, chief.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tara Sims
user_reviews_extended.Description: How on earth can people rate Panda Express so high!! It’s subpar Chinese. Most entrees are mainly vegetables hardly any protein.  The fried rice and lo mein have no flavor. I’m not sure how they do it but to look at the lo mein you think it would have flavor the noodles have a brown tint because of the soy sauce but they are so dry. Ditto on the fried rice. The other option for a side is vegetables don’t need any more of those because that’s my entree. 🙄

user_reviews_extended.Name: nila perez
user_reviews_extended.Description: the best Panda Express I’ve ever tasted the teriyaki chicken was soooo good not only that customer service was good big shout out to the guy with glasses working that day! Update I called to give the cook a shout out and they blocked my number super disappointing

user_reviews_extended.Name: Josh Serletic
user_reviews_extended.Description: It's nice to know that Panda Express keeps things pretty much the same everywhere you go. I get to order the standards that I know and I get exactly what I expect. Friendly staff always with a smile never any issues here.

user_reviews_extended.Name: TOM MAZZER
user_reviews_extended.Description: I used my card to purchase lunch. I apparently drove off without my card. I went back and am told it would take 15 mins to “check” if my card was there. I was 1 of 4 ppl in restaurant. Why does it take 15 mins to “look” for a damned card? Help me understand

user_reviews_extended.Name: J. Hernandes
user_reviews_extended.Description: Every time I get food from this place, they can’t get it right. Nothing complicated like minus this and that. It’s not bad food and I’m not allergic to anything but please check the bag before you leave the drive thru.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jon Langbert
user_reviews_extended.Description: Slow service, but when some classless folks tried to cut, at least the employee put them in their place. I can't comment on the food because I just take my kids there. I'm a vegetarian and they don't have a single tofu option for me. The kids like the food, but you have to keep an eye on the employees because sometimes they will just give you the veggies and not the chicken that's supposed to be in it.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kevin Sokol
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The food is usually good here.

Giving 3 stars because very recently they started using AI to take orders at the drive thru. No thanks

user_reviews_extended.Name: Warren Leal
user_reviews_extended.Description: Worst service ever the drive thru guy didn't give me what I asked for just thru in whatever sauce he saw and just handed my food like nothing, my food was upside on the foam plate. Will be reaching out to corporate about this store.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jo Jo
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food is okay for a panda express, it's the rude guy at the drive-thru that gets them the low rating. Very unprofessional and speaks to you in a very offhand manner. 3rd or 4th time I've had this guy over time and always the same gruff manner.

user_reviews_extended.Name: ASMRyouVEGANyet?
user_reviews_extended.Description: I got the beyond chikn, chow mein, rice, veggie rolls, and a drink and it was delicious. Everything was hot and fresh and they gave big portions. They weren't stingy!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rodney Crawford
user_reviews_extended.Description: Love their food and prices. And their service is very good. Got my family 4 dinners tonight for $45 and it was enough food to have leftovers. You cannot beat that price for the high quality.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jillian Angel Roberts
user_reviews_extended.Description: This was my very first time trying any Panda Express... And OMG! Everything was so amazingly delicious... I think I fell in love ...jk lolz ... but I will definitely be a returning customer! If I could give 10 stars , I would ☺️😍😍😍

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tom Diekmeier
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been eating at Panda Express in California and Texas for close to 20 years. This Panda is by far the worst. Especially if you come in an hour to two hours before closing. They never have food ready, it's always a wait!
And the food that they do have that has been sitting there forever, and is not close to being fresh.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Yazmine Miller
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love the chow mein at Panda Express, but they need to reduce the amount of veggies they put in it. If I wanted veggies, I would have asked for a side. I wish I can post a picture of my drive thru order. Hardly, any chow mein and mostly all veggies AND you forgot to add my fortune cookie. Why?

user_reviews_extended.Name: Leda Chai-ung
user_reviews_extended.Description: I barely eat out to begin with but the few times I would come here I normally wouldn't have an issue but after what I experienced if I ever do from Panda Express it won't be from this location again

user_reviews_extended.Name: Andrew Harrington
user_reviews_extended.Description: Quick and tasty Chinese inspired fast food. The restaurant was nice and clean when I arrived and the options all looked fresh and available so there was no wait in getting the options that I wanted.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jayme Meadows
user_reviews_extended.Description: Everything was fresh and tasted great today, young man at the drive through was smooth and efficient as well.  Love the New Sizzling Shrimp...

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sandy Soul

user_reviews_extended.Name: Medved in USA
user_reviews_extended.Description: В целом всё действительно получилось довольно-таки вкусно — гармоничные ароматы, приятная текстура, хорошее первое впечатление. Но ощущается лёгкий перебор по соли, сахару и жиру: вкус становится чуть тяжелее, чем хотелось бы, и теряется тонкий баланс. Если немного снизить эти три компонента, блюдо будет восприниматься заметно легче и чище по вкусу.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Elias Caña
user_reviews_extended.Description: Los chicos de panda express han de ser de los mejores cocineros que hay en Dallas! Espectacular su comida, su servicio y el drive-throu es super rápido. Muchas gracias por preparar tan deliciosa comida - voy al menos 2 veces por semana y jamás me ha decepcionado su sabor y su calidad!
